authors_text: Lingyu Du,Guohao Lan
title: FreeGaze: Resource-efficient Gaze Estimation via Frequency Domain Contrastive Learning
title_zh: FreeGaze：通过频域对比学习实现资源高效的注视估计
abstract: Gaze estimation is of great importance to many scientific fields and daily applications, ranging from fundamental research in cognitive psychology to attention-aware mobile systems. While recent advancements in deep learning have yielded remarkable successes in building highly accurate gaze estimation systems, the associated high computational cost and the reliance on large-scale labeled gaze data for supervised learning place challenges on the practical use of existing solutions. To move beyond these limitations, we present FreeGaze, a resource-efficient framework for unsupervised gaze representation learning. FreeGaze incorporates the frequency domain gaze estimation and the contrastive gaze representation learning in its design. The former significantly alleviates the computational burden in both system calibration and gaze estimation, and dramatically reduces the system latency; while the latter overcomes the data labeling hurdle of existing supervised learning-based counterparts, and ensures efficient gaze representation learning in the absence of gaze label. Our evaluation on two gaze estimation datasets shows that FreeGaze can achieve comparable gaze estimation accuracy with existing supervised learning-based approach, while enabling up to 6.81 and 1.67 times speedup in system calibration and gaze estimation, respectively.
summary: Gaze estimation is of great importance to many scientific fields and daily applications, ranging from fundamental research in cognitive psychology to attention-aware mobile systems. While recent advancements in deep learning have yielded remarkable successes in building highly accurate gaze estimation systems, the associated high computational cost and the reliance on large-scale labeled gaze data for supervised learning place challenges on the practical use of existing solutions. To move beyond these limitations, we present FreeGaze, a resource-efficient framework for unsupervised gaze representation learning. FreeGaze incorporates the frequency domain gaze estimation and the contrastive gaze representation learning in its design. The former significantly alleviates the computational burden in both system calibration and gaze estimation, and dramatically reduces the system latency; while the latter overcomes the data labeling hurdle of existing supervised learning-based counterparts, and ensures efficient gaze representation learning in the absence of gaze label. Our evaluation on two gaze estimation datasets shows that FreeGaze can achieve comparable gaze estimation accuracy with existing supervised learning-based approach, while enabling up to 6.81 and 1.67 times speedup in system calibration and gaze estimation, respectively.
abstract_zh: 视线估计对于许多科学领域和日常应用都非常重要，从认知心理学的基础研究到注意力感知移动系统。虽然深度学习的最新进展在构建高精度注视估计系统方面取得了显着的成功，但相关的高计算成本以及监督学习对大规模标记注视数据的依赖对现有解决方案的实际使用提出了挑战。为了超越这些限制，我们提出了 FreeGaze，一个用于无监督注视表示学习的资源高效框架。 FreeGaze 在其设计中结合了频域注视估计和对比注视表示学习。前者显着减轻了系统标定和注视估计的计算负担，并显着降低了系统延迟；而后者克服了现有基于监督学习的数据标记障碍，并确保在没有注视标签的情况下有效的注视表示学习。我们对两个注视估计数据集的评估表明，FreeGaze 可以实现与现有的基于监督学习的方法相当的注视估计精度，同时在系统校准和注视估计方面分别实现高达 6.81 和 1.67 倍的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FreeGaze框架，通过频率域对比学习实现高效无监督的眼动估计。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动估计方法计算成本高且依赖大规模标注数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 结合频率域眼动估计与对比学习，前者降低计算负载，后者实现无监督表征学习。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上达到与监督方法相当的精度，系统校准和估计速度分别提升6.81倍和1.67倍。
AI.conclusion: FreeGaze有效平衡了精度与效率，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Philipp Schröppel,Jan Bechtold,Artemij Amiranashvili,Thomas Brox
title: A Benchmark and a Baseline for Robust Multi-view Depth Estimation
title_zh: 鲁棒多视图深度估计的基准和基线
abstract: Recent deep learning approaches for multi-view depth estimation are employed either in a depth-from-video or a multi-view stereo setting. Despite different settings, these approaches are technically similar: they correlate multiple source views with a keyview to estimate a depth map for the keyview. In this work, we introduce the Robust Multi-View Depth Benchmark that is built upon a set of public datasets and allows evaluation in both settings on data from different domains. We evaluate recent approaches and find imbalanced performances across domains. Further, we consider a third setting, where camera poses are available and the objective is to estimate the corresponding depth maps with their correct scale. We show that recent approaches do not generalize across datasets in this setting. This is because their cost volume output runs out of distribution. To resolve this, we present the Robust MVD Baseline model for multi-view depth estimation, which is built upon existing components but employs a novel scale augmentation procedure. It can be applied for robust multi-view depth estimation, independent of the target data. We provide code for the proposed benchmark and baseline model at https://github.com/lmb-freiburg/robustmvd.
summary: Recent deep learning approaches for multi-view depth estimation are employed either in a depth-from-video or a multi-view stereo setting. Despite different settings, these approaches are technically similar: they correlate multiple source views with a keyview to estimate a depth map for the keyview. In this work, we introduce the Robust Multi-View Depth Benchmark that is built upon a set of public datasets and allows evaluation in both settings on data from different domains. We evaluate recent approaches and find imbalanced performances across domains. Further, we consider a third setting, where camera poses are available and the objective is to estimate the corresponding depth maps with their correct scale. We show that recent approaches do not generalize across datasets in this setting. This is because their cost volume output runs out of distribution. To resolve this, we present the Robust MVD Baseline model for multi-view depth estimation, which is built upon existing components but employs a novel scale augmentation procedure. It can be applied for robust multi-view depth estimation, independent of the target data. We provide code for the proposed benchmark and baseline model at https://github.com/lmb-freiburg/robustmvd.
abstract_zh: 最近用于多视图深度估计的深度学习方法被用于视频深度或多视图立体设置。尽管设置不同，但这些方法在技术上是相似的：它们将多个源视图与关键视图相关联，以估计关键视图的深度图。在这项工作中，我们引入了鲁棒多视图深度基准，它建立在一组公共数据集的基础上，并允许在两种设置中对来自不同域的数据进行评估。我们评估最近的方法并发现跨领域的性能不平衡。此外，我们考虑第三种设置，其中相机姿势可用，目标是用正确的比例估计相应的深度图。我们表明，最近的方法不能在这种情况下跨数据集泛化。这是因为他们的成本量产出超出了分配范围。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了用于多视图深度估计的鲁棒 MVD 基线模型，该模型建立在现有组件的基础上，但采用了一种新颖的尺度增强程序。它可用于独立于目标数据的鲁棒多视图深度估计。我们在 https://github.com/lmb-freiburg/robustmvd 上提供了建议的基准和基线模型的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个鲁棒多视角深度估计的基准和基线模型，用于跨不同领域和设置的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多视角深度估计任务中存在跨领域性能不均衡问题，且在有相机姿态的设置下无法泛化，因成本体积输出超出分布范围。
AI.method: 构建基于公共数据集的鲁棒多视角深度基准，并提出结合新型尺度增强策略的基线模型，以提升跨域泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明近期方法在跨数据集任务中表现不佳，而所提基线模型在多个领域和设置中均展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过设计新型尺度增强方法，本文提出的基线模型有效解决了多视角深度估计的跨域泛化问题，为后续研究提供基准支持。

authors_text: Junhao Cai,Jingcheng Su,Zida Zhou,Hui Cheng,Qifeng Chen,Michael Y Wang
title: Volumetric-based Contact Point Detection for 7-DoF Grasping
title_zh: 用于 7 自由度抓取的基于体积的接触点检测
comment: Accepted to Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022. Supplementary materials: https://openreview.net/forum?id=SrSCqW4dq9
comments: Accepted to Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022. Supplementary materials: https://openreview.net/forum?id=SrSCqW4dq9
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel grasp pipeline based on contact point detection on the truncated signed distance function (TSDF) volume to achieve closed-loop 7-degree-of-freedom (7-DoF) grasping on cluttered environments. The key aspects of our method are that 1) the proposed pipeline exploits the TSDF volume in terms of multi-view fusion, contact-point sampling and evaluation, and collision checking, which provides reliable and collision-free 7-DoF gripper poses with real-time performance; 2) the contact-based pose representation effectively eliminates the ambiguity introduced by the normal-based methods, which provides a more precise and flexible solution. Extensive simulated and real-robot experiments demonstrate that the proposed pipeline can select more antipodal and stable grasp poses and outperforms normal-based baselines in terms of the grasp success rate in both simulated and physical scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel grasp pipeline based on contact point detection on the truncated signed distance function (TSDF) volume to achieve closed-loop 7-degree-of-freedom (7-DoF) grasping on cluttered environments. The key aspects of our method are that 1) the proposed pipeline exploits the TSDF volume in terms of multi-view fusion, contact-point sampling and evaluation, and collision checking, which provides reliable and collision-free 7-DoF gripper poses with real-time performance; 2) the contact-based pose representation effectively eliminates the ambiguity introduced by the normal-based methods, which provides a more precise and flexible solution. Extensive simulated and real-robot experiments demonstrate that the proposed pipeline can select more antipodal and stable grasp poses and outperforms normal-based baselines in terms of the grasp success rate in both simulated and physical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于截断符号距离函数（TSDF）体积上的接触点检测的新型抓取管道，以在杂乱环境中实现闭环7自由度（7-DoF）抓取。我们方法的关键方面是：1）所提出的管道在多视图融合、接触点采样和评估以及碰撞检查方面利用了 TSDF 体积，从而提供了可靠且无碰撞的具有实时性能的 7-DoF 夹具姿势； 2）基于接触的姿态表示有效地消除了基于法线的方法引入的歧义，提供了更精确和灵活的解决方案。广泛的模拟和真实机器人实验表明，所提出的管道可以选择更多对映和稳定的抓取姿势，并且在模拟和物理场景中的抓取成功率方面均优于基于正常的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于体素的接触点检测方法，用于在杂乱环境中实现7自由度抓取。
AI.motivation: 传统基于法线的方法在杂乱环境中存在歧义，难以实现精确且实时的7-DoF抓取。
AI.method: 利用截断符号距离函数（TSDF）体素进行多视角融合、接触点采样与评估，并通过接触点表示替代法线表示以消除歧义。
AI.result: 仿真与真实机器人实验表明，该方法在抓取成功率和稳定性上优于基于法线的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过体素接触点检测实现了高效、精确的7-DoF抓取，适用于复杂环境。

motivation: 传统基于法线的方法在杂乱环境中存在歧义，难以实现精确且实时的7-DoF抓取。
method: 利用截断符号距离函数（TSDF）体素进行多视角融合、接触点采样与评估，并通过接触点表示替代法线表示以消除歧义。
result: 仿真与真实机器人实验表明，该方法在抓取成功率和稳定性上优于基于法线的基线方法。
conclusion: 该方法通过体素接触点检测实现了高效、精确的7-DoF抓取，适用于复杂环境。
search_text: Volumetric-based Contact Point Detection for 7-DoF Grasping 用于 7 自由度抓取的基于体积的接触点检测 In this paper, we propose a novel grasp pipeline based on contact point detection on the truncated signed distance function (TSDF) volume to achieve closed-loop 7-degree-of-freedom (7-DoF) grasping on cluttered environments. The key aspects of our method are that 1) the proposed pipeline exploits the TSDF volume in terms of multi-view fusion, contact-point sampling and evaluation, and collision checking, which provides reliable and collision-free 7-DoF gripper poses with real-time performance; 2) the contact-based pose representation effectively eliminates the ambiguity introduced by the normal-based methods, which provides a more precise and flexible solution. Extensive simulated and real-robot experiments demonstrate that the proposed pipeline can select more antipodal and stable grasp poses and outperforms normal-based baselines in terms of the grasp success rate in both simulated and physical scenarios. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于截断符号距离函数（TSDF）体积上的接触点检测的新型抓取管道，以在杂乱环境中实现闭环7自由度（7-DoF）抓取。我们方法的关键方面是：1）所提出的管道在多视图融合、接触点采样和评估以及碰撞检查方面利用了 TSDF 体积，从而提供了可靠且无碰撞的具有实时性能的 7-DoF 夹具姿势； 2）基于接触的姿态表示有效地消除了基于法线的方法引入的歧义，提供了更精确和灵活的解决方案。广泛的模拟和真实机器人实验表明，所提出的管道可以选择更多对映和稳定的抓取姿势，并且在模拟和物理场景中的抓取成功率方面均优于基于正常的基线。 本文提出了一种基于体素的接触点检测方法，用于在杂乱环境中实现7自由度抓取。 Junhao Cai,Jingcheng Su,Zida Zhou,Hui Cheng,Qifeng Chen,Michael Y Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Santiago Castro,Naihao Deng,Pingxuan Huang,Mihai Burzo,Rada Mihalcea
title: WildQA: In-the-Wild Video Question Answering
title_zh: WildQA：野外视频问答
comment: *: Equal contribution; COLING 2022 oral; project webpage: https://lit.eecs.umich.edu/wildqa/
comments: *: Equal contribution; COLING 2022 oral; project webpage: https://lit.eecs.umich.edu/wildqa/
abstract: Existing video understanding datasets mostly focus on human interactions, with little attention being paid to the "in the wild" settings, where the videos are recorded outdoors. We propose WILDQA, a video understanding dataset of videos recorded in outside settings. In addition to video question answering (Video QA), we also introduce the new task of identifying visual support for a given question and answer (Video Evidence Selection). Through evaluations using a wide range of baseline models, we show that WILDQA poses new challenges to the vision and language research communities. The dataset is available at https://lit.eecs.umich.edu/wildqa/.
summary: Existing video understanding datasets mostly focus on human interactions, with little attention being paid to the "in the wild" settings, where the videos are recorded outdoors. We propose WILDQA, a video understanding dataset of videos recorded in outside settings. In addition to video question answering (Video QA), we also introduce the new task of identifying visual support for a given question and answer (Video Evidence Selection). Through evaluations using a wide range of baseline models, we show that WILDQA poses new challenges to the vision and language research communities. The dataset is available at https://lit.eecs.umich.edu/wildqa/.
abstract_zh: 现有的视频理解数据集主要关注人类交互，很少关注视频在户外录制的“野外”环境。我们提出 WILDQA，一个在外部环境中录制的视频理解数据集。除了视频问答（视频 QA）之外，我们还引入了识别给定问题和答案的视觉支持的新任务（视频证据选择）。通过使用广泛的基线模型进行评估，我们表明 WILDQA 给视觉和语言研究社区带来了新的挑战。该数据集可在 https://lit.eecs.umich.edu/wildqa/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出WILDQA数据集，包含户外视频，并引入视频证据选择任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集多关注人类互动，缺乏户外场景，因此构建WILDQA以填补这一空白。
AI.method: 收集户外视频并创建问答对，引入视频证据选择任务。
AI.result: 评估显示WILDQA对模型提出更高要求，凸显户外场景的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: WILDQA为视觉与语言研究提供新资源，推动模型在复杂场景下的发展。

authors_text: Dongmin Hyun,Chanyoung Park,Junsu Cho,Hwanjo Yu
title: Beyond Learning from Next Item: Sequential Recommendation via Personalized Interest Sustainability
title_zh: 超越从下一个项目学习：通过个性化兴趣可持续性进行顺序推荐
abstract: Sequential recommender systems have shown effective suggestions by capturing users' interest drift. There have been two groups of existing sequential models: user- and item-centric models. The user-centric models capture personalized interest drift based on each user's sequential consumption history, but do not explicitly consider whether users' interest in items sustains beyond the training time, i.e., interest sustainability. On the other hand, the item-centric models consider whether users' general interest sustains after the training time, but it is not personalized. In this work, we propose a recommender system taking advantages of the models in both categories. Our proposed model captures personalized interest sustainability, indicating whether each user's interest in items will sustain beyond the training time or not. We first formulate a task that requires to predict which items each user will consume in the recent period of the training time based on users' consumption history. We then propose simple yet effective schemes to augment users' sparse consumption history. Extensive experiments show that the proposed model outperforms 10 baseline models on 11 real-world datasets. The codes are available at https://github.com/dmhyun/PERIS.
summary: Sequential recommender systems have shown effective suggestions by capturing users' interest drift. There have been two groups of existing sequential models: user- and item-centric models. The user-centric models capture personalized interest drift based on each user's sequential consumption history, but do not explicitly consider whether users' interest in items sustains beyond the training time, i.e., interest sustainability. On the other hand, the item-centric models consider whether users' general interest sustains after the training time, but it is not personalized. In this work, we propose a recommender system taking advantages of the models in both categories. Our proposed model captures personalized interest sustainability, indicating whether each user's interest in items will sustain beyond the training time or not. We first formulate a task that requires to predict which items each user will consume in the recent period of the training time based on users' consumption history. We then propose simple yet effective schemes to augment users' sparse consumption history. Extensive experiments show that the proposed model outperforms 10 baseline models on 11 real-world datasets. The codes are available at https://github.com/dmhyun/PERIS.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐系统通过捕获用户的兴趣漂移而显示出有效的建议。现有的顺序模型有两组：以用户为中心的模型和以项目为中心的模型。以用户为中心的模型根据每个用户的顺序消费历史捕获个性化兴趣漂移，但没有明确考虑用户对项目的兴趣是否持续超过训练时间，即兴趣可持续性。另一方面，以项目为中心的模型考虑了用户的总体兴趣在训练时间后是否持续，但它不是个性化的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个利用这两个类别的模型的推荐系统。我们提出的模型捕捉了个性化兴趣的可持续性，表明每个用户对项目的兴趣是否会在训练时间之外持续下去。我们首先制定一个任务，要求根据用户的消费历史来预测每个用户在最近一段训练时间内将消费哪些商品。然后，我们提出简单而有效的方案来增加用户的稀疏消费历史。大量实验表明，所提出的模型在 11 个真实数据集上优于 10 个基线模型。这些代码可从 https://github.com/dmhyun/PERIS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合用户和项目中心模型的序列推荐系统，通过捕捉用户的个性化兴趣持续性来提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有用户中心模型未考虑兴趣持续性，项目中心模型缺乏个性化，需融合两者优势以改进推荐效果。
AI.method: 提出预测用户近期消费项的任务，并通过增强稀疏消费历史的方案实现个性化兴趣持续性建模。
AI.result: 在11个真实数据集上优于10个基线模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效结合用户与项目中心方法，通过个性化兴趣持续性分析提升推荐性能。

authors_text: Dhanalaxmi Gaddam,Jean Lahoud,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Hisham Cholakkal
title: CMR3D: Contextualized Multi-Stage Refinement for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: CMR3D：3D 对象检测的情境化多阶段细化
abstract: Existing deep learning-based 3D object detectors typically rely on the appearance of individual objects and do not explicitly pay attention to the rich contextual information of the scene. In this work, we propose Contextualized Multi-Stage Refinement for 3D Object Detection (CMR3D) framework, which takes a 3D scene as input and strives to explicitly integrate useful contextual information of the scene at multiple levels to predict a set of object bounding-boxes along with their corresponding semantic labels. To this end, we propose to utilize a context enhancement network that captures the contextual information at different levels of granularity followed by a multi-stage refinement module to progressively refine the box positions and class predictions. Extensive experiments on the large-scale ScanNetV2 benchmark reveal the benefits of our proposed method, leading to an absolute improvement of 2.0% over the baseline. In addition to 3D object detection, we investigate the effectiveness of our CMR3D framework for the problem of 3D object counting. Our source code will be publicly released.
summary: Existing deep learning-based 3D object detectors typically rely on the appearance of individual objects and do not explicitly pay attention to the rich contextual information of the scene. In this work, we propose Contextualized Multi-Stage Refinement for 3D Object Detection (CMR3D) framework, which takes a 3D scene as input and strives to explicitly integrate useful contextual information of the scene at multiple levels to predict a set of object bounding-boxes along with their corresponding semantic labels. To this end, we propose to utilize a context enhancement network that captures the contextual information at different levels of granularity followed by a multi-stage refinement module to progressively refine the box positions and class predictions. Extensive experiments on the large-scale ScanNetV2 benchmark reveal the benefits of our proposed method, leading to an absolute improvement of 2.0% over the baseline. In addition to 3D object detection, we investigate the effectiveness of our CMR3D framework for the problem of 3D object counting. Our source code will be publicly released.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于深度学习的 3D 对象检测器通常依赖于单个对象的外观，并且没有明确关注场景的丰富上下文信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D 对象检测的上下文多阶段细化 (CMR3D) 框架，该框架以 3D 场景作为输入，并努力在多个级别上显式集成场景的有用上下文信息，以预测一组对象边界框及其相应的语义标签。为此，我们建议利用上下文增强网络来捕获不同粒度级别的上下文信息，然后使用多级细化模块来逐步细化框位置和类别预测。在大规模 ScanNetV2 基准测试上进行的大量实验揭示了我们提出的方法的优点，与基线相比绝对提高了 2.0%。除了 3D 对象检测之外，我们还研究了 CMR3D 框架对于 3D 对象计数问题的有效性。我们的源代码将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CMR3D框架，通过多级上下文信息整合提升3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测方法忽视场景上下文信息，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计上下文增强网络捕获多粒度场景信息，结合多阶段精炼模块迭代优化检测结果。
AI.result: 在ScanNetV2数据集上较基线提升2.0%，并验证了框架在3D目标计数任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CMR3D通过显式建模场景上下文显著提升3D检测性能，代码将公开共享。

conclusion: CMR3D通过显式建模场景上下文显著提升3D检测性能，代码将公开共享。
search_text: CMR3D: Contextualized Multi-Stage Refinement for 3D Object Detection CMR3D：3D 对象检测的情境化多阶段细化 Existing deep learning-based 3D object detectors typically rely on the appearance of individual objects and do not explicitly pay attention to the rich contextual information of the scene. In this work, we propose Contextualized Multi-Stage Refinement for 3D Object Detection (CMR3D) framework, which takes a 3D scene as input and strives to explicitly integrate useful contextual information of the scene at multiple levels to predict a set of object bounding-boxes along with their corresponding semantic labels. To this end, we propose to utilize a context enhancement network that captures the contextual information at different levels of granularity followed by a multi-stage refinement module to progressively refine the box positions and class predictions. Extensive experiments on the large-scale ScanNetV2 benchmark reveal the benefits of our proposed method, leading to an absolute improvement of 2.0% over the baseline. In addition to 3D object detection, we investigate the effectiveness of our CMR3D framework for the problem of 3D object counting. Our source code will be publicly released. 现有的基于深度学习的 3D 对象检测器通常依赖于单个对象的外观，并且没有明确关注场景的丰富上下文信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D 对象检测的上下文多阶段细化 (CMR3D) 框架，该框架以 3D 场景作为输入，并努力在多个级别上显式集成场景的有用上下文信息，以预测一组对象边界框及其相应的语义标签。为此，我们建议利用上下文增强网络来捕获不同粒度级别的上下文信息，然后使用多级细化模块来逐步细化框位置和类别预测。在大规模 ScanNetV2 基准测试上进行的大量实验揭示了我们提出的方法的优点，与基线相比绝对提高了 2.0%。除了 3D 对象检测之外，我们还研究了 CMR3D 框架对于 3D 对象计数问题的有效性。我们的源代码将公开发布。 本文提出CMR3D框架，通过多级上下文信息整合提升3D目标检测性能。 Dhanalaxmi Gaddam,Jean Lahoud,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Hisham Cholakkal cs.CV

authors_text: Ibrahim Alabdulmohsin,Behnam Neyshabur,Xiaohua Zhai
title: Revisiting Neural Scaling Laws in Language and Vision
title_zh: 重新审视语言和视觉中的神经尺度定律
abstract: The remarkable progress in deep learning in recent years is largely driven by improvements in scale, where bigger models are trained on larger datasets for longer schedules. To predict the benefit of scale empirically, we argue for a more rigorous methodology based on the extrapolation loss, instead of reporting the best-fitting (interpolating) parameters. We then present a recipe for estimating scaling law parameters reliably from learning curves. We demonstrate that it extrapolates more accurately than previous methods in a wide range of architecture families across several domains, including image classification, neural machine translation (NMT) and language modeling, in addition to tasks from the BIG-Bench evaluation benchmark. Finally, we release a benchmark dataset comprising of 90 evaluation tasks to facilitate research in this domain.
summary: The remarkable progress in deep learning in recent years is largely driven by improvements in scale, where bigger models are trained on larger datasets for longer schedules. To predict the benefit of scale empirically, we argue for a more rigorous methodology based on the extrapolation loss, instead of reporting the best-fitting (interpolating) parameters. We then present a recipe for estimating scaling law parameters reliably from learning curves. We demonstrate that it extrapolates more accurately than previous methods in a wide range of architecture families across several domains, including image classification, neural machine translation (NMT) and language modeling, in addition to tasks from the BIG-Bench evaluation benchmark. Finally, we release a benchmark dataset comprising of 90 evaluation tasks to facilitate research in this domain.
abstract_zh: 近年来深度学习的显着进步很大程度上是由规模的改进推动的，即更大的模型在更大的数据集上进行更长的训练。为了凭经验预测规模的好处，我们主张基于外推损失的更严格的方法，而不是报告最佳拟合（插值）参数。然后，我们提出了一种根据学习曲线可靠地估计标度律参数的方法。我们证明，除了 BIG-Bench 评估基准的任务之外，它在跨多个领域的各种架构系列中比以前的方法更准确地进行推断，包括图像分类、神经机器翻译 (NMT) 和语言建模。最后，我们发布了包含 90 个评估任务的基准数据集，以促进该领域的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过改进的外推损失方法重新审视语言和视觉领域的神经网络扩展规律，提出可靠估计扩展参数的方案，并发布基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖插值参数预测模型扩展效益，但缺乏对实际外推性能的准确评估，需更严谨的方法论改进预测可靠性。
AI.method: 基于学习曲线提出扩展参数估计方案，通过外推损失替代传统插值方法，验证跨领域（图像分类、机器翻译等）的普适性。
AI.result: 新方法在BIG-Bench等基准任务中实现更准确的外推预测，且发布包含90个任务的扩展规律研究基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 外推损失方法显著提升扩展规律预测准确性，为模型规模优化提供可靠工具，并推动相关领域研究标准化。

authors_text: Fangwen Mu,Xiao Chen,Lin Shi,Song Wang,Qing Wang
title: Automatic Comment Generation via Multi-Pass Deliberation
title_zh: 通过多轮审议自动生成评论
abstract: Deliberation is a common and natural behavior in human daily life. For example, when writing papers or articles, we usually first write drafts, and then iteratively polish them until satisfied. In light of such a human cognitive process, we propose DECOM, which is a multi-pass deliberation framework for automatic comment generation. DECOM consists of multiple Deliberation Models and one Evaluation Model. Given a code snippet, we first extract keywords from the code and retrieve a similar code fragment from a pre-defined corpus. Then, we treat the comment of the retrieved code as the initial draft and input it with the code and keywords into DECOM to start the iterative deliberation process. At each deliberation, the deliberation model polishes the draft and generates a new comment. The evaluation model measures the quality of the newly generated comment to determine whether to end the iterative process or not. When the iterative process is terminated, the best-generated comment will be selected as the target comment. Our approach is evaluated on two real-world datasets in Java (87K) and Python (108K), and experiment results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines. A human evaluation study also confirms the comments generated by DECOM tend to be more readable, informative, and useful.
summary: Deliberation is a common and natural behavior in human daily life. For example, when writing papers or articles, we usually first write drafts, and then iteratively polish them until satisfied. In light of such a human cognitive process, we propose DECOM, which is a multi-pass deliberation framework for automatic comment generation. DECOM consists of multiple Deliberation Models and one Evaluation Model. Given a code snippet, we first extract keywords from the code and retrieve a similar code fragment from a pre-defined corpus. Then, we treat the comment of the retrieved code as the initial draft and input it with the code and keywords into DECOM to start the iterative deliberation process. At each deliberation, the deliberation model polishes the draft and generates a new comment. The evaluation model measures the quality of the newly generated comment to determine whether to end the iterative process or not. When the iterative process is terminated, the best-generated comment will be selected as the target comment. Our approach is evaluated on two real-world datasets in Java (87K) and Python (108K), and experiment results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines. A human evaluation study also confirms the comments generated by DECOM tend to be more readable, informative, and useful.
abstract_zh: 深思熟虑是人类日常生活中常见的、自然的行为。例如，在写论文或文章时，我们通常会先写草稿，然后迭代打磨，直到满意为止。鉴于这样的人类认知过程，我们提出了 DECOM，这是一个用于自动评论生成的多通道审议框架。 DECOM 由多个审议模型和一个评估模型组成。给定一个代码片段，我们首先从代码中提取关键字，并从预定义的语料库中检索相似的代码片段。然后，我们将检索到的代码注释作为初稿，与代码和关键字一起输入DECOM中，开始迭代审议过程。每次审议时，审议模型都会完善草案并生成新的评论。评估模型衡量新生成的评论的质量，以确定是否结束迭代过程。当迭代过程终止时，将选择生成最好的评论作为目标评论。我们的方法在 Java (87K) 和 Python (108K) 的两个现实数据集上进行了评估，实验结果表明我们的方法优于最先进的基线。一项人类评估研究还证实，DECOM 生成的评论往往更具可读性、信息量更大且更有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DECOM的多轮斟酌框架，用于自动生成代码注释。
AI.motivation: 受人类写作过程中多次修改草稿的启发，旨在通过迭代优化生成更高质量、可读性更强的代码注释。
AI.method: DECOM包含多个斟酌模型和一个评估模型。首先从代码中提取关键词并检索相似代码片段，以检索到的注释为初稿，通过多轮模型迭代优化，并由评估模型判断是否终止流程。
AI.result: 在Java（87K）和Python（108K）数据集上，DECOM优于现有最佳方法，且人类评估显示其生成的注释更易读、信息量更大。
AI.conclusion: 多轮斟酌框架能有效提升代码注释生成质量，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Badr M. Abdullah,Bernd Möbius,Dietrich Klakow
title: Integrating Form and Meaning: A Multi-Task Learning Model for Acoustic Word Embeddings
title_zh: 整合形式和意义：声学词嵌入的多任务学习模型
abstract: Models of acoustic word embeddings (AWEs) learn to map variable-length spoken word segments onto fixed-dimensionality vector representations such that different acoustic exemplars of the same word are projected nearby in the embedding space. In addition to their speech technology applications, AWE models have been shown to predict human performance on a variety of auditory lexical processing tasks. Current AWE models are based on neural networks and trained in a bottom-up approach that integrates acoustic cues to build up a word representation given an acoustic or symbolic supervision signal. Therefore, these models do not leverage or capture high-level lexical knowledge during the learning process. In this paper, we propose a multi-task learning model that incorporates top-down lexical knowledge into the training procedure of AWEs. Our model learns a mapping between the acoustic input and a lexical representation that encodes high-level information such as word semantics in addition to bottom-up form-based supervision. We experiment with three languages and demonstrate that incorporating lexical knowledge improves the embedding space discriminability and encourages the model to better separate lexical categories.
summary: Models of acoustic word embeddings (AWEs) learn to map variable-length spoken word segments onto fixed-dimensionality vector representations such that different acoustic exemplars of the same word are projected nearby in the embedding space. In addition to their speech technology applications, AWE models have been shown to predict human performance on a variety of auditory lexical processing tasks. Current AWE models are based on neural networks and trained in a bottom-up approach that integrates acoustic cues to build up a word representation given an acoustic or symbolic supervision signal. Therefore, these models do not leverage or capture high-level lexical knowledge during the learning process. In this paper, we propose a multi-task learning model that incorporates top-down lexical knowledge into the training procedure of AWEs. Our model learns a mapping between the acoustic input and a lexical representation that encodes high-level information such as word semantics in addition to bottom-up form-based supervision. We experiment with three languages and demonstrate that incorporating lexical knowledge improves the embedding space discriminability and encourages the model to better separate lexical categories.
abstract_zh: 声学词嵌入（AWE）模型学习将可变长度的口语词段映射到固定维度的向量表示上，以便同一词的不同声学样本被投影到嵌入空间中的附近。除了语音技术应用之外，AWE 模型还被证明可以预测人类在各种听觉词汇处理任务中的表现。当前的 AWE 模型基于神经网络，并采用自下而上的方法进行训练，该方法集成声音提示以在给定声音或符号监督信号的情况下构建单词表示。因此，这些模型在学习过程中不会利用或捕获高级词汇知识。在本文中，我们提出了一种多任务学习模型，将自上而下的词汇知识纳入 AWE 的训练过程中。我们的模型学习声学输入和词汇表示之间的映射，该映射除了自下而上的基于形式的监督之外，还对单词语义等高级信息进行编码。我们用三种语言进行实验，并证明合并词汇知识可以提高嵌入空间的可辨别性，并鼓励模型更好地分离词汇类别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习模型，通过整合声学输入与词汇语义信息，提升声学词嵌入（AWE）的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有AWE模型仅依赖自底向上的声学线索，缺乏对高层词汇知识的利用，导致嵌入空间区分度不足。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，联合优化声学特征与词汇语义表示，使模型同时学习自底向上声学线索和自顶向下词汇知识。
AI.result: 在三种语言实验中验证，结合词汇知识显著提升嵌入空间辨别能力并增强词类分离效果。
AI.conclusion: 整合高层词汇知识可有效提升AWE模型性能，为语音技术提供更具语义区分度的表示学习方案。

search_text: Integrating Form and Meaning: A Multi-Task Learning Model for Acoustic Word Embeddings 整合形式和意义：声学词嵌入的多任务学习模型 Models of acoustic word embeddings (AWEs) learn to map variable-length spoken word segments onto fixed-dimensionality vector representations such that different acoustic exemplars of the same word are projected nearby in the embedding space. In addition to their speech technology applications, AWE models have been shown to predict human performance on a variety of auditory lexical processing tasks. Current AWE models are based on neural networks and trained in a bottom-up approach that integrates acoustic cues to build up a word representation given an acoustic or symbolic supervision signal. Therefore, these models do not leverage or capture high-level lexical knowledge during the learning process. In this paper, we propose a multi-task learning model that incorporates top-down lexical knowledge into the training procedure of AWEs. Our model learns a mapping between the acoustic input and a lexical representation that encodes high-level information such as word semantics in addition to bottom-up form-based supervision. We experiment with three languages and demonstrate that incorporating lexical knowledge improves the embedding space discriminability and encourages the model to better separate lexical categories. 声学词嵌入（AWE）模型学习将可变长度的口语词段映射到固定维度的向量表示上，以便同一词的不同声学样本被投影到嵌入空间中的附近。除了语音技术应用之外，AWE 模型还被证明可以预测人类在各种听觉词汇处理任务中的表现。当前的 AWE 模型基于神经网络，并采用自下而上的方法进行训练，该方法集成声音提示以在给定声音或符号监督信号的情况下构建单词表示。因此，这些模型在学习过程中不会利用或捕获高级词汇知识。在本文中，我们提出了一种多任务学习模型，将自上而下的词汇知识纳入 AWE 的训练过程中。我们的模型学习声学输入和词汇表示之间的映射，该映射除了自下而上的基于形式的监督之外，还对单词语义等高级信息进行编码。我们用三种语言进行实验，并证明合并词汇知识可以提高嵌入空间的可辨别性，并鼓励模型更好地分离词汇类别。 本文提出一种多任务学习模型，通过整合声学输入与词汇语义信息，提升声学词嵌入（AWE）的表示能力。 Badr M. authors_text: Omar Seddati,Stéphane Dupont,Saïd Mahmoudi,Thierry Dutoit
title: Transformers and CNNs both Beat Humans on SBIR
title_zh: 变形金刚和 CNN 在 SBIR 上都击败了人类
abstract: Sketch-based image retrieval (SBIR) is the task of retrieving natural images (photos) that match the semantics and the spatial configuration of hand-drawn sketch queries. The universality of sketches extends the scope of possible applications and increases the demand for efficient SBIR solutions. In this paper, we study classic triplet-based SBIR solutions and show that a persistent invariance to horizontal flip (even after model finetuning) is harming performance. To overcome this limitation, we propose several approaches and evaluate in depth each of them to check their effectiveness. Our main contributions are twofold: We propose and evaluate several intuitive modifications to build SBIR solutions with better flip equivariance. We show that vision transformers are more suited for the SBIR task, and that they outperform CNNs with a large margin. We carried out numerous experiments and introduce the first models to outperform human performance on a large-scale SBIR benchmark (Sketchy). Our best model achieves a recall of 62.25% (at k = 1) on the sketchy benchmark compared to previous state-of-the-art methods 46.2%.
summary: Sketch-based image retrieval (SBIR) is the task of retrieving natural images (photos) that match the semantics and the spatial configuration of hand-drawn sketch queries. The universality of sketches extends the scope of possible applications and increases the demand for efficient SBIR solutions. In this paper, we study classic triplet-based SBIR solutions and show that a persistent invariance to horizontal flip (even after model finetuning) is harming performance. To overcome this limitation, we propose several approaches and evaluate in depth each of them to check their effectiveness. Our main contributions are twofold: We propose and evaluate several intuitive modifications to build SBIR solutions with better flip equivariance. We show that vision transformers are more suited for the SBIR task, and that they outperform CNNs with a large margin. We carried out numerous experiments and introduce the first models to outperform human performance on a large-scale SBIR benchmark (Sketchy). Our best model achieves a recall of 62.25% (at k = 1) on the sketchy benchmark compared to previous state-of-the-art methods 46.2%.
abstract_zh: 基于草图的图像检索（SBIR）是检索与手绘草图查询的语义和空间配置相匹配的自然图像（照片）的任务。草图的通用性扩展了可能的应用范围，并增加了对高效 SBIR 解决方案的需求。在本文中，我们研究了经典的基于三元组的 SBIR 解决方案，并表明水平翻转的持续不变性（即使在模型微调之后）正在损害性能。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了几种方法并深入评估每种方法以检查其有效性。我们的主要贡献有两个：我们提出并评估了几种直观的修改，以构建具有更好翻转等方差的 SBIR 解决方案。我们证明视觉 Transformer 更适合 SBIR 任务，并且它们的性能远远优于 CNN。我们进行了大量实验，并引入了第一个在大规模 SBIR 基准 (Sketchy) 上超越人类表现的模型。我们的最佳模型在粗略基准上实现了 62.25% 的召回率（k = 1），而之前最先进的方法为 46.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于草图的图像检索（SBIR）任务，提出改进方法解决水平翻转不变性问题，并验证Transformers和CNNs在该任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SBIR方法存在对水平翻转的不变性缺陷，导致性能受限，需探索更有效的模型结构和训练策略。
AI.method: 提出多种改进方案增强翻转等变性，对比分析Transformers与CNNs在SBIR任务中的表现，并在Sketchy基准测试中验证效果。
AI.result: 最佳模型在Sketchy基准上以62.25%的召回率（k=1）超越人类表现，较之前SOTA方法提升16.05%。
AI.conclusion: Vision Transformers在SBIR任务中显著优于CNNs，且通过改进翻转等变性可有效提升模型性能，首次实现超越人类水平的SBIR系统。

authors_text: Fangcheng Zhu,Yunfan Ren,Fanze Kong,Huajie Wu,Siqi Liang,Nan Chen,Wei Xu,Fu Zhang
title: Swarm-LIO: Decentralized Swarm LiDAR-inertial Odometry
title_zh: Swarm-LIO：分散式集群 LiDAR 惯性里程计
abstract: Accurate self and relative state estimation are the critical preconditions for completing swarm tasks, e.g., collaborative autonomous exploration, target tracking, search and rescue. This paper proposes Swarm-LIO: a fully decentralized state estimation method for aerial swarm systems, in which each drone performs precise ego-state estimation, exchanges ego-state and mutual observation information by wireless communication, and estimates relative state with respect to (w.r.t.) the rest of UAVs, all in real-time and only based on LiDAR-inertial measurements. A novel 3D LiDAR-based drone detection, identification and tracking method is proposed to obtain observations of teammate drones. The mutual observation measurements are then tightly-coupled with IMU and LiDAR measurements to perform real-time and accurate estimation of ego-state and relative state jointly. Extensive real-world experiments show the broad adaptability to complicated scenarios, including GPS-denied scenes, degenerate scenes for camera (dark night) or LiDAR (facing a single wall). Compared with ground-truth provided by motion capture system, the result shows the centimeter-level localization accuracy which outperforms other state-of-the-art LiDAR-inertial odometry for single UAV system.
summary: Accurate self and relative state estimation are the critical preconditions for completing swarm tasks, e.g., collaborative autonomous exploration, target tracking, search and rescue. This paper proposes Swarm-LIO: a fully decentralized state estimation method for aerial swarm systems, in which each drone performs precise ego-state estimation, exchanges ego-state and mutual observation information by wireless communication, and estimates relative state with respect to (w.r.t.) the rest of UAVs, all in real-time and only based on LiDAR-inertial measurements. A novel 3D LiDAR-based drone detection, identification and tracking method is proposed to obtain observations of teammate drones. The mutual observation measurements are then tightly-coupled with IMU and LiDAR measurements to perform real-time and accurate estimation of ego-state and relative state jointly. Extensive real-world experiments show the broad adaptability to complicated scenarios, including GPS-denied scenes, degenerate scenes for camera (dark night) or LiDAR (facing a single wall). Compared with ground-truth provided by motion capture system, the result shows the centimeter-level localization accuracy which outperforms other state-of-the-art LiDAR-inertial odometry for single UAV system.
abstract_zh: 准确的自身和相对状态估计是完成群体任务的关键前提，例如协作自主探索、目标跟踪、搜索和救援。本文提出了 Swarm-LIO：一种用于空中集群系统的完全分散的状态估计方法，其中每架无人机执行精确的自我状态估计，通过无线通信交换自我状态和相互观察信息，并估计相对于其余无人机的相对状态，所有这些都是实时的并且仅基于 LiDAR 惯性测量。提出了一种基于 3D LiDAR 的新型无人机检测、识别和跟踪方法，以获得队友无人机的观测结果。然后，相互观察测量与 IMU 和 LiDAR 测量紧密耦合，共同执行自我状态和相对状态的实时准确估计。广泛的现实世界实验表明，其对复杂场景的广泛适应性，包括 GPS 拒绝场景、相机退化场景（黑夜）或 LiDAR（面向单墙）。与运动捕捉系统提供的地面实况相比，结果显示厘米级的定位精度优于其他最先进的单无人机系统激光雷达惯性里程计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Swarm-LIO的完全去中心化状态估计方法，用于无人机群系统，通过LiDAR和惯性测量单元（IMU）实现无人机的自状态估计和相对状态估计。
AI.motivation: 在复杂环境中（如无GPS信号、低光照或单面墙场景），无人机群需要高精度的自定位和相对定位能力以完成协作任务，而现有方法依赖GPS或视觉传感器存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出基于3D LiDAR的无人机检测、识别与跟踪方法，结合IMU和LiDAR测量数据，通过无线通信交换自状态和互观测信息，实现去中心化的实时联合估计。
AI.result: 真实场景实验表明，该方法在无GPS、低光照等复杂环境下定位精度达厘米级，优于单无人机系统的其他先进LiDAR惯性里程计方法。
AI.conclusion: Swarm-LIO通过纯LiDAR-IMU测量实现了无人机群的高精度去中心化状态估计，适用于复杂场景下的实际应用。

ai_content_json.method: 提出基于3D LiDAR的无人机检测、识别与跟踪方法，结合IMU和LiDAR测量数据，通过无线通信交换自状态和互观测信息，实现去中心化的实时联合估计。
ai_content_json.result: 真实场景实验表明，该方法在无GPS、低光照等复杂环境下定位精度达厘米级，优于单无人机系统的其他先进LiDAR惯性里程计方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: Swarm-LIO通过纯LiDAR-IMU测量实现了无人机群的高精度去中心化状态估计，适用于复杂场景下的实际应用。

search_text: Swarm-LIO: Decentralized Swarm LiDAR-inertial Odometry Swarm-LIO：分散式集群 LiDAR 惯性里程计 Accurate self and relative state estimation are the critical preconditions for completing swarm tasks, e.g., collaborative autonomous exploration, target tracking, search and rescue. This paper proposes Swarm-LIO: a fully decentralized state estimation method for aerial swarm systems, in which each drone performs precise ego-state estimation, exchanges ego-state and mutual observation information by wireless communication, and estimates relative state with respect to (w.r.t.) the rest of UAVs, all in real-time and only based on LiDAR-inertial measurements. A novel 3D LiDAR-based drone detection, identification and tracking method is proposed to obtain observations of teammate drones. The mutual observation measurements are then tightly-coupled with IMU and LiDAR measurements to perform real-time and accurate estimation of ego-state and relative state jointly. Extensive real-world experiments show the broad adaptability to complicated scenarios, including GPS-denied scenes, degenerate scenes for camera (dark night) or LiDAR (facing a single wall). Compared with ground-truth provided by motion capture system, the result shows the centimeter-level localization accuracy which outperforms other state-of-the-art LiDAR-inertial odometry for single UAV system. 准确的自身和相对状态估计是完成群体任务的关键前提，例如协作自主探索、目标跟踪、搜索和救援。本文提出了 Swarm-LIO：一种用于空中集群系统的完全分散的状态估计方法，其中每架无人机执行精确的自我状态估计，通过无线通信交换自我状态和相互观察信息，并估计相对于其余无人机的相对状态，所有这些都是实时的并且仅基于 LiDAR 惯性测量。提出了一种基于 3D LiDAR 的新型无人机检测、识别和跟踪方法，以获得队友无人机的观测结果。然后，相互观察测量与 IMU 和 LiDAR 测量紧密耦合，共同执行自我状态和相对状态的实时准确估计。广泛的现实世界实验表明，其对复杂场景的广泛适应性，包括 GPS 拒绝场景、相机退化场景（黑夜）或 LiDAR（面向单墙）。与运动捕捉系统提供的地面实况相比，结果显示厘米级的定位精度优于其他最先进的单无人机系统激光雷达惯性里程计。 本文提出了一种名为Swarm-LIO的完全去中心化状态估计方法，用于无人机群系统，通过LiDAR和惯性测量单元（IMU）实现无人机的自状态估计和相对状态估计。 Fangcheng Zhu,Yunfan Ren,Fanze Kong,Huajie Wu,Siqi Liang,Nan Chen,Wei Xu,Fu Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Tal Hakim
title: NAAP-440 Dataset and Baseline for Neural Architecture Accuracy Prediction
title_zh: NAAP-440 神经架构精度预测数据集和基线
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has become a common approach to developing and discovering new neural architectures for different target platforms and purposes. However, scanning the search space is comprised of long training processes of many candidate architectures, which is costly in terms of computational resources and time. Regression algorithms are a common tool to predicting a candidate architecture's accuracy, which can dramatically accelerate the search procedure. We aim at proposing a new baseline that will support the development of regression algorithms that can predict an architecture's accuracy just from its scheme, or by only training it for a minimal number of epochs. Therefore, we introduce the NAAP-440 dataset of 440 neural architectures, which were trained on CIFAR10 using a fixed recipe. Our experiments indicate that by using off-the-shelf regression algorithms and running up to 10% of the training process, not only is it possible to predict an architecture's accuracy rather precisely, but that the values predicted for the architectures also maintain their accuracy order with a minimal number of monotonicity violations. This approach may serve as a powerful tool for accelerating NAS-based studies and thus dramatically increase their efficiency. The dataset and code used in the study have been made public.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) has become a common approach to developing and discovering new neural architectures for different target platforms and purposes. However, scanning the search space is comprised of long training processes of many candidate architectures, which is costly in terms of computational resources and time. Regression algorithms are a common tool to predicting a candidate architecture's accuracy, which can dramatically accelerate the search procedure. We aim at proposing a new baseline that will support the development of regression algorithms that can predict an architecture's accuracy just from its scheme, or by only training it for a minimal number of epochs. Therefore, we introduce the NAAP-440 dataset of 440 neural architectures, which were trained on CIFAR10 using a fixed recipe. Our experiments indicate that by using off-the-shelf regression algorithms and running up to 10% of the training process, not only is it possible to predict an architecture's accuracy rather precisely, but that the values predicted for the architectures also maintain their accuracy order with a minimal number of monotonicity violations. This approach may serve as a powerful tool for accelerating NAS-based studies and thus dramatically increase their efficiency. The dataset and code used in the study have been made public.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）已成为为不同目标平台和目的开发和发现新神经架构的常用方法。然而，扫描搜索空间由许多候选架构的长期训练过程组成，这在计算资源和时间方面是昂贵的。回归算法是预测候选架构准确性的常用工具，可以显着加速搜索过程。我们的目标是提出一个新的基线，该基线将支持回归算法的开发，该算法可以仅根据其方案来预测架构的准确性，或者仅对其进行最少数量的训练。因此，我们引入了 440 个神经架构的 NAAP-440 数据集，这些数据集使用固定配方在 CIFAR10 上进行了训练。我们的实验表明，通过使用现成的回归算法并运行高达 10% 的训练过程，不仅可以相当精确地预测架构的准确性，而且架构的预测值也可以在单调性违规的情况下保持其准确性顺序。这种方法可以作为加速基于 NAS 的研究的强大工具，从而显着提高其效率。研究中使用的数据集和代码已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NAAP-440数据集及基线方法，通过回归算法预测神经架构准确性以加速神经架构搜索（NAS）过程。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS方法因需训练大量候选架构而消耗高额计算资源和时间，亟需通过准确性预测模型减少训练成本。
AI.method: 构建包含440个CIFAR10训练架构的NAAP-440数据集，采用固定训练方案并利用回归算法在训练早期（最多10%阶段）预测架构准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用现成回归算法在10%训练阶段即可实现较高准确性预测，且预测值保持架构准确率排序仅有少量单调性违反。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为NAS研究提供高效预测工具，显著提升搜索效率，相关数据集和代码已公开共享。

authors_text: Jiafeng Ma,Guangda chen,Yingfeng Chen,Yujing Hu,Changjie Fan,Jianming Zhang
title: Distributed Multi-Robot Obstacle Avoidance via Logarithmic Map-based Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于对数图的深度强化学习分布式多机器人避障
abstract: Developing a safe, stable, and efficient obstacle avoidance policy in crowded and narrow scenarios for multiple robots is challenging. Most existing studies either use centralized control or need communication with other robots. In this paper, we propose a novel logarithmic map-based deep reinforcement learning method for obstacle avoidance in complex and communication-free multi-robot scenarios. In particular, our method converts laser information into a logarithmic map. As a step toward improving training speed and generalization performance, our policies will be trained in two specially designed multi-robot scenarios. Compared to other methods, the logarithmic map can represent obstacles more accurately and improve the success rate of obstacle avoidance. We finally evaluate our approach under a variety of simulation and real-world scenarios. The results show that our method provides a more stable and effective navigation solution for robots in complex multi-robot scenarios and pedestrian scenarios. Videos are available at https://youtu.be/r0EsUXe6MZE.
summary: Developing a safe, stable, and efficient obstacle avoidance policy in crowded and narrow scenarios for multiple robots is challenging. Most existing studies either use centralized control or need communication with other robots. In this paper, we propose a novel logarithmic map-based deep reinforcement learning method for obstacle avoidance in complex and communication-free multi-robot scenarios. In particular, our method converts laser information into a logarithmic map. As a step toward improving training speed and generalization performance, our policies will be trained in two specially designed multi-robot scenarios. Compared to other methods, the logarithmic map can represent obstacles more accurately and improve the success rate of obstacle avoidance. We finally evaluate our approach under a variety of simulation and real-world scenarios. The results show that our method provides a more stable and effective navigation solution for robots in complex multi-robot scenarios and pedestrian scenarios. Videos are available at https://youtu.be/r0EsUXe6MZE.
abstract_zh: 在拥挤和狭窄的场景中为多个机器人制定安全、稳定、高效的避障策略具有挑战性。大多数现有研究要么使用集中控制，要么需要与其他机器人进行通信。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于对数图的深度强化学习方法，用于在复杂且无通信的多机器人场景中避障。特别是，我们的方法将激光信息转换为对数图。作为提高训练速度和泛化性能的一步，我们的策略将在两个专门设计的多机器人场景中进行训练。与其他方法相比，对数图可以更准确地表示障碍物，提高避障的成功率。我们最终在各种模拟和现实场景下评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法为复杂的多机器人场景和行人场景中的机器人提供了更稳定有效的导航解决方案。视频可在 https://youtu.be/r0EsUXe6MZE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对数地图的深度强化学习方法，解决复杂环境下多机器人无需通信的避障问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖集中控制或机器人间通信，导致扩展性差且在拥挤场景中稳定性不足。
AI.method: 将激光数据转换为对数地图表示障碍物，并在两个定制场景中训练深度强化学习策略以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验表明，该方法在复杂多机器人及行人场景中实现更稳定高效的导航。
AI.conclusion: 对数地图增强障碍物表征，所提方法为无通信多机器人系统提供可靠避障解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoteng Ma,Zhipeng Liang,Jose Blanchet,Mingwen Liu,Li Xia,Jiheng Zhang,Qianchuan Zhao,Zhengyuan Zhou
title: Distributionally Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation
title_zh: 具有线性函数逼近的分布鲁棒离线强化学习
abstract: Among the reasons hindering reinforcement learning (RL) applications to real-world problems, two factors are critical: limited data and the mismatch between the testing environment (real environment in which the policy is deployed) and the training environment (e.g., a simulator). This paper attempts to address these issues simultaneously with distributionally robust offline RL, where we learn a distributionally robust policy using historical data obtained from the source environment by optimizing against a worst-case perturbation thereof. In particular, we move beyond tabular settings and consider linear function approximation. More specifically, we consider two settings, one where the dataset is well-explored and the other where the dataset has sufficient coverage of the optimal policy. We propose two algorithms~-- one for each of the two settings~-- that achieve error bounds $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2}/N^{1/2})$ and $\tilde{O}(d^{3/2}/N^{1/2})$ respectively, where $d$ is the dimension in the linear function approximation and $N$ is the number of trajectories in the dataset. To the best of our knowledge, they provide the first non-asymptotic results of the sample complexity in this setting. Diverse experiments are conducted to demonstrate our theoretical findings, showing the superiority of our algorithm against the non-robust one.
summary: Among the reasons hindering reinforcement learning (RL) applications to real-world problems, two factors are critical: limited data and the mismatch between the testing environment (real environment in which the policy is deployed) and the training environment (e.g., a simulator). This paper attempts to address these issues simultaneously with distributionally robust offline RL, where we learn a distributionally robust policy using historical data obtained from the source environment by optimizing against a worst-case perturbation thereof. In particular, we move beyond tabular settings and consider linear function approximation. More specifically, we consider two settings, one where the dataset is well-explored and the other where the dataset has sufficient coverage of the optimal policy. We propose two algorithms~-- one for each of the two settings~-- that achieve error bounds $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2}/N^{1/2})$ and $\tilde{O}(d^{3/2}/N^{1/2})$ respectively, where $d$ is the dimension in the linear function approximation and $N$ is the number of trajectories in the dataset. To the best of our knowledge, they provide the first non-asymptotic results of the sample complexity in this setting. Diverse experiments are conducted to demonstrate our theoretical findings, showing the superiority of our algorithm against the non-robust one.
abstract_zh: 在阻碍强化学习（RL）应用于现实问题的原因中，有两个因素至关重要：有限的数据以及测试环境（部署策略的真实环境）和训练环境（例如模拟器）之间的不匹配。本文试图通过分布式鲁棒离线强化学习同时解决这些问题，其中我们使用从源环境获得的历史数据，通过针对最坏情况的扰动进行优化来学习分布式鲁棒策略。特别是，我们超越表格设置并考虑线性函数近似。更具体地说，我们考虑两种设置，一种是对数据集进行了充分探索，另一种是数据集充分覆盖了最优策略。我们提出了两种算法~——两种设置各一种~——分别实现误差界限 $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2}/N^{1/2})$ 和 $\tilde{O}(d^{3/2}/N^{1/2})$，其中 $d$ 是线性函数近似中的维度，$N$ 是数据集中轨迹的数量。据我们所知，他们提供了在此设置下样本复杂性的第一个非渐近结果。进行了各种实验来证明我们的理论发现，表明我们的算法相对于非鲁棒算法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性函数逼近的分布鲁棒离线强化学习方法，旨在解决现实应用中数据有限与训练测试环境不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在现实场景中面临数据量不足及训练环境与实际部署环境不匹配的双重挑战，传统方法缺乏对环境扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在离线强化学习框架下，通过优化对抗最坏情况扰动的分布鲁棒策略，提出两种适用于不同数据覆盖场景的算法，并基于线性函数逼近理论分析其误差界。
AI.result: 理论推导出两种算法的误差上界分别为$\	ilde{O}(d^{1/2}/N^{1/2})$和$\	ilde{O}(d^{3/2}/N^{1/2})$，实验验证了算法在鲁棒性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 首次在非渐近意义上分析了该场景下的样本复杂度，证明了分布鲁棒方法在处理环境差异和数据限制时的有效性。

authors_text: Akshit Saradagi,Avijit Banerjee,Sumeet Satpute,George Nikolakopoulos
title: Safe Autonomous Docking Maneuvers for a Floating Platform based on Input Sharing Control Barrier Functions
title_zh: 基于输入共享控制屏障功能的浮动平台安全自主对接机动
comment: 8 Pages, 5 Figures, Accepted for presentation of 61st IEEE Conference on Decision and Control, Dec. 6-9, 2022, in Cancun, Mexico
comments: 8 Pages, 5 Figures, Accepted for presentation of 61st IEEE Conference on Decision and Control, Dec. 6-9, 2022, in Cancun, Mexico
abstract: In this article, we present a control strategy for the problem of safe autonomous docking for a planar floating platform (Slider) that emulates the movement of a satellite. Employing the proposed strategy, Slider approaches a docking port with the right orientation, maintaining a safe distance, while always keeping a visual lock on the docking port throughout the docking maneuver. Control barrier functions are designed to impose the safety, direction of approach and visual locking constraints. Three control inputs of the Slider are shared among three barrier functions in enforcing the constraints. It is proved that the control inputs are shared in a conflict-free manner in rendering the sets defining safety and visual locking constraints forward invariant and in establishing finite-time convergence to the visual locking mode. The conflict-free input-sharing ensures the feasibility of a quadratic program that generates minimally-invasive corrections for a nominal controller, that is designed to track the docking port, so that the barrier constraints are respected throughout the docking maneuver. The efficacy of the proposed control design approach is validated through various simulations.
summary: In this article, we present a control strategy for the problem of safe autonomous docking for a planar floating platform (Slider) that emulates the movement of a satellite. Employing the proposed strategy, Slider approaches a docking port with the right orientation, maintaining a safe distance, while always keeping a visual lock on the docking port throughout the docking maneuver. Control barrier functions are designed to impose the safety, direction of approach and visual locking constraints. Three control inputs of the Slider are shared among three barrier functions in enforcing the constraints. It is proved that the control inputs are shared in a conflict-free manner in rendering the sets defining safety and visual locking constraints forward invariant and in establishing finite-time convergence to the visual locking mode. The conflict-free input-sharing ensures the feasibility of a quadratic program that generates minimally-invasive corrections for a nominal controller, that is designed to track the docking port, so that the barrier constraints are respected throughout the docking maneuver. The efficacy of the proposed control design approach is validated through various simulations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对模拟卫星运动的平面浮动平台（Slider）的安全自主对接问题提出了一种控制策略。采用所提出的策略，Slider 以正确的方向接近对接端口，保持安全距离，同时在整个对接操作过程中始终保持对对接端口的视觉锁定。控制屏障功能旨在施加安全性、接近方向和视觉锁定约束。在强制执行约束时，滑块的三个控制输入在三个屏障函数之间共享。证明了在渲染定义安全性和视觉锁定约束的集合前向不变以及建立视觉锁定模式的有限时间收敛时，控制输入以无冲突的方式共享。无冲突输入共享确保了二次程序的可行性，该程序为标称控制器生成微创校正，该标称控制器旨在跟踪对接端口，以便在整个对接操作过程中遵守障碍约束。所提出的控制设计方法的有效性通过各种模拟得到验证。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于输入共享控制障碍函数的安全自主对接控制策略，确保浮动平台在对接过程中满足安全、方向和视觉锁定约束。
AI.motivation: 现有自主对接控制方法在处理多约束时存在冲突，难以保证安全性和效率，需设计冲突自由的控制策略以确保安全约束和任务目标的实现。
AI.method: 基于控制障碍函数设计安全约束，通过输入共享机制协调多约束，结合二次规划生成修正控制输入以确保约束满足。
AI.result: 仿真验证了控制策略在安全对接、方向控制及视觉锁定方面的有效性，证明了冲突自由输入共享的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了多约束下的安全对接问题，为自主对接控制提供了新的理论框架和实践方案。

authors_text: Grégoire Petit,Adrian Popescu,Eden Belouadah,David Picard,Bertrand Delezoide
title: PlaStIL: Plastic and Stable Memory-Free Class-Incremental Learning
title_zh: PlaStIL：可塑且稳定的无记忆类增量学习
abstract: Plasticity and stability are needed in class-incremental learning in order to learn from new data while preserving past knowledge. Due to catastrophic forgetting, finding a compromise between these two properties is particularly challenging when no memory buffer is available. Mainstream methods need to store two deep models since they integrate new classes using fine-tuning with knowledge distillation from the previous incremental state. We propose a method which has similar number of parameters but distributes them differently in order to find a better balance between plasticity and stability. Following an approach already deployed by transfer-based incremental methods, we freeze the feature extractor after the initial state. Classes in the oldest incremental states are trained with this frozen extractor to ensure stability. Recent classes are predicted using partially fine-tuned models in order to introduce plasticity. Our proposed plasticity layer can be incorporated to any transfer-based method designed for exemplar-free incremental learning, and we apply it to two such methods. Evaluation is done with three large-scale datasets. Results show that performance gains are obtained in all tested configurations compared to existing methods.
summary: Plasticity and stability are needed in class-incremental learning in order to learn from new data while preserving past knowledge. Due to catastrophic forgetting, finding a compromise between these two properties is particularly challenging when no memory buffer is available. Mainstream methods need to store two deep models since they integrate new classes using fine-tuning with knowledge distillation from the previous incremental state. We propose a method which has similar number of parameters but distributes them differently in order to find a better balance between plasticity and stability. Following an approach already deployed by transfer-based incremental methods, we freeze the feature extractor after the initial state. Classes in the oldest incremental states are trained with this frozen extractor to ensure stability. Recent classes are predicted using partially fine-tuned models in order to introduce plasticity. Our proposed plasticity layer can be incorporated to any transfer-based method designed for exemplar-free incremental learning, and we apply it to two such methods. Evaluation is done with three large-scale datasets. Results show that performance gains are obtained in all tested configurations compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 课堂增量学习需要可塑性和稳定性，以便在保留过去知识的同时从新数据中学习。由于灾难性遗忘，当没有可用的内存缓冲区时，在这两个属性之间找到折衷方案尤其具有挑战性。主流方法需要存储两个深度模型，因为它们使用微调和从先前增量状态进行知识蒸馏来集成新类。我们提出了一种参数数量相似但分布不同的方法，以便在可塑性和稳定性之间找到更好的平衡。按照基于传输的增量方法已经部署的方法，我们在初始状态后冻结特征提取器。处于最旧增量状态的类使用此冻结提取器进行训练，以确保稳定性。最近的类别是使用部分微调的模型来预测的，以引入可塑性。我们提出的可塑性层可以合并到任何为无样本增量学习而设计的基于迁移的方法中，并且我们将其应用于两种这样的方法。使用三个大型数据集进行评估。结果表明，与现有方法相比，所有测试配置都获得了性能提升。

AI.motivation: 在无记忆缓冲区的类增量学习中，传统方法需存储两个模型以应对灾难性遗忘，但资源消耗大且难以平衡新旧知识学习。
AI.method: 冻结初始特征提取器以确保稳定性，通过部分微调模型预测新类引入可塑性，并设计可塑性层适配现有无示例增量学习方法。
AI.result: 在三个大规模数据集上实验表明，该方法在所有测试配置中均优于现有方法，性能提升显著。
AI.conclusion: PlaStIL通过参数分布优化有效平衡了可塑性与稳定性，为无记忆缓冲区的类增量学习提供了新思路。

search_text: PlaStIL: Plastic and Stable Memory-Free Class-Incremental Learning PlaStIL：可塑且稳定的无记忆类增量学习 Plasticity and stability are needed in class-incremental learning in order to learn from new data while preserving past knowledge. Due to catastrophic forgetting, finding a compromise between these two properties is particularly challenging when no memory buffer is available. Mainstream methods need to store two deep models since they integrate new classes using fine-tuning with knowledge distillation from the previous incremental state. We propose a method which has similar number of parameters but distributes them differently in order to find a better balance between plasticity and stability. Following an approach already deployed by transfer-based incremental methods, we freeze the feature extractor after the initial state. Classes in the oldest incremental states are trained with this frozen extractor to ensure stability. Recent classes are predicted using partially fine-tuned models in order to introduce plasticity. Our proposed plasticity layer can be incorporated to any transfer-based method designed for exemplar-free incremental learning, and we apply it to two such methods. Evaluation is done with three large-scale datasets. Results show that performance gains are obtained in all tested configurations compared to existing methods. 课堂增量学习需要可塑性和稳定性，以便在保留过去知识的同时从新数据中学习。由于灾难性遗忘，当没有可用的内存缓冲区时，在这两个属性之间找到折衷方案尤其具有挑战性。主流方法需要存储两个深度模型，因为它们使用微调和从先前增量状态进行知识蒸馏来集成新类。我们提出了一种参数数量相似但分布不同的方法，以便在可塑性和稳定性之间找到更好的平衡。按照基于传输的增量方法已经部署的方法，我们在初始状态后冻结特征提取器。处于最旧增量状态的类使用此冻结提取器进行训练，以确保稳定性。最近的类别是使用部分微调的模型来预测的，以引入可塑性。我们提出的可塑性层可以合并到任何为无样本增量学习而设计的基于迁移的方法中，并且我们将其应用于两种这样的方法。使用三个大型数据集进行评估。结果表明，与现有方法相比，所有测试配置都获得了性能提升。 本文提出了一种无需记忆缓冲区的类增量学习方法PlaStIL，旨在平衡模型的可塑性与稳定性。 Grégoire Petit,Adrian Popescu,Eden Belouadah,David Picard,Bertrand Delezoide cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Marko Ruman,Tatiana V. Guy
title: Knowledge Transfer in Deep Reinforcement Learning via an RL-Specific GAN-Based Correspondence Function
title_zh: 通过特定于 RL 的基于 GAN 的对应函数进行深度强化学习中的知识转移
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has demonstrated superhuman performance in complex decision-making tasks, but it struggles with generalization and knowledge reuse - key aspects of true intelligence. This article introduces a novel approach that modifies Cycle Generative Adversarial Networks specifically for reinforcement learning, enabling effective one-to-one knowledge transfer between two tasks. Our method enhances the loss function with two new components: model loss, which captures dynamic relationships between source and target tasks, and Q-loss, which identifies states significantly influencing the target decision policy. Tested on the 2-D Atari game Pong, our method achieved 100% knowledge transfer in identical tasks and either 100% knowledge transfer or a 30% reduction in training time for a rotated task, depending on the network architecture. In contrast, using standard Generative Adversarial Networks or Cycle Generative Adversarial Networks led to worse performance than training from scratch in the majority of cases. The results demonstrate that the proposed method ensured enhanced knowledge generalization in deep reinforcement learning.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has demonstrated superhuman performance in complex decision-making tasks, but it struggles with generalization and knowledge reuse - key aspects of true intelligence. This article introduces a novel approach that modifies Cycle Generative Adversarial Networks specifically for reinforcement learning, enabling effective one-to-one knowledge transfer between two tasks. Our method enhances the loss function with two new components: model loss, which captures dynamic relationships between source and target tasks, and Q-loss, which identifies states significantly influencing the target decision policy. Tested on the 2-D Atari game Pong, our method achieved 100% knowledge transfer in identical tasks and either 100% knowledge transfer or a 30% reduction in training time for a rotated task, depending on the network architecture. In contrast, using standard Generative Adversarial Networks or Cycle Generative Adversarial Networks led to worse performance than training from scratch in the majority of cases. The results demonstrate that the proposed method ensured enhanced knowledge generalization in deep reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习在复杂的决策任务中表现出了超人的表现，但它在泛化和知识重用（真正智能的关键方面）方面表现不佳。本文介绍了一种专门针对强化学习修改循环生成对抗网络的新颖方法，从而实现两个任务之间有效的一对一知识转移。我们的方法通过两个新组件增强了损失函数：模型损失（捕获源任务和目标任务之间的动态关系）和 Q 损失（识别显着影响目标决策策略的状态）。在 2-D Atari 游戏 Pong 上进行测试，我们的方法在相同任务中实现了 100% 知识迁移，并且根据网络架构实现了轮换任务 100% 知识迁移或训练时间减少 30%。相比之下，在大多数情况下，使用标准生成对抗网络或循环生成对抗网络会导致比从头开始训练更糟糕的性能。结果表明，所提出的方法确保了深度强化学习中知识泛化的增强。

AI.tldr: 通过改进的GAN方法实现深度强化学习中的知识迁移
AI.motivation: 解决深度强化学习中知识泛化与复用困难，提升智能性
AI.method: 改进Cycle GAN，新增模型损失和Q损失，优化任务间动态关系与决策策略
AI.result: 在Pong游戏测试中，实现100%知识迁移或减少30%训练时间，优于传统GAN方法
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效增强深度强化学习的知识泛化能力

authors_text: Hyungeun Lee,Kijung Yoon
title: Towards Better Generalization with Flexible Representation of Multi-Module Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过多模块图神经网络的灵活表示实现更好的泛化
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have become compelling models designed to perform learning and inference on graph-structured data. However, little work has been done to understand the fundamental limitations of GNNs for scaling to larger graphs and generalizing to out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs. In this paper, we use a random graph generator to systematically investigate how the graph size and structural properties affect the predictive performance of GNNs. We present specific evidence that the average node degree is a key feature in determining whether GNNs can generalize to unseen graphs, and that the use of multiple node update functions can improve the generalization performance of GNNs when dealing with graphs of multimodal degree distributions. Accordingly, we propose a multi-module GNN framework that allows the network to adapt flexibly to new graphs by generalizing a single canonical nonlinear transformation over aggregated inputs. Our results show that the multi-module GNNs improve the OOD generalization on a variety of inference tasks in the direction of diverse structural features.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have become compelling models designed to perform learning and inference on graph-structured data. However, little work has been done to understand the fundamental limitations of GNNs for scaling to larger graphs and generalizing to out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs. In this paper, we use a random graph generator to systematically investigate how the graph size and structural properties affect the predictive performance of GNNs. We present specific evidence that the average node degree is a key feature in determining whether GNNs can generalize to unseen graphs, and that the use of multiple node update functions can improve the generalization performance of GNNs when dealing with graphs of multimodal degree distributions. Accordingly, we propose a multi-module GNN framework that allows the network to adapt flexibly to new graphs by generalizing a single canonical nonlinear transformation over aggregated inputs. Our results show that the multi-module GNNs improve the OOD generalization on a variety of inference tasks in the direction of diverse structural features.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成为引人注目的模型，旨在对图结构数据进行学习和推理。然而，在理解 GNN 扩展到更大的图和推广到分布外（OOD）输入方面的基本局限性方面，我们还做的工作很少。在本文中，我们使用随机图生成器系统地研究图大小和结构特性如何影响 GNN 的预测性能。我们提出了具体的证据，表明平均节点度是决定 GNN 是否可以泛化到未见图的关键特征，并且在处理多模态度分布图时，使用多个节点更新函数可以提高 GNN 的泛化性能。因此，我们提出了一个多模块 GNN 框架，该框架允许网络通过在聚合输入上推广单个规范非线性变换来灵活地适应新图。我们的结果表明，多模块 GNN 在不同结构特征的方向上提高了各种推理任务的 OOD 泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模块图神经网络框架，通过灵活表示提升模型在不同结构特征下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络（GNN）在处理大规模图数据和分布外（OOD）输入时存在泛化能力不足的问题，需探索结构特性对性能的影响并改进模型设计。
AI.method: 基于随机图生成器系统分析图规模与结构特性对GNN的影响，提出多模块框架通过多种节点更新函数适应多模态度分布，实现单非线性变换的泛化。
AI.result: 多模块GNN在多种推理任务中显著提升分布外泛化性能，尤其在处理多样化结构特征时表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 多模块设计通过灵活适应不同图结构特性，有效解决了GNN的泛化瓶颈问题。

Our results show that the multi-module GNNs improve the OOD generalization on a variety of inference tasks in the direction of diverse structural features. 图神经网络（GNN）已成为引人注目的模型，旨在对图结构数据进行学习和推理。然而，在理解 GNN 扩展到更大的图和推广到分布外（OOD）输入方面的基本局限性方面，我们还做的工作很少。在本文中，我们使用随机图生成器系统地研究图大小和结构特性如何影响 GNN 的预测性能。我们提出了具体的证据，表明平均节点度是决定 GNN 是否可以泛化到未见图的关键特征，并且在处理多模态度分布图时，使用多个节点更新函数可以提高 GNN 的泛化性能。因此，我们提出了一个多模块 GNN 框架，该框架允许网络通过在聚合输入上推广单个规范非线性变换来灵活地适应新图。我们的结果表明，多模块 GNN 在不同结构特征的方向上提高了各种推理任务的 OOD 泛化能力。 本文提出一种多模块图神经网络框架，通过灵活表示提升模型在不同结构特征下的泛化能力。 Hyungeun Lee,Kijung Yoon cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Vincenzo Polizzi,Robert Hewitt,Javier Hidalgo-Carrió,Jeff Delaune,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Data-Efficient Collaborative Decentralized Thermal-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: 数据高效的协作分散式热惯性里程计
abstract: We propose a system solution to achieve data-efficient, decentralized state estimation for a team of flying robots using thermal images and inertial measurements. Each robot can fly independently, and exchange data when possible to refine its state estimate. Our system front-end applies an online photometric calibration to refine the thermal images so as to enhance feature tracking and place recognition. Our system back-end uses a covariance-intersection fusion strategy to neglect the cross-correlation between agents so as to lower memory usage and computational cost. The communication pipeline uses Vector of Locally Aggregated Descriptors (VLAD) to construct a request-response policy that requires low bandwidth usage. We test our collaborative method on both synthetic and real-world data. Our results show that the proposed method improves by up to 46 % trajectory estimation with respect to an individual-agent approach, while reducing up to 89 % the communication exchange. Datasets and code are released to the public, extending the already-public JPL xVIO library.
summary: We propose a system solution to achieve data-efficient, decentralized state estimation for a team of flying robots using thermal images and inertial measurements. Each robot can fly independently, and exchange data when possible to refine its state estimate. Our system front-end applies an online photometric calibration to refine the thermal images so as to enhance feature tracking and place recognition. Our system back-end uses a covariance-intersection fusion strategy to neglect the cross-correlation between agents so as to lower memory usage and computational cost. The communication pipeline uses Vector of Locally Aggregated Descriptors (VLAD) to construct a request-response policy that requires low bandwidth usage. We test our collaborative method on both synthetic and real-world data. Our results show that the proposed method improves by up to 46 % trajectory estimation with respect to an individual-agent approach, while reducing up to 89 % the communication exchange. Datasets and code are released to the public, extending the already-public JPL xVIO library.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种系统解决方案，使用热图像和惯性测量来为飞行机器人团队实现数据高效、分散的状态估计。每个机器人都可以独立飞行，并在可能的情况下交换数据以完善其状态估计。我们的系统前端采用在线光度校准来细化热图像，从而增强特征跟踪和位置识别。我们的系统后端使用协方差交叉融合策略来忽略代理之间的互相关性，从而降低内存使用量和计算成本。通信管道使用本地聚合描述符向量 (VLAD) 来构建需要低带宽使用的请求-响应策略。我们在合成数据和真实数据上测试我们的协作方法。我们的结果表明，与个体代理方法相比，所提出的方法将轨迹估计提高了高达 46%，同时减少了高达 89% 的通信交换。数据集和代码向公众发布，扩展了已经公开的 JPL xVIO 库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据高效的去中心化热惯性里程计系统，使无人机团队能够通过热成像和惯性测量独立飞行并协作优化状态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统多机器人系统在状态估计中面临数据冗余和通信开销大的问题，需在有限资源下实现高精度定位与协作。
AI.method: 前端采用在线光度校准优化热图像特征跟踪，后端通过协方差交集融合策略降低计算成本，通信层使用VLAD描述符实现低带宽协作策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法相比单机方案轨迹估计精度提升46%，通信量减少89%，并在合成与真实数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去中心化框架在保持估计精度的同时显著降低通信与计算开销，为多无人机协作提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Kirill Prokofiev,Vladislav Sovrasov
title: Combining Metric Learning and Attention Heads For Accurate and Efficient Multilabel Image Classification
title_zh: 结合度量学习和注意力头实现准确高效的多标签图像分类
abstract: Multi-label image classification allows predicting a set of labels from a given image. Unlike multiclass classification, where only one label per image is assigned, such a setup is applicable for a broader range of applications. In this work we revisit two popular approaches to multilabel classification: transformer-based heads and labels relations information graph processing branches. Although transformer-based heads are considered to achieve better results than graph-based branches, we argue that with the proper training strategy, graph-based methods can demonstrate just a small accuracy drop, while spending less computational resources on inference. In our training strategy, instead of Asymmetric Loss (ASL), which is the de-facto standard for multilabel classification, we introduce its metric learning modification. In each binary classification sub-problem it operates with $L_2$ normalized feature vectors coming from a backbone and enforces angles between the normalized representations of positive and negative samples to be as large as possible. This results in providing a better discrimination ability, than binary cross entropy loss does on unnormalized features. With the proposed loss and training strategy, we obtain SOTA results among single modality methods on widespread multilabel classification benchmarks such as MS-COCO, PASCAL-VOC, NUS-Wide and Visual Genome 500. Source code of our method is available as a part of the OpenVINO Training Extensions https://github.com/openvinotoolkit/deep-object-reid/tree/multilabel
summary: Multi-label image classification allows predicting a set of labels from a given image. Unlike multiclass classification, where only one label per image is assigned, such a setup is applicable for a broader range of applications. In this work we revisit two popular approaches to multilabel classification: transformer-based heads and labels relations information graph processing branches. Although transformer-based heads are considered to achieve better results than graph-based branches, we argue that with the proper training strategy, graph-based methods can demonstrate just a small accuracy drop, while spending less computational resources on inference. In our training strategy, instead of Asymmetric Loss (ASL), which is the de-facto standard for multilabel classification, we introduce its metric learning modification. In each binary classification sub-problem it operates with $L_2$ normalized feature vectors coming from a backbone and enforces angles between the normalized representations of positive and negative samples to be as large as possible. This results in providing a better discrimination ability, than binary cross entropy loss does on unnormalized features. With the proposed loss and training strategy, we obtain SOTA results among single modality methods on widespread multilabel classification benchmarks such as MS-COCO, PASCAL-VOC, NUS-Wide and Visual Genome 500. Source code of our method is available as a part of the OpenVINO Training Extensions https://github.com/openvinotoolkit/deep-object-reid/tree/multilabel
abstract_zh: 多标签图像分类允许从给定图像预测一组标签。与多类分类（每张图像仅分配一个标签）不同，这种设置适用于更广泛的应用。在这项工作中，我们重新审视两种流行的多标签分类方法：基于变压器的头和标签关系信息图处理分支。尽管基于变压器的头被认为比基于图的分支获得更好的结果，但我们认为，通过适当的训练策略，基于图的方法可以表现出较小的准确性下降，同时在推理上花费更少的计算资源。在我们的训练策略中，我们引入了其度量学习修改，而不是多标签分类的事实标准非对称损失（ASL）。在每个二元分类子问题中，它使用来自主干的 $L_2$ 归一化特征向量进行操作，并强制正样本和负样本的归一化表示之间的角度尽可能大。与非标准化特征上的二元交叉熵损失相比，这可以提供更好的辨别能力。通过提出的损失和训练策略，我们在广泛的多标签分类基准（例如 MS-COCO、PASCAL-VOC、NUS-Wide 和 Visual Genome 500）上获得了单模态方法的 SOTA 结果。我们方法的源代码作为 OpenVINO 训练扩展的一部分提供 https://github.com/openvinotoolkit/deep-object-reid/tree/multilabel

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合度量学习与注意力机制，实现高效准确的多标签图像分类方法。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer头部方法虽准确但计算成本高，图结构方法效率高但精度稍逊，需平衡精度与效率。
AI.method: 改进损失函数：用L2归一化特征向量，通过最大化正负样本角度差异提升判别能力，替代传统Asymmetric Loss。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO、PASCAL-VOC等基准数据集上达到单模态方法SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持较低计算成本的同时提升多标签分类精度，为该领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Abhinav Java,Shripad Deshmukh,Milan Aggarwal,Surgan Jandial,Mausoom Sarkar,Balaji Krishnamurthy
title: One-Shot Doc Snippet Detection: Powering Search in Document Beyond Text
title_zh: 一次性文档片段检测：支持文本之外的文档搜索
abstract: Active consumption of digital documents has yielded scope for research in various applications, including search. Traditionally, searching within a document has been cast as a text matching problem ignoring the rich layout and visual cues commonly present in structured documents, forms, etc. To that end, we ask a mostly unexplored question: "Can we search for other similar snippets present in a target document page given a single query instance of a document snippet?". We propose MONOMER to solve this as a one-shot snippet detection task. MONOMER fuses context from visual, textual, and spatial modalities of snippets and documents to find query snippet in target documents. We conduct extensive ablations and experiments showing MONOMER outperforms several baselines from one-shot object detection (BHRL), template matching, and document understanding (LayoutLMv3). Due to the scarcity of relevant data for the task at hand, we train MONOMER on programmatically generated data having many visually similar query snippets and target document pairs from two datasets - Flamingo Forms and PubLayNet. We also do a human study to validate the generated data.
summary: Active consumption of digital documents has yielded scope for research in various applications, including search. Traditionally, searching within a document has been cast as a text matching problem ignoring the rich layout and visual cues commonly present in structured documents, forms, etc. To that end, we ask a mostly unexplored question: "Can we search for other similar snippets present in a target document page given a single query instance of a document snippet?". We propose MONOMER to solve this as a one-shot snippet detection task. MONOMER fuses context from visual, textual, and spatial modalities of snippets and documents to find query snippet in target documents. We conduct extensive ablations and experiments showing MONOMER outperforms several baselines from one-shot object detection (BHRL), template matching, and document understanding (LayoutLMv3). Due to the scarcity of relevant data for the task at hand, we train MONOMER on programmatically generated data having many visually similar query snippets and target document pairs from two datasets - Flamingo Forms and PubLayNet. We also do a human study to validate the generated data.
abstract_zh: 数字文档的积极消费为各种应用（包括搜索）的研究提供了空间。传统上，文档内搜索被视为文本匹配问题，忽略了结构化文档、表单等中常见的丰富布局和视觉提示。为此，我们提出了一个几乎未被探索的问题：“给定文档片段的单个查询实例，我们可以搜索目标文档页面中存在的其他类似片段吗？”。我们建议 MONOMER 将其作为一次性片段检测任务来解决。 MONOMER 融合片段和文档的视觉、文本和空间模式的上下文，以在目标文档中查找查询片段。我们进行了大量的消融和实验，结果表明 MONOMER 在一次性对象检测 (BHRL)、模板匹配和文档理解 (LayoutLMv3) 方面优于多个基线。由于手头任务的相关数据稀缺，我们在以编程方式生成的数据上训练 MONOMER，这些数据具有许多视觉上相似的查询片段和来自两个数据集（Flamingo Forms 和 PubLayNet）的目标文档对。我们还进行了人体研究来验证生成的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MONOMER的单次示例文档片段检测方法，通过融合视觉、文本和空间信息，在不依赖传统文本匹配的情况下实现文档中相似片段的搜索。
AI.motivation: 传统文档搜索仅依赖文本匹配，忽略了结构化文档中丰富的布局和视觉线索，导致在复杂场景下检索效果有限。
AI.method: 设计MONOMER模型，整合片段的视觉、文本及空间多模态特征，利用程序生成的Flamingo Forms和PubLayNet数据集进行训练，并通过人工研究验证数据有效性。
AI.result: MONOMER在单次示例目标检测（BHRL）、模板匹配和文档理解（LayoutLMv3）等基线方法上表现更优，验证了多模态融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态特征融合和程序生成数据，MONOMER实现了超越传统文本匹配的文档片段检索能力，为非文本信息驱动的文档搜索提供了新方向。
