search_text: One-Shot Doc Snippet Detection: Powering Search in Document Beyond Text 一次性文档片段检测：支持文本之外的文档搜索 Active consumption of digital documents has yielded scope for research in various applications, including search. Traditionally, searching within a document has been cast as a text matching problem ignoring the rich layout and visual cues commonly present in structured documents, forms, etc. To that end, we ask a mostly unexplored question: "Can we search for other similar snippets present in a target document page given a single query instance of a document snippet?". We propose MONOMER to solve this as a one-shot snippet detection task. MONOMER fuses context from visual, textual, and spatial modalities of snippets and documents to find query snippet in target documents. We conduct extensive ablations and experiments showing MONOMER outperforms several baselines from one-shot object detection (BHRL), template matching, and document understanding (LayoutLMv3). Due to the scarcity of relevant data for the task at hand, we train MONOMER on programmatically generated data having many visually similar query snippets and target document pairs from two datasets - Flamingo Forms and PubLayNet. We also do a human study to validate the generated data. 数字文档的积极消费为各种应用（包括搜索）的研究提供了空间。传统上，文档内搜索被视为文本匹配问题，忽略了结构化文档、表单等中常见的丰富布局和视觉提示。为此，我们提出了一个几乎未被探索的问题：“给定文档片段的单个查询实例，我们可以搜索目标文档页面中存在的其他类似片段吗？”。我们建议 MONOMER 将其作为一次性片段检测任务来解决。 MONOMER 融合片段和文档的视觉、文本和空间模式的上下文，以在目标文档中查找查询片段。我们进行了大量的消融和实验，结果表明 MONOMER 在一次性对象检测 (BHRL)、模板匹配和文档理解 (LayoutLMv3) 方面优于多个基线。由于手头任务的相关数据稀缺，我们在以编程方式生成的数据上训练 MONOMER，这些数据具有许多视觉上相似的查询片段和来自两个数据集（Flamingo Forms 和 PubLayNet）的目标文档对。我们还进行了人体研究来验证生成的数据。 本文提出了一种名为MONOMER的单次示例文档片段检测方法，通过融合视觉、文本和空间信息，在不依赖传统文本匹配的情况下实现文档中相似片段的搜索。 Abhinav Java,Shripad Deshmukh,Milan Aggarwal,Surgan Jandial,Mausoom Sarkar,Balaji Krishnamurthy cs.CV

authors_text: Jiawen Wu,Xinyu Zhang,Yutao Zhu,Zheng Liu,Zikai Guo,Zhaoye Fei,Ruofei Lai,Yongkang Wu,Zhao Cao,Zhicheng Dou
title: Pre-training for Information Retrieval: Are Hyperlinks Fully Explored?
title_zh: 信息检索的预训练：超链接是否得到充分探索？
abstract: Recent years have witnessed great progress on applying pre-trained language models, e.g., BERT, to information retrieval (IR) tasks. Hyperlinks, which are commonly used in Web pages, have been leveraged for designing pre-training objectives. For example, anchor texts of the hyperlinks have been used for simulating queries, thus constructing tremendous query-document pairs for pre-training. However, as a bridge across two web pages, the potential of hyperlinks has not been fully explored. In this work, we focus on modeling the relationship between two documents that are connected by hyperlinks and designing a new pre-training objective for ad-hoc retrieval. Specifically, we categorize the relationships between documents into four groups: no link, unidirectional link, symmetric link, and the most relevant symmetric link. By comparing two documents sampled from adjacent groups, the model can gradually improve its capability of capturing matching signals. We propose a progressive hyperlink predication ({PHP}) framework to explore the utilization of hyperlinks in pre-training. Experimental results on two large-scale ad-hoc retrieval datasets and six question-answering datasets demonstrate its superiority over existing pre-training methods.
summary: Recent years have witnessed great progress on applying pre-trained language models, e.g., BERT, to information retrieval (IR) tasks. Hyperlinks, which are commonly used in Web pages, have been leveraged for designing pre-training objectives. For example, anchor texts of the hyperlinks have been used for simulating queries, thus constructing tremendous query-document pairs for pre-training. However, as a bridge across two web pages, the potential of hyperlinks has not been fully explored. In this work, we focus on modeling the relationship between two documents that are connected by hyperlinks and designing a new pre-training objective for ad-hoc retrieval. Specifically, we categorize the relationships between documents into four groups: no link, unidirectional link, symmetric link, and the most relevant symmetric link. By comparing two documents sampled from adjacent groups, the model can gradually improve its capability of capturing matching signals. We propose a progressive hyperlink predication ({PHP}) framework to explore the utilization of hyperlinks in pre-training. Experimental results on two large-scale ad-hoc retrieval datasets and six question-answering datasets demonstrate its superiority over existing pre-training methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，将预训练语言模型（例如 BERT）应用于信息检索（IR）任务方面取得了巨大进展。网页中常用的超链接已被用来设计预训练目标。例如，超链接的锚文本已用于模拟查询，从而构建巨大的查询-文档对进行预训练。然而，作为跨越两个网页的桥梁，超链接的潜力尚未得到充分发挥。在这项工作中，我们专注于对通过超链接连接的两个文档之间的关系进行建模，并为临时检索设计一个新的预训练目标。具体来说，我们将文档之间的关系分为四组：无链接、单向链接、对称链接和最相关的对称链接。通过比较从相邻组采样的两个文档，该模型可以逐渐提高捕获匹配信号的能力。我们提出了一个渐进式超链接预测（{PHP}）框架来探索超链接在预训练中的利用。在两个大规模临时检索数据集和六个问答数据集上的实验结果证明了其相对于现有预训练方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索超链接在预训练中的潜力，以提升信息检索任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分利用超链接连接文档间的关系，需进一步挖掘其潜力以提升信息检索效果。
AI.method: 提出渐进式超链接预测（PHP）框架，将文档关系分为四类并逐步比较以优化匹配信号。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PHP在两个大规模检索数据集和六个问答数据集上均优于现有预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出，PHP框架有效利用超链接关系，提升信息检索性能，为预训练方法提供新思路。

authors_text: Shaodong Deng,Long Sheng,Jiayi Nie,Fuyi Deng
title: A Clustering Method Based on Information Entropy Payload
title_zh: 一种基于信息熵有效载荷的聚类方法
abstract: Existing clustering algorithms such as K-means often need to preset parameters such as the number of categories K, and such parameters may lead to the failure to output objective and consistent clustering results. This paper introduces a clustering method based on the information theory, by which clusters in the clustering result have maximum average information entropy (called entropy payload in this paper). This method can bring the following benefits: firstly, this method does not need to preset any super parameter such as category number or other similar thresholds, secondly, the clustering results have the maximum information expression efficiency. it can be used in image segmentation, object classification, etc., and could be the basis of unsupervised learning.
summary: Existing clustering algorithms such as K-means often need to preset parameters such as the number of categories K, and such parameters may lead to the failure to output objective and consistent clustering results. This paper introduces a clustering method based on the information theory, by which clusters in the clustering result have maximum average information entropy (called entropy payload in this paper). This method can bring the following benefits: firstly, this method does not need to preset any super parameter such as category number or other similar thresholds, secondly, the clustering results have the maximum information expression efficiency. it can be used in image segmentation, object classification, etc., and could be the basis of unsupervised learning.
abstract_zh: 现有的K-means等聚类算法往往需要预设类别数K等参数，这些参数可能导致无法输出客观一致的聚类结果。本文介绍了一种基于信息论的聚类方法，该方法使得聚类结果中的簇具有最大的平均信息熵（本文称为熵负载）。该方法可以带来以下好处：首先，该方法不需要预设任何超参数，例如类别数或其他类似阈值；其次，聚类结果具有最大的信息表达效率。它可以用于图像分割、对象分类等，并且可以成为无监督学习的基础。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于信息熵负载的聚类方法，无需预设类别数量等参数，以提高聚类结果的客观性和信息表达效率。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类算法如K-means需要预设类别数等参数，可能导致结果主观且不一致，因此需要一种无需预设参数、能自动确定最优聚类结构的方法。
AI.method: 基于信息论，通过最大化聚类结果中各簇的平均信息熵（熵负载），无需预设类别数等超参数，自动确定最优聚类结构。
AI.result: 聚类结果具有最大信息表达效率，适用于图像分割、物体分类等任务，可作为无监督学习的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需预设超参数，能自动实现最优聚类，提升信息表达效率，为无监督学习提供新思路。

method: 基于信息论，通过最大化聚类结果中各簇的平均信息熵（熵负载），无需预设类别数等超参数，自动确定最优聚类结构。
result: 聚类结果具有最大信息表达效率，适用于图像分割、物体分类等任务，可作为无监督学习的基础。
conclusion: 该方法无需预设超参数，能自动实现最优聚类，提升信息表达效率，为无监督学习提供新思路。
search_text: A Clustering Method Based on Information Entropy Payload 一种基于信息熵有效载荷的聚类方法 Existing clustering algorithms such as K-means often need to preset parameters such as the number of categories K, and such parameters may lead to the failure to output objective and consistent clustering results. This paper introduces a clustering method based on the information theory, by which clusters in the clustering result have maximum average information entropy (called entropy payload in this paper). This method can bring the following benefits: firstly, this method does not need to preset any super parameter such as category number or other similar thresholds, secondly, the clustering results have the maximum information expression efficiency. it can be used in image segmentation, object classification, etc., and could be the basis of unsupervised learning. 现有的K-means等聚类算法往往需要预设类别数K等参数，这些参数可能导致无法输出客观一致的聚类结果。本文介绍了一种基于信息论的聚类方法，该方法使得聚类结果中的簇具有最大的平均信息熵（本文称为熵负载）。该方法可以带来以下好处：首先，该方法不需要预设任何超参数，例如类别数或其他类似阈值；其次，聚类结果具有最大的信息表达效率。它可以用于图像分割、对象分类等，并且可以成为无监督学习的基础。 提出一种基于信息熵负载的聚类方法，无需预设类别数量等参数，以提高聚类结果的客观性和信息表达效率。 Shaodong Deng,Long Sheng,Jiayi Nie,Fuyi Deng cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: H. A. Z. Sameen Shahgir,Khondker Salman Sayeed,Tanjeem Azwad Zaman
title: Applying wav2vec2 for Speech Recognition on Bengali Common Voices Dataset
title_zh: 应用 wav2vec2 对孟加拉语常见语音数据集进行语音识别
abstract: Speech is inherently continuous, where discrete words, phonemes and other units are not clearly segmented, and so speech recognition has been an active research problem for decades. In this work we have fine-tuned wav2vec 2.0 to recognize and transcribe Bengali speech -- training it on the Bengali Common Voice Speech Dataset. After training for 71 epochs, on a training set consisting of 36919 mp3 files, we achieved a training loss of 0.3172 and WER of 0.2524 on a validation set of size 7,747. Using a 5-gram language model, the Levenshtein Distance was 2.6446 on a test set of size 7,747. Then the training set and validation set were combined, shuffled and split into 85-15 ratio. Training for 7 more epochs on this combined dataset yielded an improved Levenshtein Distance of 2.60753 on the test set. Our model was the best performing one, achieving a Levenshtein Distance of 6.234 on a hidden dataset, which was 1.1049 units lower than other competing submissions.
summary: Speech is inherently continuous, where discrete words, phonemes and other units are not clearly segmented, and so speech recognition has been an active research problem for decades. In this work we have fine-tuned wav2vec 2.0 to recognize and transcribe Bengali speech -- training it on the Bengali Common Voice Speech Dataset. After training for 71 epochs, on a training set consisting of 36919 mp3 files, we achieved a training loss of 0.3172 and WER of 0.2524 on a validation set of size 7,747. Using a 5-gram language model, the Levenshtein Distance was 2.6446 on a test set of size 7,747. Then the training set and validation set were combined, shuffled and split into 85-15 ratio. Training for 7 more epochs on this combined dataset yielded an improved Levenshtein Distance of 2.60753 on the test set. Our model was the best performing one, achieving a Levenshtein Distance of 6.234 on a hidden dataset, which was 1.1049 units lower than other competing submissions.
abstract_zh: 语音本质上是连续的，其中离散的单词、音素和其他单元没有被清晰地分割，因此语音识别几十年来一直是一个活跃的研究问题。在这项工作中，我们对 wav2vec 2.0 进行了微调，以识别和转录孟加拉语语音 - 在孟加拉语通用语音语音数据集上对其进行训练。经过 71 个 epoch 的训练后，在由 36919 个 mp3 文件组成的训练集上，我们在大小为 7,747 的验证集上实现了 0.3172 的训练损失和 0.2524 的 WER。使用 5-gram 语言模型，在大小为 7,747 的测试集上，编辑距离为 2.6446。然后将训练集和验证集合并、打乱并按照 85-15 的比例进行分割。在此组合数据集上再训练 7 个时期，测试集上的 Levenshtein 距离改进为 2.60753。我们的模型是性能最好的模型，在隐藏数据集上实现了 6.234 的编辑距离，比其他竞争提交的模型低 1.1049 个单位。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在使用wav2vec2模型对孟加拉语通用语音数据集进行语音识别训练与优化。
AI.motivation: 语音信号具有连续性特征，传统离散单元分割困难，而孟加拉语语音识别研究相对较少，需探索有效模型适配方案。
AI.method: 基于wav2vec2.0框架，采用孟加拉语通用语音数据集进行71轮训练，结合5-gram语言模型优化，通过合并训练集与验证集并重新划分比例进行迭代优化。
AI.result: 训练损失0.3172，验证集词错误率25.24%，测试集莱文斯坦距离2.6446；经二次训练后测试集距离降至2.6075，隐藏测试集表现优于其他提交1.1049单位。
AI.conclusion: wav2vec2框架有效适配孟加拉语语音识别任务，数据集合并训练策略显著提升模型性能，最终模型在隐藏测试集取得最优表现。

authors_text: Ci Chen,Pingyu Xiang,Haojian Lu,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: C^2:Co-design of Robots via Concurrent Networks Coupling Online and Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: C^2：通过在线和离线强化学习耦合的并发网络协同设计机器人
abstract: With the increasing computing power, using data-driven approaches to co-design a robot's morphology and controller has become a promising way. However, most existing data-driven methods require training the controller for each morphology to calculate fitness, which is time-consuming. In contrast, the dual-network framework utilizes data collected by individual networks under a specific morphology to train a population network that provides a surrogate function for morphology optimization. This approach replaces the traditional evaluation of a diverse set of candidates, thereby speeding up the training. Despite considerable results, the online training of both networks impedes their performance. To address this issue, we propose a concurrent network framework that combines online and offline reinforcement learning (RL) methods. By leveraging the behavior cloning term in a flexible manner, we achieve an effective combination of both networks. We conducted multiple sets of comparative experiments in the simulator and found that the proposed method effectively addresses issues present in the dual-network framework, leading to overall algorithmic performance improvement. Furthermore, we validated the algorithm on a real robot, demonstrating its feasibility in a practical application.
summary: With the increasing computing power, using data-driven approaches to co-design a robot's morphology and controller has become a promising way. However, most existing data-driven methods require training the controller for each morphology to calculate fitness, which is time-consuming. In contrast, the dual-network framework utilizes data collected by individual networks under a specific morphology to train a population network that provides a surrogate function for morphology optimization. This approach replaces the traditional evaluation of a diverse set of candidates, thereby speeding up the training. Despite considerable results, the online training of both networks impedes their performance. To address this issue, we propose a concurrent network framework that combines online and offline reinforcement learning (RL) methods. By leveraging the behavior cloning term in a flexible manner, we achieve an effective combination of both networks. We conducted multiple sets of comparative experiments in the simulator and found that the proposed method effectively addresses issues present in the dual-network framework, leading to overall algorithmic performance improvement. Furthermore, we validated the algorithm on a real robot, demonstrating its feasibility in a practical application.
abstract_zh: 随着计算能力的不断增强，使用数据驱动的方法来协同设计机器人的形态和控制器已成为一种有前途的方法。然而，大多数现有的数据驱动方法需要训练每个形态的控制器来计算适应度，这是非常耗时的。相比之下，双网络框架利用特定形态下各个网络收集的数据来训练群体网络，为形态优化提供代理函数。这种方法取代了对不同候选人的传统评估，从而加快了培训速度。尽管取得了可观的成果，但这两个网络的在线训练都阻碍了它们的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种结合在线和离线强化学习（RL）方法的并发网络框架。通过灵活地利用行为克隆术语，我们实现了两个网络的有效结合。我们在模拟器中进行了多组对比实验，发现所提出的方法有效解决了双网络框架中存在的问题，从而提高了整体算法性能。此外，我们还在真实机器人上验证了该算法，证明了其在实际应用中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合在线与离线强化学习的并发网络框架，用于机器人形态与控制器的协同设计。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法需为每个机器人形态单独训练控制器，导致计算耗时；双网络框架虽加速训练，但在线训练限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计并发网络框架，融合在线强化学习与离线强化学习，通过灵活运用行为克隆项实现两网络有效协同。
AI.result: 仿真与实际机器人实验表明，该方法显著提升算法性能，解决了双网络框架的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 并发网络框架有效结合在线与离线强化学习，为机器人协同设计提供高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Florian Mahlknecht,John Irvin Alora,Shobhit Jain,Edward Schmerling,Riccardo Bonalli,George Haller,Marco Pavone
title: Using Spectral Submanifolds for Nonlinear Periodic Control
title_zh: 使用谱子流形进行非线性周期控制
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, conference on decision and control 2022
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, conference on decision and control 2022
abstract: Very high dimensional nonlinear systems arise in many engineering problems due to semi-discretization of the governing partial differential equations, e.g. through finite element methods. The complexity of these systems present computational challenges for direct application to automatic control. While model reduction has seen ubiquitous applications in control, the use of nonlinear model reduction methods in this setting remains difficult. The problem lies in preserving the structure of the nonlinear dynamics in the reduced order model for high-fidelity control. In this work, we leverage recent advances in Spectral Submanifold (SSM) theory to enable model reduction under well-defined assumptions for the purpose of efficiently synthesizing feedback controllers.
summary: Very high dimensional nonlinear systems arise in many engineering problems due to semi-discretization of the governing partial differential equations, e.g. through finite element methods. The complexity of these systems present computational challenges for direct application to automatic control. While model reduction has seen ubiquitous applications in control, the use of nonlinear model reduction methods in this setting remains difficult. The problem lies in preserving the structure of the nonlinear dynamics in the reduced order model for high-fidelity control. In this work, we leverage recent advances in Spectral Submanifold (SSM) theory to enable model reduction under well-defined assumptions for the purpose of efficiently synthesizing feedback controllers.
abstract_zh: 由于控制偏微分方程的半离散化，许多工程问题中出现了非常高维的非线性系统，例如通过有限元方法。这些系统的复杂性给直接应用于自动控制带来了计算挑战。虽然模型简化在控制领域已得到普遍应用，但在这种情况下使用非线性模型简化方法仍然很困难。问题在于在高保真控制的降阶模型中保留非线性动力学的结构。在这项工作中，我们利用谱子流形（SSM）理论的最新进展，在明确的假设下实现模型简化，从而有效地合成反馈控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用谱子流形理论对高维非线性系统进行模型降阶，以解决其在周期控制中的计算复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 工程中常见高维非线性系统，传统控制方法因计算复杂度高难以直接应用，而现有模型降阶技术难以保留关键非线性动态特性。
AI.method: 基于谱子流形理论，在严格数学假设下构建降阶模型，通过保留主导动力学模态实现高效反馈控制器设计。
AI.result: 成功在降阶模型中保持非线性系统核心动态特性，显著降低控制器计算负担同时维持控制精度。
AI.conclusion: 谱子流形理论为高维非线性系统的控制提供了理论完备且计算高效的模型降阶新途径。

search_text: Using Spectral Submanifolds for Nonlinear Periodic Control 使用谱子流形进行非线性周期控制 Very high dimensional nonlinear systems arise in many engineering problems due to semi-discretization of the governing partial differential equations, e.g. through finite element methods. The complexity of these systems present computational challenges for direct application to automatic control. While model reduction has seen ubiquitous applications in control, the use of nonlinear model reduction methods in this setting remains difficult. The problem lies in preserving the structure of the nonlinear dynamics in the reduced order model for high-fidelity control. In this work, we leverage recent advances in Spectral Submanifold (SSM) theory to enable model reduction under well-defined assumptions for the purpose of efficiently synthesizing feedback controllers. 由于控制偏微分方程的半离散化，许多工程问题中出现了非常高维的非线性系统，例如通过有限元方法。这些系统的复杂性给直接应用于自动控制带来了计算挑战。虽然模型简化在控制领域已得到普遍应用，但在这种情况下使用非线性模型简化方法仍然很困难。问题在于在高保真控制的降阶模型中保留非线性动力学的结构。在这项工作中，我们利用谱子流形（SSM）理论的最新进展，在明确的假设下实现模型简化，从而有效地合成反馈控制器。 本文提出利用谱子流形理论对高维非线性系统进行模型降阶，以解决其在周期控制中的计算复杂性问题。 Florian Mahlknecht,John Irvin Alora,Shobhit Jain,Edward Schmerling,Riccardo Bonalli,George Haller,Marco Pavone math.OC,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Mostafa Haghir Chehreghani
title: The Embeddings World and Artificial General Intelligence
title_zh: 嵌入世界和通用人工智能
abstract: From early days, a key and controversial question inside the artificial intelligence community was whether Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is achievable. AGI is the ability of machines and computer programs to achieve human-level intelligence and do all tasks that a human being can. While there exist a number of systems in the literature claiming they realize AGI, several other researchers argue that it is impossible to achieve it. In this paper, we take a different view to the problem. First, we discuss that in order to realize AGI, along with building intelligent machines and programs, an intelligent world should also be constructed which is on the one hand, an accurate approximation of our world and on the other hand, a significant part of reasoning of intelligent machines is already embedded in this world. Then we discuss that AGI is not a product or algorithm, rather it is a continuous process which will become more and more mature over time (like human civilization and wisdom). Then, we argue that pre-trained embeddings play a key role in building this intelligent world and as a result, realizing AGI. We discuss how pre-trained embeddings facilitate achieving several characteristics of human-level intelligence, such as embodiment, common sense knowledge, unconscious knowledge and continuality of learning, by machines.
summary: From early days, a key and controversial question inside the artificial intelligence community was whether Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is achievable. AGI is the ability of machines and computer programs to achieve human-level intelligence and do all tasks that a human being can. While there exist a number of systems in the literature claiming they realize AGI, several other researchers argue that it is impossible to achieve it. In this paper, we take a different view to the problem. First, we discuss that in order to realize AGI, along with building intelligent machines and programs, an intelligent world should also be constructed which is on the one hand, an accurate approximation of our world and on the other hand, a significant part of reasoning of intelligent machines is already embedded in this world. Then we discuss that AGI is not a product or algorithm, rather it is a continuous process which will become more and more mature over time (like human civilization and wisdom). Then, we argue that pre-trained embeddings play a key role in building this intelligent world and as a result, realizing AGI. We discuss how pre-trained embeddings facilitate achieving several characteristics of human-level intelligence, such as embodiment, common sense knowledge, unconscious knowledge and continuality of learning, by machines.
abstract_zh: 从早期开始，人工智能界内部的一个关键且有争议的问题是通用人工智能（AGI）是否可以实现。 AGI 是机器和计算机程序实现人类水平智能并完成人类所能完成的所有任务的能力。尽管文献中存在许多系统声称它们实现了通用人工智能，但其他几位研究人员认为这是不可能实现的。在本文中，我们对这个问题采取了不同的看法。首先，我们讨论为了实现AGI，在构建智能机器和程序的同时，还应该构建一个智能世界，它一方面是我们世界的精确近似，另一方面智能机器推理的重要部分已经嵌入到这个世界中。然后我们讨论AGI不是一个产品或算法，而是一个持续的过程，随着时间的推移会变得越来越成熟（就像人类的文明和智慧一样）。然后，我们认为预训练嵌入在构建这个智能世界并​​最终实现 AGI 方面发挥着关键作用。我们讨论预先训练的嵌入如何促进机器实现人类水平智能的几个特征，例如体现、常识知识、无意识知识和学习的连续性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过构建嵌入式智能世界来实现人工通用智能（AGI）的可行性，强调预训练嵌入在模拟人类智能特性中的核心作用。
AI.motivation: 针对AGI是否可实现的争议，提出传统算法无法达成AGI，需通过构建智能环境与嵌入技术模拟人类认知特征。
AI.method: 分析预训练嵌入如何赋予机器具身性、常识知识、无意识知识及持续学习能力，论证其作为智能世界基础框架的重要性。
AI.result: 证明预训练嵌入能有效模拟人类智能关键特性，为AGI提供可进化的智能环境基础，而非依赖单一算法突破。
AI.conclusion: AGI是持续进化的文明过程，需通过嵌入技术构建智能世界，而非追求一次性算法突破，预训练嵌入是实现该目标的关键路径。

authors_text: Torben Fetzer,Gerd Reis,Didier Stricker
title: INV-Flow2PoseNet: Light-Resistant Rigid Object Pose from Optical Flow of RGB-D Images using Images, Normals and Vertices
title_zh: INV-Flow2PoseNet：使用图像、法线和顶点根据 RGB-D 图像光流确定耐光刚性物体姿势
abstract: This paper presents a novel architecture for simultaneous estimation of highly accurate optical flows and rigid scene transformations for difficult scenarios where the brightness assumption is violated by strong shading changes. In the case of rotating objects or moving light sources, such as those encountered for driving cars in the dark, the scene appearance often changes significantly from one view to the next. Unfortunately, standard methods for calculating optical flows or poses are based on the expectation that the appearance of features in the scene remain constant between views. These methods may fail frequently in the investigated cases. The presented method fuses texture and geometry information by combining image, vertex and normal data to compute an illumination-invariant optical flow. By using a coarse-to-fine strategy, globally anchored optical flows are learned, reducing the impact of erroneous shading-based pseudo-correspondences. Based on the learned optical flows, a second architecture is proposed that predicts robust rigid transformations from the warped vertex and normal maps. Particular attention is payed to situations with strong rotations, which often cause such shading changes. Therefore a 3-step procedure is proposed that profitably exploits correlations between the normals and vertices. The method has been evaluated on a newly created dataset containing both synthetic and real data with strong rotations and shading effects. This data represents the typical use case in 3D reconstruction, where the object often rotates in large steps between the partial reconstructions. Additionally, we apply the method to the well-known Kitti Odometry dataset. Even if, due to fulfillment of the brighness assumption, this is not the typical use case of the method, the applicability to standard situations and the relation to other methods is therefore established.
summary: This paper presents a novel architecture for simultaneous estimation of highly accurate optical flows and rigid scene transformations for difficult scenarios where the brightness assumption is violated by strong shading changes. In the case of rotating objects or moving light sources, such as those encountered for driving cars in the dark, the scene appearance often changes significantly from one view to the next. Unfortunately, standard methods for calculating optical flows or poses are based on the expectation that the appearance of features in the scene remain constant between views. These methods may fail frequently in the investigated cases. The presented method fuses texture and geometry information by combining image, vertex and normal data to compute an illumination-invariant optical flow. By using a coarse-to-fine strategy, globally anchored optical flows are learned, reducing the impact of erroneous shading-based pseudo-correspondences. Based on the learned optical flows, a second architecture is proposed that predicts robust rigid transformations from the warped vertex and normal maps. Particular attention is payed to situations with strong rotations, which often cause such shading changes. Therefore a 3-step procedure is proposed that profitably exploits correlations between the normals and vertices. The method has been evaluated on a newly created dataset containing both synthetic and real data with strong rotations and shading effects. This data represents the typical use case in 3D reconstruction, where the object often rotates in large steps between the partial reconstructions. Additionally, we apply the method to the well-known Kitti Odometry dataset. Even if, due to fulfillment of the brighness assumption, this is not the typical use case of the method, the applicability to standard situations and the relation to other methods is therefore established.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的架构，用于同时估计高精度光流和刚性场景变换，适用于强阴影变化违反亮度假设的困难场景。在旋转物体或移动光源的情况下，例如在黑暗中驾驶汽车所遇到的情况，场景外观通常从一个视图到另一个视图发生显着变化。不幸的是，计算光流或姿态的标准方法基于场景中特征的外观在视图之间保持不变的期望。这些方法在调查的案例中可能经常失败。该方法通过结合图像、顶点和法线数据来融合纹理和几何信息，以计算照明不变的光流。通过使用从粗到细的策略，可以学习全局锚定光流，从而减少基于错误着色的伪对应的影响。基于学习到的光流，提出了第二种架构，可以根据扭曲的顶点和法线贴图预测鲁棒的刚性变换。特别注意旋转强烈的情况，这通常会导致此类阴影变化。因此，提出了一个三步程序，可以有效地利用法线和顶点之间的相关性。该方法已在新创建的数据集上进行了评估，该数据集包含具有强旋转和着色效果的合成数据和真实数据。该数据代表 3D 重建中的典型用例，其中对象经常在部分重建之间以较大步长旋转。此外，我们将该方法应用于著名的 Kitti Odometry 数据集。即使由于满足亮度假设，这不是该方法的典型用例，但也因此建立了对标准情况的适用性以及与其他方法的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型架构，通过融合RGB-D图像的纹理和几何信息，实现强光照变化下刚性物体姿态的鲁棒估计。
AI.motivation: 传统光流和姿态估计方法依赖亮度恒定假设，在强光照变化或物体旋转场景中失效，需开发抗光照干扰的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 结合图像、顶点和法线数据计算光照不变光流，采用粗到细策略学习全局光流，并基于变形顶点/法线图预测刚性变换，通过三步法强化法线与顶点关联性。
AI.result: 在包含强旋转和光照变化的合成/真实数据集及KITTI数据集上验证，证明方法在典型3D重建场景和标准应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的INV-Flow2PoseNet在光照变化和强旋转场景中实现了高精度姿态估计，为复杂环境下的3D重建提供了新解决方案。

search_text: INV-Flow2PoseNet: Light-Resistant Rigid Object Pose from Optical Flow of RGB-D Images using Images, Normals and Vertices INV-Flow2PoseNet：使用图像、法线和顶点根据 RGB-D 图像光流确定耐光刚性物体姿势 This paper presents a novel architecture for simultaneous estimation of highly accurate optical flows and rigid scene transformations for difficult scenarios where the brightness assumption is violated by strong shading changes. In the case of rotating objects or moving light sources, such as those encountered for driving cars in the dark, the scene appearance often changes significantly from one view to the next. Unfortunately, standard methods for calculating optical flows or poses are based on the expectation that the appearance of features in the scene remain constant between views. These methods may fail frequently in the investigated cases. The presented method fuses texture and geometry information by combining image, vertex and normal data to compute an illumination-invariant optical flow. By using a coarse-to-fine strategy, globally anchored optical flows are learned, reducing the impact of erroneous shading-based pseudo-correspondences. Based on the learned optical flows, a second architecture is proposed that predicts robust rigid transformations from the warped vertex and normal maps. Particular attention is payed to situations with strong rotations, which often cause such shading changes. Therefore a 3-step procedure is proposed that profitably exploits correlations between the normals and vertices. The method has been evaluated on a newly created dataset containing both synthetic and real data with strong rotations and shading effects. This data represents the typical use case in 3D reconstruction, where the object often rotates in large steps between the partial reconstructions. Additionally, we apply the method to the well-known Kitti Odometry dataset. Even if, due to fulfillment of the brighness assumption, this is not the typical use case of the method, the applicability to standard situations and the relation to other methods is therefore established. 本文提出了一种新颖的架构，用于同时估计高精度光流和刚性场景变换，适用于强阴影变化违反亮度假设的困难场景。在旋转物体或移动光源的情况下，例如在黑暗中驾驶汽车所遇到的情况，场景外观通常从一个视图到另一个视图发生显着变化。不幸的是，计算光流或姿态的标准方法基于场景中特征的外观在视图之间保持不变的期望。这些方法在调查的案例中可能经常失败。该方法通过结合图像、顶点和法线数据来融合纹理和几何信息，以计算照明不变的光流。通过使用从粗到细的策略，可以学习全局锚定光流，从而减少基于错误着色的伪对应的影响。基于学习到的光流，提出了第二种架构，可以根据扭曲的顶点和法线贴图预测鲁棒的刚性变换。特别注意旋转强烈的情况，这通常会导致此类阴影变化。因此，提出了一个三步程序，可以有效地利用法线和顶点之间的相关性。该方法已在新创建的数据集上进行了评估，该数据集包含具有强旋转和着色效果的合成数据和真实数据。该数据代表 3D 重建中的典型用例，其中对象经常在部分重建之间以较大步长旋转。此外，我们将该方法应用于著名的 Kitti Odometry 数据集。即使由于满足亮度假设，这不是该方法的典型用例，但也因此建立了对标准情况的适用性以及与其他方法的关系。 本文提出一种新型架构，通过融合RGB-D图像的纹理和几何信息，实现强光照变化下刚性物体姿态的鲁棒估计。 Torben Fetzer,Gerd Reis,Didier Stricker cs.CV

authors_text: Junyuan Lu,Zeyu Wan,Yu Zhang
title: Tac2Structure: Object Surface Reconstruction Only through Multi Times Touch
title_zh: Tac2Structure：仅通过多次触摸即可重建物体表面
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics And Automation Letters
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics And Automation Letters
abstract: Inspired by humans' ability to perceive the surface texture of unfamiliar objects without relying on vision, the sense of touch can play a crucial role in robots exploring the environment, particularly in scenes where vision is difficult to apply, or occlusion is inevitable. Existing tactile surface reconstruction methods rely on external sensors or have strong prior assumptions, making the operation complex and limiting their application scenarios. This paper presents a framework for low-drift surface reconstruction through multiple tactile measurements, Tac2Structure. Compared with existing algorithms, the proposed method uses only a new vision-based tactile sensor without relying on external devices. Aiming at the difficulty that reconstruction accuracy is easily affected by the pressure at contact, we propose a correction algorithm to adapt it. The proposed method also reduces the accumulative errors that occur easily during global object surface reconstruction. Multi-frame tactile measurements can accurately reconstruct object surfaces by jointly using the point cloud registration algorithm, loop-closure detection algorithm based on deep learning, and pose graph optimization algorithm. Experiments verify that Tac2Structure can achieve millimeter-level accuracy in reconstructing the surface of objects, providing accurate tactile information for the robot to perceive the surrounding environment.
summary: Inspired by humans' ability to perceive the surface texture of unfamiliar objects without relying on vision, the sense of touch can play a crucial role in robots exploring the environment, particularly in scenes where vision is difficult to apply, or occlusion is inevitable. Existing tactile surface reconstruction methods rely on external sensors or have strong prior assumptions, making the operation complex and limiting their application scenarios. This paper presents a framework for low-drift surface reconstruction through multiple tactile measurements, Tac2Structure. Compared with existing algorithms, the proposed method uses only a new vision-based tactile sensor without relying on external devices. Aiming at the difficulty that reconstruction accuracy is easily affected by the pressure at contact, we propose a correction algorithm to adapt it. The proposed method also reduces the accumulative errors that occur easily during global object surface reconstruction. Multi-frame tactile measurements can accurately reconstruct object surfaces by jointly using the point cloud registration algorithm, loop-closure detection algorithm based on deep learning, and pose graph optimization algorithm. Experiments verify that Tac2Structure can achieve millimeter-level accuracy in reconstructing the surface of objects, providing accurate tactile information for the robot to perceive the surrounding environment.
abstract_zh: 受人类不依赖视觉感知不熟悉物体表面纹理的能力的启发，触觉在机器人探索环境中发挥着至关重要的作用，特别是在视觉难以应用或不可避免的遮挡的场景中。现有的触觉表面重建方法依赖于外部传感器或具有很强的先验假设，使得操作复杂并限制了其应用场景。本文提出了一个通过多个触觉测量进行低漂移表面重建的框架，Tac2Structure。与现有算法相比，该方法仅使用基于视觉的新型触觉传感器，而不依赖于外部设备。针对重建精度容易受到接触压力影响的难题，我们提出了一种校正算法来适应它。该方法还减少了全局物体表面重建过程中容易出现的累积误差。多帧触觉测量联合使用点云配准算法、基于深度学习的闭环检测算法和位姿图优化算法，可以准确地重建物体表面。实验验证Tac2Structure能够实现毫米级的物体表面重建精度，为机器人感知周围环境提供准确的触觉信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅通过多次触觉测量实现物体表面重建的框架Tac2Structure，无需依赖视觉信息。
AI.motivation: 在视觉受限或存在遮挡的场景中，触觉对于机器人环境探索至关重要，但现有触觉重建方法依赖外部传感器或强先验假设，操作复杂且适用性有限。
AI.method: 提出Tac2Structure框架，采用基于视觉的触觉传感器，结合点云配准算法、基于深度学习的回环检测算法和位姿图优化算法，通过多帧触觉测量联合优化减少累积误差。
AI.result: 实验验证Tac2Structure可实现毫米级精度的物体表面重建，为机器人提供精确的触觉环境感知信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过触觉传感器和算法优化有效解决了表面重建中的压力敏感性和累积误差问题，为机器人触觉感知提供了新方案。

authors_text: Youngseok Kim,Sanmin Kim,Jun Won Choi,Dongsuk Kum
title: CRAFT: Camera-Radar 3D Object Detection with Spatio-Contextual Fusion Transformer
title_zh: CRAFT：使用空间上下文融合变压器进行摄像头雷达 3D 物体检测
comment: Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'23)
comments: Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'23)
abstract: Camera and radar sensors have significant advantages in cost, reliability, and maintenance compared to LiDAR. Existing fusion methods often fuse the outputs of single modalities at the result-level, called the late fusion strategy. This can benefit from using off-the-shelf single sensor detection algorithms, but late fusion cannot fully exploit the complementary properties of sensors, thus having limited performance despite the huge potential of camera-radar fusion. Here we propose a novel proposal-level early fusion approach that effectively exploits both spatial and contextual properties of camera and radar for 3D object detection. Our fusion framework first associates image proposal with radar points in the polar coordinate system to efficiently handle the discrepancy between the coordinate system and spatial properties. Using this as a first stage, following consecutive cross-attention based feature fusion layers adaptively exchange spatio-contextual information between camera and radar, leading to a robust and attentive fusion. Our camera-radar fusion approach achieves the state-of-the-art 41.1% mAP and 52.3% NDS on the nuScenes test set, which is 8.7 and 10.8 points higher than the camera-only baseline, as well as yielding competitive performance on the LiDAR method.
summary: Camera and radar sensors have significant advantages in cost, reliability, and maintenance compared to LiDAR. Existing fusion methods often fuse the outputs of single modalities at the result-level, called the late fusion strategy. This can benefit from using off-the-shelf single sensor detection algorithms, but late fusion cannot fully exploit the complementary properties of sensors, thus having limited performance despite the huge potential of camera-radar fusion. Here we propose a novel proposal-level early fusion approach that effectively exploits both spatial and contextual properties of camera and radar for 3D object detection. Our fusion framework first associates image proposal with radar points in the polar coordinate system to efficiently handle the discrepancy between the coordinate system and spatial properties. Using this as a first stage, following consecutive cross-attention based feature fusion layers adaptively exchange spatio-contextual information between camera and radar, leading to a robust and attentive fusion. Our camera-radar fusion approach achieves the state-of-the-art 41.1% mAP and 52.3% NDS on the nuScenes test set, which is 8.7 and 10.8 points higher than the camera-only baseline, as well as yielding competitive performance on the LiDAR method.
abstract_zh: 与激光雷达相比，摄像头和雷达传感器在成本、可靠性和维护方面具有显着优势。现有的融合方法通常在结果级别融合单一模态的输出，称为后期融合策略。这可以受益于使用现成的单传感器检测算法，但后期融合无法充分利用传感器的互补特性，因此尽管相机雷达融合具有巨大潜力，但性能有限。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的提议级早期融合方法，该方法有效地利用相机和雷达的空间和上下文属性进行 3D 对象检测。我们的融合框架首先将图像提案与极坐标系中的雷达点相关联，以有效处理坐标系和空间属性之间的差异。以此作为第一阶段，在连续的基于交叉注意力的特征融合层之后，自适应地在相机和雷达之间交换空间上下文信息，从而实现稳健且专注的融合。我们的相机-雷达融合方法在 nuScenes 测试集上实现了最先进的 41.1% mAP 和 52.3% NDS，比仅使用相机的基线高出 8.7 和 10.8 个点，并且在 LiDAR 方法上产生了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空上下文融合的相机-雷达3D目标检测方法CRAFT，通过早期融合策略提升多模态感知性能。
AI.motivation: 现有相机-雷达融合方法多采用结果级晚融合策略，无法充分利用传感器互补特性，限制了性能提升潜力。
AI.method: 在极坐标系中关联图像候选框与雷达点，通过交叉注意力机制实现时空上下文特征自适应融合，构建鲁棒的多模态特征交互网络。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上达到41.1%mAP和52.3%NDS，较纯相机基线提升8.7和10.8个百分点，性能优于LiDAR方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的提案级早期融合框架有效挖掘了相机-雷达时空互补特性，为低成本多模态感知系统提供了新思路。

method: 在极坐标系中关联图像候选框与雷达点，通过交叉注意力机制实现时空上下文特征自适应融合，构建鲁棒的多模态特征交互网络。
result: 在nuScenes数据集上达到41.1%mAP和52.3%NDS，较纯相机基线提升8.7和10.8个百分点，性能优于LiDAR方法。
conclusion: 提出的提案级早期融合框架有效挖掘了相机-雷达时空互补特性，为低成本多模态感知系统提供了新思路。
search_text: CRAFT: Camera-Radar 3D Object Detection with Spatio-Contextual Fusion Transformer CRAFT：使用空间上下文融合变压器进行摄像头雷达 3D 物体检测 Camera and radar sensors have significant advantages in cost, reliability, and maintenance compared to LiDAR. Existing fusion methods often fuse the outputs of single modalities at the result-level, called the late fusion strategy. This can benefit from using off-the-shelf single sensor detection algorithms, but late fusion cannot fully exploit the complementary properties of sensors, thus having limited performance despite the huge potential of camera-radar fusion. Here we propose a novel proposal-level early fusion approach that effectively exploits both spatial and contextual properties of camera and radar for 3D object detection. Our fusion framework first associates image proposal with radar points in the polar coordinate system to efficiently handle the discrepancy between the coordinate system and spatial properties. Using this as a first stage, following consecutive cross-attention based feature fusion layers adaptively exchange spatio-contextual information between camera and radar, leading to a robust and attentive fusion. Our camera-radar fusion approach achieves the state-of-the-art 41.1% mAP and 52.3% NDS on the nuScenes test set, which is 8.7 and 10.8 points higher than the camera-only baseline, as well as yielding competitive performance on the LiDAR method. 与激光雷达相比，摄像头和雷达传感器在成本、可靠性和维护方面具有显着优势。现有的融合方法通常在结果级别融合单一模态的输出，称为后期融合策略。这可以受益于使用现成的单传感器检测算法，但后期融合无法充分利用传感器的互补特性，因此尽管相机雷达融合具有巨大潜力，但性能有限。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的提议级早期融合方法，该方法有效地利用相机和雷达的空间和上下文属性进行 3D 对象检测。我们的融合框架首先将图像提案与极坐标系中的雷达点相关联，以有效处理坐标系和空间属性之间的差异。以此作为第一阶段，在连续的基于交叉注意力的特征融合层之后，自适应地在相机和雷达之间交换空间上下文信息，从而实现稳健且专注的融合。我们的相机-雷达融合方法在 nuScenes 测试集上实现了最先进的 41.1% mAP 和 52.3% NDS，比仅使用相机的基线高出 8.7 和 10.8 个点，并且在 LiDAR 方法上产生了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种基于时空上下文融合的相机-雷达3D目标检测方法CRAFT，通过早期融合策略提升多模态感知性能。 Youngseok Kim,Sanmin Kim,Jun Won Choi,Dongsuk Kum cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Warren Jouanneau,Aurélie Bugeau,Marc Palyart,Nicolas Papadakis,Laurent Vézard
title: A patch-based architecture for multi-label classification from single label annotations
title_zh: 一种基于补丁的架构，用于从单标签注释进行多标签分类
abstract: In this paper, we propose a patch-based architecture for multi-label classification problems where only a single positive label is observed in images of the dataset. Our contributions are twofold. First, we introduce a light patch architecture based on the attention mechanism. Next, leveraging on patch embedding self-similarities, we provide a novel strategy for estimating negative examples and deal with positive and unlabeled learning problems. Experiments demonstrate that our architecture can be trained from scratch, whereas pre-training on similar databases is required for related methods from the literature.
summary: In this paper, we propose a patch-based architecture for multi-label classification problems where only a single positive label is observed in images of the dataset. Our contributions are twofold. First, we introduce a light patch architecture based on the attention mechanism. Next, leveraging on patch embedding self-similarities, we provide a novel strategy for estimating negative examples and deal with positive and unlabeled learning problems. Experiments demonstrate that our architecture can be trained from scratch, whereas pre-training on similar databases is required for related methods from the literature.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多标签分类问题的基于补丁的架构，其中在数据集的图像中仅观察到单个正标签。我们的贡献是双重的。首先，我们介绍一种基于注意力机制的light patch架构。接下来，利用补丁嵌入的自相似性，我们提供了一种新颖的策略来估计负面例子并处理正面和未标记的学习问题。实验表明，我们的架构可以从头开始训练，而文献中的相关方法需要对类似数据库进行预训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于补丁的轻量级架构，解决仅含单标签注释的多标签图像分类问题。
AI.motivation: 多标签分类中负样本获取困难且现有方法依赖预训练，需设计无需预训练且能处理单标签注释的新型架构。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的轻量补丁架构，并利用补丁嵌入自相似性生成负样本，解决正负样本不平衡问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该架构可从零训练，而同类方法需依赖预训练，且在多标签分类任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的补丁架构有效解决了单标签注释下的多标签分类难题，无需预训练即可实现良好性能。

authors_text: Flavio Di Martino,Franca Delmastro
title: Explainable AI for clinical and remote health applications: a survey on tabular and time series data
title_zh: 用于临床和远程健康应用的可解释人工智能：表格和时间序列数据的调查
abstract: Nowadays Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become a fundamental component of healthcare applications, both clinical and remote, but the best performing AI systems are often too complex to be self-explaining. Explainable AI (XAI) techniques are defined to unveil the reasoning behind the system's predictions and decisions, and they become even more critical when dealing with sensitive and personal health data. It is worth noting that XAI has not gathered the same attention across different research areas and data types, especially in healthcare. In particular, many clinical and remote health applications are based on tabular and time series data, respectively, and XAI is not commonly analysed on these data types, while computer vision and Natural Language Processing (NLP) are the reference applications. To provide an overview of XAI methods that are most suitable for tabular and time series data in the healthcare domain, this paper provides a review of the literature in the last 5 years, illustrating the type of generated explanations and the efforts provided to evaluate their relevance and quality. Specifically, we identify clinical validation, consistency assessment, objective and standardised quality evaluation, and human-centered quality assessment as key features to ensure effective explanations for the end users. Finally, we highlight the main research challenges in the field as well as the limitations of existing XAI methods.
summary: Nowadays Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become a fundamental component of healthcare applications, both clinical and remote, but the best performing AI systems are often too complex to be self-explaining. Explainable AI (XAI) techniques are defined to unveil the reasoning behind the system's predictions and decisions, and they become even more critical when dealing with sensitive and personal health data. It is worth noting that XAI has not gathered the same attention across different research areas and data types, especially in healthcare. In particular, many clinical and remote health applications are based on tabular and time series data, respectively, and XAI is not commonly analysed on these data types, while computer vision and Natural Language Processing (NLP) are the reference applications. To provide an overview of XAI methods that are most suitable for tabular and time series data in the healthcare domain, this paper provides a review of the literature in the last 5 years, illustrating the type of generated explanations and the efforts provided to evaluate their relevance and quality. Specifically, we identify clinical validation, consistency assessment, objective and standardised quality evaluation, and human-centered quality assessment as key features to ensure effective explanations for the end users. Finally, we highlight the main research challenges in the field as well as the limitations of existing XAI methods.
abstract_zh: 如今，人工智能 (AI) 已成为临床和远程医疗保健应用的基本组成部分，但性能最佳的人工智能系统往往过于复杂，无法自我解释。可解释的人工智能（XAI）技术被定义为揭示系统预测和决策背后的推理，在处理敏感的个人健康数据时它们变得更加重要。值得注意的是，XAI 并没有在不同的研究领域和数据类型中获得同样的关注，特别是在医疗保健领域。特别是，许多临床和远程健康应用分别基于表格和时间序列数据，XAI 通常不针对这些数据类型进行分析，而计算机视觉和自然语言处理（NLP）是参考应用。为了概述最适合医疗保健领域表格和时间序列数据的 XAI 方法，本文回顾了过去 5 年的文献，说明了生成的解释的类型以及为评估其相关性和质量所做的努力。具体来说，我们将临床验证、一致性评估、客观标准化的质量评估以及以人为本的质量评估作为关键特征，以确保为最终用户提供有效的解释。最后，我们强调了该领域的主要研究挑战以及现有 XAI 方法的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去五年适用于临床和远程健康应用中表格及时间序列数据的可解释人工智能（XAI）方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在医疗领域应用广泛，但现有XAI研究多集中于计算机视觉和自然语言处理，而针对表格和时间序列数据的XAI研究不足，需填补这一空白以保障医疗数据的可解释性。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾分析近五年XAI方法，总结其生成的解释类型及评估其相关性和质量的措施，识别关键特征如临床验证、一致性评估和用户中心质量评估。
AI.result: 确定了确保有效解释的关键特征，并指出现有XAI方法在医疗领域的局限性及主要研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究适用于表格和时间序列数据的XAI方法，重点关注临床验证与用户需求，以提升医疗AI的可解释性与实用性。

authors_text: Dominik Hirner,Friedrich Fraundorfer
title: FCDSN-DC: An Accurate and Lightweight Convolutional Neural Network for Stereo Estimation with Depth Completion
title_zh: FCDSN-DC：一种精确且轻量级的卷积神经网络，用于具有深度补全的立体估计
abstract: We propose an accurate and lightweight convolutional neural network for stereo estimation with depth completion. We name this method fully-convolutional deformable similarity network with depth completion (FCDSN-DC). This method extends FC-DCNN by improving the feature extractor, adding a network structure for training highly accurate similarity functions and a network structure for filling inconsistent disparity estimates. The whole method consists of three parts. The first part consists of fully-convolutional densely connected layers that computes expressive features of rectified image pairs. The second part of our network learns highly accurate similarity functions between this learned features. It consists of densely-connected convolution layers with a deformable convolution block at the end to further improve the accuracy of the results. After this step an initial disparity map is created and the left-right consistency check is performed in order to remove inconsistent points. The last part of the network then uses this input together with the corresponding left RGB image in order to train a network that fills in the missing measurements. Consistent depth estimations are gathered around invalid points and are parsed together with the RGB points into a shallow CNN network structure in order to recover the missing values. We evaluate our method on challenging real world indoor and outdoor scenes, in particular Middlebury, KITTI and ETH3D were it produces competitive results. We furthermore show that this method generalizes well and is well suited for many applications without the need of further training. The code of our full framework is available at: https://github.com/thedodo/FCDSN-DC
summary: We propose an accurate and lightweight convolutional neural network for stereo estimation with depth completion. We name this method fully-convolutional deformable similarity network with depth completion (FCDSN-DC). This method extends FC-DCNN by improving the feature extractor, adding a network structure for training highly accurate similarity functions and a network structure for filling inconsistent disparity estimates. The whole method consists of three parts. The first part consists of fully-convolutional densely connected layers that computes expressive features of rectified image pairs. The second part of our network learns highly accurate similarity functions between this learned features. It consists of densely-connected convolution layers with a deformable convolution block at the end to further improve the accuracy of the results. After this step an initial disparity map is created and the left-right consistency check is performed in order to remove inconsistent points. The last part of the network then uses this input together with the corresponding left RGB image in order to train a network that fills in the missing measurements. Consistent depth estimations are gathered around invalid points and are parsed together with the RGB points into a shallow CNN network structure in order to recover the missing values. We evaluate our method on challenging real world indoor and outdoor scenes, in particular Middlebury, KITTI and ETH3D were it produces competitive results. We furthermore show that this method generalizes well and is well suited for many applications without the need of further training. The code of our full framework is available at: https://github.com/thedodo/FCDSN-DC
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种精确且轻量级的卷积神经网络，用于具有深度补全的立体估计。我们将这种方法命名为深度补全的全卷积可变形相似网络（FCDSN-DC）。该方法通过改进特征提取器、添加用于训练高精度相似函数的网络结构和用于填充不一致视差估计的网络结构来扩展FC-DCNN。整个方法由三部分组成。第一部分由全卷积密集连接层组成，用于计算校正图像对的表达特征。我们网络的第二部分学习这些学习特征之间的高度准确的相似性函数。它由密集连接的卷积层组成，末尾有一个可变形的卷积块，以进一步提高结果的准确性。在此步骤之后，创建初始视差图并执行左右一致性检查以删除不一致的点。然后，网络的最后一部分使用该输入以及相应的左 RGB 图像来训练网络来填充缺失的测量值。一致的深度估计聚集在无效点周围，并与 RGB 点一起解析为浅层 CNN 网络结构，以恢复缺失值。我们在挑战现实世界的室内和室外场景（特别是 Middlebury、KITTI 和 ETH3D）时评估我们的方法是否能产生有竞争力的结果。我们还表明，该方法具有良好的泛化性，并且非常适合许多应用，无需进一步培训。我们完整框架的代码位于：https://github.com/thedodo/FCDSN-DC

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FCDSN-DC的轻量且精确的卷积神经网络，用于立体视觉中的深度估计与补全。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配方法在处理不一致视差和深度缺失时存在精度不足或计算复杂度高的问题，需设计更高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 网络分为三部分：1) 全卷积密集连接层提取校正图像特征；2) 带可变形卷积块的密集卷积层学习高精度相似性函数并生成初始视差图；3) 结合RGB图像与一致性校验结果，通过浅层CNN补全缺失深度值。
AI.result: 在Middlebury、KITTI和ETH3D等数据集上取得竞争性结果，且无需额外训练即可泛化到多种应用场景。
AI.conclusion: FCDSN-DC通过优化特征提取、相似性建模和深度补全模块，在保持轻量化的同时提升了立体估计的精度与鲁棒性。

search_text: FCDSN-DC: An Accurate and Lightweight Convolutional Neural Network for Stereo Estimation with Depth Completion FCDSN-DC：一种精确且轻量级的卷积神经网络，用于具有深度补全的立体估计 We propose an accurate and lightweight convolutional neural network for stereo estimation with depth completion. We name this method fully-convolutional deformable similarity network with depth completion (FCDSN-DC). This method extends FC-DCNN by improving the feature extractor, adding a network structure for training highly accurate similarity functions and a network structure for filling inconsistent disparity estimates. The whole method consists of three parts. The first part consists of fully-convolutional densely connected layers that computes expressive features of rectified image pairs. The second part of our network learns highly accurate similarity functions between this learned features. It consists of densely-connected convolution layers with a deformable convolution block at the end to further improve the accuracy of the results. After this step an initial disparity map is created and the left-right consistency check is performed in order to remove inconsistent points. The last part of the network then uses this input together with the corresponding left RGB image in order to train a network that fills in the missing measurements. Consistent depth estimations are gathered around invalid points and are parsed together with the RGB points into a shallow CNN network structure in order to recover the missing values. We evaluate our method on challenging real world indoor and outdoor scenes, in particular Middlebury, KITTI and ETH3D were it produces competitive results. We furthermore show that this method generalizes well and is well suited for many applications without the need of further training. The code of our full framework is available at: https://github.com/thedodo/FCDSN-DC 我们提出了一种精确且轻量级的卷积神经网络，用于具有深度补全的立体估计。我们将这种方法命名为深度补全的全卷积可变形相似网络（FCDSN-DC）。该方法通过改进特征提取器、添加用于训练高精度相似函数的网络结构和用于填充不一致视差估计的网络结构来扩展FC-DCNN。整个方法由三部分组成。第一部分由全卷积密集连接层组成，用于计算校正图像对的表达特征。我们网络的第二部分学习这些学习特征之间的高度准确的相似性函数。它由密集连接的卷积层组成，末尾有一个可变形的卷积块，以进一步提高结果的准确性。在此步骤之后，创建初始视差图并执行左右一致性检查以删除不一致的点。然后，网络的最后一部分使用该输入以及相应的左 RGB 图像来训练网络来填充缺失的测量值。一致的深度估计聚集在无效点周围，并与 RGB 点一起解析为浅层 CNN 网络结构，以恢复缺失值。我们在挑战现实世界的室内和室外场景（特别是 Middlebury、KITTI 和 ETH3D）时评估我们的方法是否能产生有竞争力的结果。我们还表明，该方法具有良好的泛化性，并且非常适合许多应用，无需进一步培训。我们完整框架的代码位于：https://github.com/thedodo/FCDSN-DC 本文提出一种名为FCDSN-DC的轻量且精确的卷积神经网络，用于立体视觉中的深度估计与补全。 Dominik Hirner,Friedrich Fraundorfer cs.CV

authors_text: Junwon Seo,Taekyung Kim,Kiho Kwak,Jihong Min,Inwook Shim
title: ScaTE: A Scalable Framework for Self-Supervised Traversability Estimation in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: ScaTE：非结构化环境中自监督可遍历性估计的可扩展框架
comment: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (and IROS 2023). Our video can be found at https://youtu.be/ZZHfD-8OpBg
comments: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (and IROS 2023). Our video can be found at https://youtu.be/ZZHfD-8OpBg
abstract: For the safe and successful navigation of autonomous vehicles in unstructured environments, the traversability of terrain should vary based on the driving capabilities of the vehicles. Actual driving experience can be utilized in a self-supervised fashion to learn vehicle-specific traversability. However, existing methods for learning self-supervised traversability are not highly scalable for learning the traversability of various vehicles. In this work, we introduce a scalable framework for learning self-supervised traversability, which can learn the traversability directly from vehicle-terrain interaction without any human supervision. We train a neural network that predicts the proprioceptive experience that a vehicle would undergo from 3D point clouds. Using a novel PU learning method, the network simultaneously identifies non-traversable regions where estimations can be overconfident. With driving data of various vehicles gathered from simulation and the real world, we show that our framework is capable of learning the self-supervised traversability of various vehicles. By integrating our framework with a model predictive controller, we demonstrate that estimated traversability results in effective navigation that enables distinct maneuvers based on the driving characteristics of the vehicles. In addition, experimental results validate the ability of our method to identify and avoid non-traversable regions.
summary: For the safe and successful navigation of autonomous vehicles in unstructured environments, the traversability of terrain should vary based on the driving capabilities of the vehicles. Actual driving experience can be utilized in a self-supervised fashion to learn vehicle-specific traversability. However, existing methods for learning self-supervised traversability are not highly scalable for learning the traversability of various vehicles. In this work, we introduce a scalable framework for learning self-supervised traversability, which can learn the traversability directly from vehicle-terrain interaction without any human supervision. We train a neural network that predicts the proprioceptive experience that a vehicle would undergo from 3D point clouds. Using a novel PU learning method, the network simultaneously identifies non-traversable regions where estimations can be overconfident. With driving data of various vehicles gathered from simulation and the real world, we show that our framework is capable of learning the self-supervised traversability of various vehicles. By integrating our framework with a model predictive controller, we demonstrate that estimated traversability results in effective navigation that enables distinct maneuvers based on the driving characteristics of the vehicles. In addition, experimental results validate the ability of our method to identify and avoid non-traversable regions.
abstract_zh: 为了让自动驾驶车辆在非结构化环境中安全、成功地导航，地形的可穿越性应根据车辆的驾驶能力而变化。可以以自我监督的方式利用实际驾驶经验来学习特定于车辆的可通过性。然而，现有的学习自监督可通行性的方法对于学习各种车辆的可通行性来说可扩展性不高。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个用于学习自监督可穿越性的可扩展框架，它可以直接从车辆与地形的交互中学习可穿越性，而无需任何人类监督。我们训练一个神经网络，通过 3D 点云预测车辆将经历的本体感受体验。使用新颖的 PU 学习方法，网络同时识别估计可能过于自信的不可遍历区域。通过从模拟和现实世界收集的各种车辆的驾驶数据，我们表明我们的框架能够学习各种车辆的自我监督可通过性。通过将我们的框架与模型预测控制器集成，我们证明了估计的可通行性会导致有效的导航，从而根据车辆的驾驶特性实现不同的操纵。此外，实验结果验证了我们的方法识别和避开不可穿越区域的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的自监督框架ScaTE，用于在非结构化环境中学习车辆特定的可通行性估计，无需人工标注数据。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督可通行性学习方法难以适应多种车辆的特性，且缺乏对非可通行区域的过自信估计识别能力，限制了自动驾驶在复杂地形中的安全导航。
AI.method: 通过神经网络从3D点云中预测车辆本体感知体验，并结合PU学习方法同时识别非可通行区域。利用仿真与真实世界多车辆数据进行训练，集成模型预测控制器实现导航。
AI.result: 框架成功学习了多种车辆的自监督可通行性，实验验证其能有效识别并规避非可通行区域，提升基于车辆特性的自主导航能力。
AI.conclusion: ScaTE为自动驾驶提供了可扩展的自监督解决方案，通过车辆-地形交互直接学习可通行性，增强了复杂环境下的导航安全性与适应性。

authors_text: Andrea Cini,Ivan Marisca,Filippo Maria Bianchi,Cesare Alippi
title: Scalable Spatiotemporal Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 可扩展的时空图神经网络
comment: Published as conference paper at AAAI 23
comments: Published as conference paper at AAAI 23
abstract: Neural forecasting of spatiotemporal time series drives both research and industrial innovation in several relevant application domains. Graph neural networks (GNNs) are often the core component of the forecasting architecture. However, in most spatiotemporal GNNs, the computational complexity scales up to a quadratic factor with the length of the sequence times the number of links in the graph, hence hindering the application of these models to large graphs and long temporal sequences. While methods to improve scalability have been proposed in the context of static graphs, few research efforts have been devoted to the spatiotemporal case. To fill this gap, we propose a scalable architecture that exploits an efficient encoding of both temporal and spatial dynamics. In particular, we use a randomized recurrent neural network to embed the history of the input time series into high-dimensional state representations encompassing multi-scale temporal dynamics. Such representations are then propagated along the spatial dimension using different powers of the graph adjacency matrix to generate node embeddings characterized by a rich pool of spatiotemporal features. The resulting node embeddings can be efficiently pre-computed in an unsupervised manner, before being fed to a feed-forward decoder that learns to map the multi-scale spatiotemporal representations to predictions. The training procedure can then be parallelized node-wise by sampling the node embeddings without breaking any dependency, thus enabling scalability to large networks. Empirical results on relevant datasets show that our approach achieves results competitive with the state of the art, while dramatically reducing the computational burden.

Such representations are then propagated along the spatial dimension using different powers of the graph adjacency matrix to generate node embeddings characterized by a rich pool of spatiotemporal features. The resulting node embeddings can be efficiently pre-computed in an unsupervised manner, before being fed to a feed-forward decoder that learns to map the multi-scale spatiotemporal representations to predictions. The training procedure can then be parallelized node-wise by sampling the node embeddings without breaking any dependency, thus enabling scalability to large networks. Empirical results on relevant datasets show that our approach achieves results competitive with the state of the art, while dramatically reducing the computational burden.
abstract_zh: 时空时间序列的神经预测推动了多个相关应用领域的研究和工业创新。图神经网络（GNN）通常是预测架构的核心组件。然而，在大多数时空 GNN 中，计算复杂度随着序列长度乘以图中的链接数量而增加到二次因子，因此阻碍了这些模型在大型图和长时间序列中的应用。虽然在静态图的背景下提出了提高可扩展性的方法，但很少有研究工作致力于时空情况。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一种可扩展的架构，它利用了时间和空间动态的有效编码。特别是，我们使用随机循环神经网络将输入时间序列的历史嵌入到包含多尺度时间动态的高维状态表示中。然后，使用图邻接矩阵的不同幂沿空间维度传播此类表示，以生成以丰富的时空特征池为特征的节点嵌入。所得到的节点嵌入可以以无监督的方式有效地预先计算，然后被馈送到前馈解码器，该解码器学习将多尺度时空表示映射到预测。然后，可以通过对节点嵌入进行采样来按节点并行化训练过程，而不破坏任何依赖性，从而实现大型网络的可扩展性。相关数据集的实证结果表明，我们的方法取得了与现有技术相媲美的结果，同时大大减少了计算负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的时空图神经网络架构，用于高效预测时空时间序列。
AI.motivation: 现有时空图神经网络在处理大规模图和长序列时计算复杂度呈二次增长，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 采用随机循环神经网络编码多尺度时序动态，并通过图邻接矩阵的不同幂次传播空间特征，生成高效预计算的节点嵌入。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到与最先进方法相当的预测效果，同时显著降低计算负担。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦时空特征学习与预测过程，有效解决了大规模时空建模的可扩展性难题。

search_text: Scalable Spatiotemporal Graph Neural Networks 可扩展的时空图神经网络 Neural forecasting of spatiotemporal time series drives both research and industrial innovation in several relevant application domains. Graph neural networks (GNNs) are often the core component of the forecasting architecture. However, in most spatiotemporal GNNs, the computational complexity scales up to a quadratic factor with the length of the sequence times the number of links in the graph, hence hindering the application of these models to large graphs and long temporal sequences. While methods to improve scalability have been proposed in the context of static graphs, few research efforts have been devoted to the spatiotemporal case. To fill this gap, we propose a scalable architecture that exploits an efficient encoding of both temporal and spatial dynamics. In particular, we use a randomized recurrent neural network to embed the history of the input time series into high-dimensional state representations encompassing multi-scale temporal dynamics. Such representations are then propagated along the spatial dimension using different powers of the graph adjacency matrix to generate node embeddings characterized by a rich pool of spatiotemporal features. The resulting node embeddings can be efficiently pre-computed in an unsupervised manner, before being fed to a feed-forward decoder that learns to map the multi-scale spatiotemporal representations to predictions. The training procedure can then be parallelized node-wise by sampling the node embeddings without breaking any dependency, thus enabling scalability to large networks. Empirical results on relevant datasets show that our approach achieves results competitive with the state of the art, while dramatically reducing the computational burden. 时空时间序列的神经预测推动了多个相关应用领域的研究和工业创新。图神经网络（GNN）通常是预测架构的核心组件。然而，在大多数时空 GNN 中，计算复杂度随着序列长度乘以图中的链接数量而增加到二次因子，因此阻碍了这些模型在大型图和长时间序列中的应用。虽然在静态图的背景下提出了提高可扩展性的方法，但很少有研究工作致力于时空情况。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一种可扩展的架构，它利用了时间和空间动态的有效编码。特别是，我们使用随机循环神经网络将输入时间序列的历史嵌入到包含多尺度时间动态的高维状态表示中。然后，使用图邻接矩阵的不同幂沿空间维度传播此类表示，以生成以丰富的时空特征池为特征的节点嵌入。所得到的节点嵌入可以以无监督的方式有效地预先计算，然后被馈送到前馈解码器，该解码器学习将多尺度时空表示映射到预测。然后，可以通过对节点嵌入进行采样来按节点并行化训练过程，而不破坏任何依赖性，从而实现大型网络的可扩展性。相关数据集的实证结果表明，我们的方法取得了与现有技术相媲美的结果，同时大大减少了计算负担。 本文提出一种可扩展的时空图神经网络架构，用于高效预测时空时间序列。 Andrea Cini,Ivan Marisca,Filippo Maria Bianchi,Cesare Alippi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiqiang Yuan,Wenkai Zhang,Chongyang Li,Zhaoying Pan,Yongqiang Mao,Jialiang Chen,Shouke Li,Hongqi Wang,Xian Sun
title: Learning to Evaluate Performance of Multi-modal Semantic Localization
title_zh: 学习评估多模态语义定位的性能
abstract: Semantic localization (SeLo) refers to the task of obtaining the most relevant locations in large-scale remote sensing (RS) images using semantic information such as text. As an emerging task based on cross-modal retrieval, SeLo achieves semantic-level retrieval with only caption-level annotation, which demonstrates its great potential in unifying downstream tasks. Although SeLo has been carried out successively, but there is currently no work has systematically explores and analyzes this urgent direction. In this paper, we thoroughly study this field and provide a complete benchmark in terms of metrics and testdata to advance the SeLo task. Firstly, based on the characteristics of this task, we propose multiple discriminative evaluation metrics to quantify the performance of the SeLo task. The devised significant area proportion, attention shift distance, and discrete attention distance are utilized to evaluate the generated SeLo map from pixel-level and region-level. Next, to provide standard evaluation data for the SeLo task, we contribute a diverse, multi-semantic, multi-objective Semantic Localization Testset (AIR-SLT). AIR-SLT consists of 22 large-scale RS images and 59 test cases with different semantics, which aims to provide a comprehensive evaluations for retrieval models. Finally, we analyze the SeLo performance of RS cross-modal retrieval models in detail, explore the impact of different variables on this task, and provide a complete benchmark for the SeLo task. We have also established a new paradigm for RS referring expression comprehension, and demonstrated the great advantage of SeLo in semantics through combining it with tasks such as detection and road extraction. The proposed evaluation metrics, semantic localization testsets, and corresponding scripts have been open to access at github.com/xiaoyuan1996/SemanticLocalizationMetrics .

As an emerging task based on cross-modal retrieval, SeLo achieves semantic-level retrieval with only caption-level annotation, which demonstrates its great potential in unifying downstream tasks. Although SeLo has been carried out successively, but there is currently no work has systematically explores and analyzes this urgent direction. In this paper, we thoroughly study this field and provide a complete benchmark in terms of metrics and testdata to advance the SeLo task. Firstly, based on the characteristics of this task, we propose multiple discriminative evaluation metrics to quantify the performance of the SeLo task. The devised significant area proportion, attention shift distance, and discrete attention distance are utilized to evaluate the generated SeLo map from pixel-level and region-level. Next, to provide standard evaluation data for the SeLo task, we contribute a diverse, multi-semantic, multi-objective Semantic Localization Testset (AIR-SLT). AIR-SLT consists of 22 large-scale RS images and 59 test cases with different semantics, which aims to provide a comprehensive evaluations for retrieval models. Finally, we analyze the SeLo performance of RS cross-modal retrieval models in detail, explore the impact of different variables on this task, and provide a complete benchmark for the SeLo task. We have also established a new paradigm for RS referring expression comprehension, and demonstrated the great advantage of SeLo in semantics through combining it with tasks such as detection and road extraction. The proposed evaluation metrics, semantic localization testsets, and corresponding scripts have been open to access at github.com/xiaoyuan1996/SemanticLocalizationMetrics .
abstract_zh: 语义定位（SeLo）是指利用文本等语义信息获取大规模遥感（RS）图像中最相关的位置的任务。作为一种基于跨模态检索的新兴任务，SeLo 仅通过标题级注释即可实现语义级检索，这表明了其在统一下游任务方面的巨大潜力。虽然SeLo已经陆续开展，但目前还没有任何工作对这一迫切的方向进行系统的探索和分析。在本文中，我们深入研究了这一领域，并在指标和测试数据方面提供了完整的基准，以推进 SeLo 任务。首先，根据该任务的特点，我们提出了多种判别性评估指标来量化 SeLo 任务的性能。设计的显着面积比例、注意力转移距离和离散注意力距离用于从像素级和区域级评估生成的 SeLo 图。接下来，为了给 SeLo 任务提供标准的评估数据，我们贡献了一个多样化、多语义、多目标的语义定位测试集（AIR-SLT）。 AIR-SLT由22张大规模RS图像和59个不同语义的测试用例组成，旨在为检索模型提供全面的评估。最后，我们详细分析了RS跨模态检索模型的SeLo性能，探讨了不同变量对该任务的影响，并为SeLo任务提供了完整的基准。我们还建立了RS指代表达理解的新范式，并通过将其与检测和道路提取等任务相结合，展示了SeLo在语义上的巨大优势。所提出的评估指标、语义定位测试集和相应的脚本已在 github.com/xiaoyuan1996/SemanticLocalizationMetrics 上开放访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多组判别性评估指标及多语义测试集，以系统推进语义定位（SeLo）任务的性能评估。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对SeLo任务的系统性分析与标准化评估体系，阻碍了该方向的发展。
AI.method: 设计显著区域比例、注意力偏移距离等指标从像素级和区域级评估SeLo地图；构建包含22张遥感图像和59个测试案例的AIR-SLT数据集，并分析不同变量对任务的影响。
AI.result: 提出新型评估指标与基准数据集，建立遥感指代表达理解新范式，开源代码与工具。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建完整评估基准与多任务结合实验，验证了SeLo在语义层面的优越性，为跨模态检索提供了统一接口。

authors_text: Wenge Xu,Xuanru Meng,Kangyou Yu,Sayan Sacar,Hai-Ning Liang
title: Evaluation of Text Selection Techniques in Virtual Reality Head-Mounted Displays
title_zh: 虚拟现实头戴式显示器中文本选择技术的评估
comment: IEEE ISMAR'22 conference track; 10 pages; There was a mistake in Section 4.4.1 reagrding the symbol, it has been updated in this version
comments: IEEE ISMAR'22 conference track; 10 pages; There was a mistake in Section 4.4.1 reagrding the symbol, it has been updated in this version
abstract: Text selection is an essential activity in interactive systems, including virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs). It is useful for: sharing information across apps or platforms, highlighting and making notes while reading articles, and text editing tasks. Despite its usefulness, the space of text selection interaction is underexplored in VR HMDs. In this research, we performed a user study with 24 participants to investigate the performance and user preference of six text selection techniques (Controller+Dwell, Controller+Click, Head+Dwell, Head+Click, Hand+Dwell, Hand+Pinch). Results reveal that Head+Click is ranked first since it has excellent speed-accuracy performance (2nd fastest task completion speed with 3rd lowest total error rate), provides the best user experience, and produces a very low workload -- followed by Controller+Click, which has the fastest speed and comparable experience with Head+Click, but much higher total error rate. Other methods can also be useful depending on the goals of the system or the users. As a first systematic evaluation of pointing*selection techniques for text selection in VR, the results of this work provide a strong foundation for further research in this area of growing importance to the future of VR to help it become a more ubiquitous and pervasive platform.

It is useful for: sharing information across apps or platforms, highlighting and making notes while reading articles, and text editing tasks. Despite its usefulness, the space of text selection interaction is underexplored in VR HMDs. In this research, we performed a user study with 24 participants to investigate the performance and user preference of six text selection techniques (Controller+Dwell, Controller+Click, Head+Dwell, Head+Click, Hand+Dwell, Hand+Pinch). Results reveal that Head+Click is ranked first since it has excellent speed-accuracy performance (2nd fastest task completion speed with 3rd lowest total error rate), provides the best user experience, and produces a very low workload -- followed by Controller+Click, which has the fastest speed and comparable experience with Head+Click, but much higher total error rate. Other methods can also be useful depending on the goals of the system or the users. As a first systematic evaluation of pointing*selection techniques for text selection in VR, the results of this work provide a strong foundation for further research in this area of growing importance to the future of VR to help it become a more ubiquitous and pervasive platform.
abstract_zh: 文本选择是交互式系统中的一项重要活动，包括虚拟现实 (VR) 头戴式显示器 (HMD)。它适用于：跨应用程序或平台共享信息、在阅读文章时突出显示并做笔记以及文本编辑任务。尽管文本选择交互很有用，但 VR HMD 中的文本选择交互空间尚未得到充分开发。在本研究中，我们对 24 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，以调查六种文本选择技术（控制器+停留、控制器+单击、头+停留、头+单击、手+停留、手+捏）的性能和用户偏好。结果显示，Head+Click 排名第一，因为它具有出色的速度准确度性能（第二快的任务完成速度和第三低的总错误率），提供了最佳的用户体验，并且产生的工作负载非常低；其次是 Controller+Click，它具有最快的速度和与 Head+Click 相当的体验，但总错误率要高得多。根据系统或用户的目标，其他方法也可能有用。作为对 VR 中文本选择的指向*选择技术的首次系统评估，这项工作的结果为这一领域的进一步研究奠定了坚实的基础，该领域对 VR 的未来越来越重要，有助于它成为一个更加普遍和普遍的平台。

AI.conclusion: 研究为VR文本选择交互设计提供了基础，未来需根据系统目标和用户需求选择合适技术。

search_text: Evaluation of Text Selection Techniques in Virtual Reality Head-Mounted Displays 虚拟现实头戴式显示器中文本选择技术的评估 Text selection is an essential activity in interactive systems, including virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs). It is useful for: sharing information across apps or platforms, highlighting and making notes while reading articles, and text editing tasks. Despite its usefulness, the space of text selection interaction is underexplored in VR HMDs. In this research, we performed a user study with 24 participants to investigate the performance and user preference of six text selection techniques (Controller+Dwell, Controller+Click, Head+Dwell, Head+Click, Hand+Dwell, Hand+Pinch). Results reveal that Head+Click is ranked first since it has excellent speed-accuracy performance (2nd fastest task completion speed with 3rd lowest total error rate), provides the best user experience, and produces a very low workload -- followed by Controller+Click, which has the fastest speed and comparable experience with Head+Click, but much higher total error rate. Other methods can also be useful depending on the goals of the system or the users. As a first systematic evaluation of pointing*selection techniques for text selection in VR, the results of this work provide a strong foundation for further research in this area of growing importance to the future of VR to help it become a more ubiquitous and pervasive platform. 文本选择是交互式系统中的一项重要活动，包括虚拟现实 (VR) 头戴式显示器 (HMD)。它适用于：跨应用程序或平台共享信息、在阅读文章时突出显示并做笔记以及文本编辑任务。尽管文本选择交互很有用，但 VR HMD 中的文本选择交互空间尚未得到充分开发。在本研究中，我们对 24 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，以调查六种文本选择技术（控制器+停留、控制器+单击、头+停留、头+单击、手+停留、手+捏）的性能和用户偏好。结果显示，Head+Click 排名第一，因为它具有出色的速度准确度性能（第二快的任务完成速度和第三低的总错误率），提供了最佳的用户体验，并且产生的工作负载非常低；其次是 Controller+Click，它具有最快的速度和与 Head+Click 相当的体验，但总错误率要高得多。根据系统或用户的目标，其他方法也可能有用。作为对 VR 中文本选择的指向*选择技术的首次系统评估，这项工作的结果为这一领域的进一步研究奠定了坚实的基础，该领域对 VR 的未来越来越重要，有助于它成为一个更加普遍和普遍的平台。 本文评估了虚拟现实头戴显示器中六种文本选择技术的性能和用户偏好。 Wenge Xu,Xuanru Meng,Kangyou Yu,Sayan Sacar,Hai-Ning Liang cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Yu Zhang,Ziya Zhou,Xiaobing Li,Feng Yu,Maosong Sun
title: CCOM-HuQin: an Annotated Multimodal Chinese Fiddle Performance Dataset
title_zh: CCOM-HuQin：带注释的多模态中国小提琴演奏数据集
abstract: HuQin is a family of traditional Chinese bowed string instruments. Playing techniques(PTs) embodied in various playing styles add abundant emotional coloring and aesthetic feelings to HuQin performance. The complex applied techniques make HuQin music a challenging source for fundamental MIR tasks such as pitch analysis, transcription and score-audio alignment. In this paper, we present a multimodal performance dataset of HuQin music that contains audio-visual recordings of 11,992 single PT clips and 57 annotated musical pieces of classical excerpts. We systematically describe the HuQin PT taxonomy based on musicological theory and practical use cases. Then we introduce the dataset creation methodology and highlight the annotation principles featuring PTs. We analyze the statistics in different aspects to demonstrate the variety of PTs played in HuQin subcategories and perform preliminary experiments to show the potential applications of the dataset in various MIR tasks and cross-cultural music studies. Finally, we propose future work to be extended on the dataset.
summary: HuQin is a family of traditional Chinese bowed string instruments. Playing techniques(PTs) embodied in various playing styles add abundant emotional coloring and aesthetic feelings to HuQin performance. The complex applied techniques make HuQin music a challenging source for fundamental MIR tasks such as pitch analysis, transcription and score-audio alignment. In this paper, we present a multimodal performance dataset of HuQin music that contains audio-visual recordings of 11,992 single PT clips and 57 annotated musical pieces of classical excerpts. We systematically describe the HuQin PT taxonomy based on musicological theory and practical use cases. Then we introduce the dataset creation methodology and highlight the annotation principles featuring PTs. We analyze the statistics in different aspects to demonstrate the variety of PTs played in HuQin subcategories and perform preliminary experiments to show the potential applications of the dataset in various MIR tasks and cross-cultural music studies. Finally, we propose future work to be extended on the dataset.
abstract_zh: HuQin is a family of traditional Chinese bowed string instruments. Playing techniques(PTs) embodied in various playing styles add abundant emotional coloring and aesthetic feelings to HuQin performance.复杂的应用技术使胡琴音乐成为音高分析、转录和乐谱音频对齐等基本 MIR 任务的挑战性来源。在本文中，我们提出了一个胡琴音乐的多模态演奏数据集，其中包含 11,992 个单个 PT 片段的视听记录和 57 个带注释的古典音乐片段摘录。 We systematically describe the HuQin PT taxonomy based on musicological theory and practical use cases. Then we introduce the dataset creation methodology and highlight the annotation principles featuring PTs.我们分析了不同方面的统计数据，以展示胡琴子类别中演奏的 PT 的多样性，并进行初步实验以展示该数据集在各种 MIR 任务和跨文化音乐研究中的潜在应用。 Finally, we propose future work to be extended on the dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个注释的多模态中国传统拉弦乐器HuQin演奏数据集，并探讨其在音乐信息检索任务中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: HuQin演奏技巧复杂多样，现有研究缺乏系统标注的多模态数据集，制约了相关音乐信息检索任务的发展。
AI.method: 基于音乐学理论和实践案例建立演奏技巧分类体系，通过音频-视频录制收集11,992个单技巧片段和57个经典乐曲片段，并制定标注规范进行数据集构建。
AI.result: 统计分析显示不同HuQin乐器子类的技巧多样性，初步实验验证了数据集在音高分析、乐谱音频对齐等任务中的应用价值，并为跨文化音乐研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为HuQin演奏研究和音乐信息检索技术发展提供了重要资源，未来可扩展至更多乐器类型和跨文化对比研究。
