authors_text: Liumeng Xue,Frank K. Soong,Shaofei Zhang,Lei Xie
title: ParaTTS: Learning Linguistic and Prosodic Cross-sentence Information in Paragraph-based TTS
title_zh: ParaTTS：在基于段落的 TTS 中学习语言和韵律跨句信息
comment: Published in IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
comments: Published in IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
abstract: Recent advancements in neural end-to-end TTS models have shown high-quality, natural synthesized speech in a conventional sentence-based TTS. However, it is still challenging to reproduce similar high quality when a whole paragraph is considered in TTS, where a large amount of contextual information needs to be considered in building a paragraph-based TTS model. To alleviate the difficulty in training, we propose to model linguistic and prosodic information by considering cross-sentence, embedded structure in training. Three sub-modules, including linguistics-aware, prosody-aware and sentence-position networks, are trained together with a modified Tacotron2. Specifically, to learn the information embedded in a paragraph and the relations among the corresponding component sentences, we utilize linguistics-aware and prosody-aware networks. The information in a paragraph is captured by encoders and the inter-sentence information in a paragraph is learned with multi-head attention mechanisms. The relative sentence position in a paragraph is explicitly exploited by a sentence-position network. Trained on a storytelling audio-book corpus (4.08 hours), recorded by a female Mandarin Chinese speaker, the proposed TTS model demonstrates that it can produce rather natural and good-quality speech paragraph-wise. The cross-sentence contextual information, such as break and prosodic variations between consecutive sentences, can be better predicted and rendered than the sentence-based model. Tested on paragraph texts, of which the lengths are similar to, longer than, or much longer than the typical paragraph length of the training data, the TTS speech produced by the new model is consistently preferred over the sentence-based model in subjective tests and confirmed in objective measures.
summary: Recent advancements in neural end-to-end TTS models have shown high-quality, natural synthesized speech in a conventional sentence-based TTS. However, it is still challenging to reproduce similar high quality when a whole paragraph is considered in TTS, where a large amount of contextual information needs to be considered in building a paragraph-based TTS model. To alleviate the difficulty in training, we propose to model linguistic and prosodic information by considering cross-sentence, embedded structure in training. Three sub-modules, including linguistics-aware, prosody-aware and sentence-position networks, are trained together with a modified Tacotron2. Specifically, to learn the information embedded in a paragraph and the relations among the corresponding component sentences, we utilize linguistics-aware and prosody-aware networks. The information in a paragraph is captured by encoders and the inter-sentence information in a paragraph is learned with multi-head attention mechanisms. The relative sentence position in a paragraph is explicitly exploited by a sentence-position network. Trained on a storytelling audio-book corpus (4.08 hours), recorded by a female Mandarin Chinese speaker, the proposed TTS model demonstrates that it can produce rather natural and good-quality speech paragraph-wise. The cross-sentence contextual information, such as break and prosodic variations between consecutive sentences, can be better predicted and rendered than the sentence-based model. Tested on paragraph texts, of which the lengths are similar to, longer than, or much longer than the typical paragraph length of the training data, the TTS speech produced by the new model is consistently preferred over the sentence-based model in subjective tests and confirmed in objective measures.
abstract_zh: 神经端到端 TTS 模型的最新进展在传统的基于句子的 TTS 中展示了高质量、自然的合成语音。然而，当在 TTS 中考虑整个段落时，再现类似的高质量仍然具有挑战性，在构建基于段落的 TTS 模型时需要考虑大量上下文信息。为了减轻训练的难度，我们建议通过在训练中考虑跨句子、嵌入结构来对语言和韵律信息进行建模。三个子模块，包括语言学感知、韵律感知和句子位置网络，与修改后的 Tacotron2 一起训练。具体来说，为了学习段落中嵌入的信息以及相应组成句子之间的关系，我们利用语言学感知和韵律感知网络。段落中的信息由编码器捕获，段落中的句子间信息通过多头注意机制学习。段落中的相对句子位置由句子位置网络明确利用。所提出的 TTS 模型在由女性普通话使用者录制的讲故事有声读物语料库（4.08 小时）上进行训练，表明它可以按段落生成相当自然且高质量的语音。与基于句子的模型相比，可以更好地预测和渲染跨句子上下文信息，例如连续句子之间的中断和韵律变化。在长度与训练数据的典型段落长度相似、长于或远长的段落文本上进行测试，新模型生成的 TTS 语音在主观测试中始终优于基于句子的模型，并在客观测量中得到证实。

AI.tldr: 提出ParaTTS模型，解决段落级TTS中上下文信息建模难题
AI.motivation: 传统句子级TTS在处理段落时因需考虑大量上下文信息导致质量下降，需提升段落级语音合成效果
AI.method: 构建包含语言感知、韵律感知和句子位置网络的三模块体系，结合改进Tacotron2与多头注意力机制捕捉跨句关联
AI.result: 在4.08小时中文故事音频数据集上验证，段落级语音质量优于句子级模型，通过主观测试与客观指标验证
AI.conclusion: ParaTTS证实了跨句语义与韵律建模对提升段落级TTS质量的有效性

search_text: ParaTTS: Learning Linguistic and Prosodic Cross-sentence Information in Paragraph-based TTS ParaTTS：在基于段落的 TTS 中学习语言和韵律跨句信息 Recent advancements in neural end-to-end TTS models have shown high-quality, natural synthesized speech in a conventional sentence-based TTS. However, it is still challenging to reproduce similar high quality when a whole paragraph is considered in TTS, where a large amount of contextual information needs to be considered in building a paragraph-based TTS model. To alleviate the difficulty in training, we propose to model linguistic and prosodic information by considering cross-sentence, embedded structure in training. Three sub-modules, including linguistics-aware, prosody-aware and sentence-position networks, are trained together with a modified Tacotron2. Specifically, to learn the information embedded in a paragraph and the relations among the corresponding component sentences, we utilize linguistics-aware and prosody-aware networks. The information in a paragraph is captured by encoders and the inter-sentence information in a paragraph is learned with multi-head attention mechanisms. The relative sentence position in a paragraph is explicitly exploited by a sentence-position network. Trained on a storytelling audio-book corpus (4.08 hours), recorded by a female Mandarin Chinese speaker, the proposed TTS model demonstrates that it can produce rather natural and good-quality speech paragraph-wise. The cross-sentence contextual information, such as break and prosodic variations between consecutive sentences, can be better predicted and rendered than the sentence-based model. Tested on paragraph texts, of which the lengths are similar to, longer than, or much longer than the typical paragraph length of the training data, the TTS speech produced by the new model is consistently preferred over the sentence-based model in subjective tests and confirmed in objective measures. 神经端到端 TTS 模型的最新进展在传统的基于句子的 TTS 中展示了高质量、自然的合成语音。然而，当在 TTS 中考虑整个段落时，再现类似的高质量仍然具有挑战性，在构建基于段落的 TTS 模型时需要考虑大量上下文信息。为了减轻训练的难度，我们建议通过在训练中考虑跨句子、嵌入结构来对语言和韵律信息进行建模。三个子模块，包括语言学感知、韵律感知和句子位置网络，与修改后的 Tacotron2 一起训练。具体来说，为了学习段落中嵌入的信息以及相应组成句子之间的关系，我们利用语言学感知和韵律感知网络。段落中的信息由编码器捕获，段落中的句子间信息通过多头注意机制学习。段落中的相对句子位置由句子位置网络明确利用。所提出的 TTS 模型在由女性普通话使用者录制的讲故事有声读物语料库（4.08 小时）上进行训练，表明它可以按段落生成相当自然且高质量的语音。与基于句子的模型相比，可以更好地预测和渲染跨句子上下文信息，例如连续句子之间的中断和韵律变化。在长度与训练数据的典型段落长度相似、长于或远长的段落文本上进行测试，新模型生成的 TTS 语音在主观测试中始终优于基于句子的模型，并在客观测量中得到证实。 提出ParaTTS模型，解决段落级TTS中上下文信息建模难题 Liumeng Xue,Frank K. Soong,Shaofei Zhang,Lei Xie cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuqiang Xie,Yue Hu,Wei Peng,Guanqun Bi,Luxi Xing
title: COMMA: Modeling Relationship among Motivations, Emotions and Actions in Language-based Human Activities
title_zh: COMMA：基于语言的人类活动中动机、情感和行动之间关系的建模
abstract: Motivations, emotions, and actions are inter-related essential factors in human activities. While motivations and emotions have long been considered at the core of exploring how people take actions in human activities, there has been relatively little research supporting analyzing the relationship between human mental states and actions. We present the first study that investigates the viability of modeling motivations, emotions, and actions in language-based human activities, named COMMA (Cognitive Framework of Human Activities). Guided by COMMA, we define three natural language processing tasks (emotion understanding, motivation understanding and conditioned action generation), and build a challenging dataset Hail through automatically extracting samples from Story Commonsense. Experimental results on NLP applications prove the effectiveness of modeling the relationship. Furthermore, our models inspired by COMMA can better reveal the essential relationship among motivations, emotions and actions than existing methods.
summary: Motivations, emotions, and actions are inter-related essential factors in human activities. While motivations and emotions have long been considered at the core of exploring how people take actions in human activities, there has been relatively little research supporting analyzing the relationship between human mental states and actions. We present the first study that investigates the viability of modeling motivations, emotions, and actions in language-based human activities, named COMMA (Cognitive Framework of Human Activities). Guided by COMMA, we define three natural language processing tasks (emotion understanding, motivation understanding and conditioned action generation), and build a challenging dataset Hail through automatically extracting samples from Story Commonsense. Experimental results on NLP applications prove the effectiveness of modeling the relationship. Furthermore, our models inspired by COMMA can better reveal the essential relationship among motivations, emotions and actions than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 动机、情感和行动是人类活动中相互关联的基本因素。虽然动机和情感长期以来被认为是探索人们如何在人类活动中采取行动的核心，但支持分析人类心理状态和行动之间关系的研究相对较少。我们提出了第一项研究，该研究调查了基于语言的人类活动中动机、情感和行为建模的可行性，名为 COMMA（人类活动认知框架）。在 COMMA 的指导下，我们定义了三个自然语言处理任务（情感理解、动机理解和条件动作生成），并通过自动从 Story Commonsense 中提取样本来构建具有挑战性的数据集 Hail。 NLP应用的实验结果证明了关系建模的有效性。此外，我们受 COMMA 启发的模型比现有方法能够更好地揭示动机、情绪和行为之间的本质关系。

AI.tldr: 提出COMMA框架以建模语言驱动的人类活动中动机、情绪与行动的关系
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对人类心理状态（动机、情绪）与行动关系的系统建模，需探索其相互作用机制
AI.method: 基于COMMA框架定义情绪理解、动机理解和条件行动生成任务，构建Hail数据集进行实验验证
AI.result: 实验验证了COMMA在建模三者关系上的有效性，且模型表现优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: COMMA框架有效揭示了动机、情绪与行动的内在联系，为语言驱动的人类活动分析提供新方法

authors_text: Soumava Kumar Roy,Yan Han,Mehrtash Harandi,Lars Petersson
title: Learning Deep Optimal Embeddings with Sinkhorn Divergences
title_zh: 使用 Sinkhorn 散度学习深度最优嵌入
abstract: Deep Metric Learning algorithms aim to learn an efficient embedding space to preserve the similarity relationships among the input data. Whilst these algorithms have achieved significant performance gains across a wide plethora of tasks, they have also failed to consider and increase comprehensive similarity constraints; thus learning a sub-optimal metric in the embedding space. Moreover, up until now; there have been few studies with respect to their performance in the presence of noisy labels. Here, we address the concern of learning a discriminative deep embedding space by designing a novel, yet effective Deep Class-wise Discrepancy Loss (DCDL) function that segregates the underlying similarity distributions (thus introducing class-wise discrepancy) of the embedding points between each and every class. Our empirical results across three standard image classification datasets and two fine-grained image recognition datasets in the presence and absence of noise clearly demonstrate the need for incorporating such class-wise similarity relationships along with traditional algorithms while learning a discriminative embedding space.
summary: Deep Metric Learning algorithms aim to learn an efficient embedding space to preserve the similarity relationships among the input data. Whilst these algorithms have achieved significant performance gains across a wide plethora of tasks, they have also failed to consider and increase comprehensive similarity constraints; thus learning a sub-optimal metric in the embedding space. Moreover, up until now; there have been few studies with respect to their performance in the presence of noisy labels. Here, we address the concern of learning a discriminative deep embedding space by designing a novel, yet effective Deep Class-wise Discrepancy Loss (DCDL) function that segregates the underlying similarity distributions (thus introducing class-wise discrepancy) of the embedding points between each and every class. Our empirical results across three standard image classification datasets and two fine-grained image recognition datasets in the presence and absence of noise clearly demonstrate the need for incorporating such class-wise similarity relationships along with traditional algorithms while learning a discriminative embedding space.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习算法旨在学习有效的嵌入空间以保留输入数据之间的相似关系。虽然这些算法在大量任务中取得了显着的性能提升，但它们也未能考虑和增加全面的相似性约束；从而学习嵌入空间中的次优度量。而且，到目前为止；关于它们在存在噪声标签的情况下的表现的研究很少。在这里，我们通过设计一种新颖但有效的深度类间差异损失（DCDL）函数来解决学习判别性深度嵌入空间的问题，该函数分离每个类之间嵌入点的潜在相似性分布（从而引入类间差异）。我们在存在和不存在噪声的情况下在三个标准图像分类数据集和两个细粒度图像识别数据集上的实证结果清楚地表明，在学习判别性嵌入空间时需要将这种类相似性关系与传统算法结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的深度类间差异损失函数（DCDL），用于学习更具判别性的嵌入空间以优化相似性关系。
AI.motivation: 现有深度度量学习算法未能充分考虑全面相似性约束，且在噪声标签场景下研究不足，导致嵌入空间度量子优。
AI.method: 设计Deep Class-wise Discrepancy Loss（DCDL）函数，通过分割类间相似分布引入类间差异约束，并结合传统算法学习嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在三个标准图像分类数据集和两个细粒度数据集的实验中，DCDL在有无噪声标签情况下均显著提升性能，验证了类间相似性约束的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 学习判别性嵌入空间需结合传统算法与类间相似性约束，DCDL能有效应对噪声标签问题并提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Fiona Victoria Stanley Jothiraj,Afra Mashhadi
title: Personalized Emotion Detection using IoT and Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用物联网和机器学习的个性化情绪检测
abstract: The Medical Internet of Things, a recent technological advancement in medicine, is incredibly helpful in providing real-time monitoring of health metrics. This paper presents a non-invasive IoT system that tracks patients' emotions, especially those with autism spectrum disorder. With a few affordable sensors and cloud computing services, the individual's heart rates are monitored and analyzed to study the effects of changes in sweat and heartbeats per minute for different emotions. Under normal resting conditions of the individual, the proposed system could detect the right emotion using machine learning algorithms with a performance of up to 92% accuracy. The result of the proposed approach is comparable with the state-of-the-art solutions in medical IoT.
summary: The Medical Internet of Things, a recent technological advancement in medicine, is incredibly helpful in providing real-time monitoring of health metrics. This paper presents a non-invasive IoT system that tracks patients' emotions, especially those with autism spectrum disorder. With a few affordable sensors and cloud computing services, the individual's heart rates are monitored and analyzed to study the effects of changes in sweat and heartbeats per minute for different emotions. Under normal resting conditions of the individual, the proposed system could detect the right emotion using machine learning algorithms with a performance of up to 92% accuracy. The result of the proposed approach is comparable with the state-of-the-art solutions in medical IoT.
abstract_zh: 医疗物联网是医学领域的一项最新技术进步，对于提供健康指标的实时监控非常有帮助。本文提出了一种非侵入性物联网系统，可以跟踪患者的情绪，特别是患有自闭症谱系障碍的患者。通过一些价格实惠的传感器和云计算服务，可以监测和分析个人的心率，以研究不同情绪下每分钟出汗和心跳变化的影响。在个人正常休息的情况下，所提出的系统可以使用机器学习算法检测正确的情绪，准确率高达 92%。所提出方法的结果可与医疗物联网中最先进的解决方案相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物联网和机器学习的非侵入式情绪检测系统，专门用于自闭症谱系障碍患者的实时情绪监测。
AI.motivation: 医疗物联网技术的进步为实时健康监测提供了可能，但针对自闭症患者的情绪检测仍存在技术挑战，需开发低成本高精度的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过可负担的传感器采集心率和汗液数据，结合云计算和机器学习算法（如分类模型）进行情绪分析与识别。
AI.result: 在正常休息状态下，系统实现高达92%的情绪检测准确率，性能与现有医疗物联网解决方案相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了物联网与机器学习结合在个性化情绪检测中的有效性，为自闭症患者提供了可行的实时监测方案。

search_text: Personalized Emotion Detection using IoT and Machine Learning 使用物联网和机器学习的个性化情绪检测 The Medical Internet of Things, a recent technological advancement in medicine, is incredibly helpful in providing real-time monitoring of health metrics. This paper presents a non-invasive IoT system that tracks patients' emotions, especially those with autism spectrum disorder. With a few affordable sensors and cloud computing services, the individual's heart rates are monitored and analyzed to study the effects of changes in sweat and heartbeats per minute for different emotions. Under normal resting conditions of the individual, the proposed system could detect the right emotion using machine learning algorithms with a performance of up to 92% accuracy. The result of the proposed approach is comparable with the state-of-the-art solutions in medical IoT. 医疗物联网是医学领域的一项最新技术进步，对于提供健康指标的实时监控非常有帮助。本文提出了一种非侵入性物联网系统，可以跟踪患者的情绪，特别是患有自闭症谱系障碍的患者。通过一些价格实惠的传感器和云计算服务，可以监测和分析个人的心率，以研究不同情绪下每分钟出汗和心跳变化的影响。在个人正常休息的情况下，所提出的系统可以使用机器学习算法检测正确的情绪，准确率高达 92%。所提出方法的结果可与医疗物联网中最先进的解决方案相媲美。 本文提出了一种基于物联网和机器学习的非侵入式情绪检测系统，专门用于自闭症谱系障碍患者的实时情绪监测。 Fiona Victoria Stanley Jothiraj,Afra Mashhadi cs.LG,cs.CY,cs.HC,eess.SP

authors_text: Ana Ozaki,Anum Rehman,Philip Turk,Marija Slavkovik
title: Finding Common Ground for Incoherent Horn Expressions
title_zh: 寻找不连贯的号角表达的共同点
abstract: Autonomous systems that operate in a shared environment with people need to be able to follow the rules of the society they occupy. While laws are unique for one society, different people and institutions may use different rules to guide their conduct. We study the problem of reaching a common ground among possibly incoherent rules of conduct. We formally define a notion of common ground and discuss the main properties of this notion. Then, we identify three sufficient conditions on the class of Horn expressions for which common grounds are guaranteed to exist. We provide a polynomial time algorithm that computes common grounds, under these conditions. We also show that if any of the three conditions is removed then common grounds for the resulting (larger) class may not exist.
summary: Autonomous systems that operate in a shared environment with people need to be able to follow the rules of the society they occupy. While laws are unique for one society, different people and institutions may use different rules to guide their conduct. We study the problem of reaching a common ground among possibly incoherent rules of conduct. We formally define a notion of common ground and discuss the main properties of this notion. Then, we identify three sufficient conditions on the class of Horn expressions for which common grounds are guaranteed to exist. We provide a polynomial time algorithm that computes common grounds, under these conditions. We also show that if any of the three conditions is removed then common grounds for the resulting (larger) class may not exist.
abstract_zh: 在与人们共享的环境中运行的自治系统需要能够遵循其所在社会的规则。虽然法律对于一个社会来说是独一无二的，但不同的人和机构可能会使用不同的规则来指导他们的行为。我们研究在可能不一致的行为规则中达成共识的问题。我们正式定义共同点的概念并讨论该概念的主要属性。然后，我们确定了 Horn 表达式类的三个充分条件，保证存在共同点。我们提供了一种多项式时间算法，可以在这些条件下计算共同点。我们还表明，如果删除这三个条件中的任何一个，那么所得（更大）类别的共同点可能不存在。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在可能不一致的行为规则中找到共同基础，特别是针对Horn表达式类的规则体系。
AI.motivation: 自主系统需适应人类社会的多样化规则，但不同规则可能存在冲突，需建立统一的协调机制以确保系统合规性。
AI.method: 形式化定义'共同基础'概念，提出三个Horn表达式的充分条件，并设计多项式时间算法计算共同基础。
AI.result: 在满足三个条件时，算法可保证计算出共同基础；若任一条件被移除，该类规则可能不存在共同基础。
AI.conclusion: 三个条件共同构成Horn表达式类存在共同基础的理论边界，为自主系统规则协调提供可计算的解决方案。

authors_text: Fabricio Olivetti de Franca,Gabriel Kronberger
title: Prediction Intervals and Confidence Regions for Symbolic Regression Models based on Likelihood Profiles
title_zh: 基于似然分布的符号回归模型的预测区间和置信区域
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, 3 algorithms. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, 3 algorithms. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation
abstract: Symbolic regression is a nonlinear regression method which is commonly performed by an evolutionary computation method such as genetic programming. Quantification of uncertainty of regression models is important for the interpretation of models and for decision making. The linear approximation and so-called likelihood profiles are well-known possibilities for the calculation of confidence and prediction intervals for nonlinear regression models. These simple and effective techniques have been completely ignored so far in the genetic programming literature. In this work we describe the calculation of likelihood profiles in details and also provide some illustrative examples with models created with three different symbolic regression algorithms on two different datasets. The examples highlight the importance of the likelihood profiles to understand the limitations of symbolic regression models and to help the user taking an informed post-prediction decision.
summary: Symbolic regression is a nonlinear regression method which is commonly performed by an evolutionary computation method such as genetic programming. Quantification of uncertainty of regression models is important for the interpretation of models and for decision making. The linear approximation and so-called likelihood profiles are well-known possibilities for the calculation of confidence and prediction intervals for nonlinear regression models. These simple and effective techniques have been completely ignored so far in the genetic programming literature. In this work we describe the calculation of likelihood profiles in details and also provide some illustrative examples with models created with three different symbolic regression algorithms on two different datasets. The examples highlight the importance of the likelihood profiles to understand the limitations of symbolic regression models and to help the user taking an informed post-prediction decision.
abstract_zh: 符号回归是一种非线性回归方法，通常通过遗传规划等进化计算方法来执行。回归模型不确定性的量化对于模型的解释和决策制定非常重要。线性近似和所谓的似然分布是众所周知的计算非线性回归模型的置信度和预测区间的可能性。迄今为止，这些简单而有效的技术在遗传编程文献中已被完全忽视。在这项工作中，我们详细描述了似然分布的计算，并提供了一些说明性示例，其中包含在两个不同数据集上使用三种不同符号回归算法创建的模型。这些示例强调了似然分布对于理解符号回归模型的局限性并帮助用户做出明智的预测后决策的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于似然轮廓的方法计算符号回归模型的预测区间和置信区域，并通过实例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 符号回归模型的不确定性量化对模型解释和决策至关重要，但现有遗传编程文献中缺乏有效方法。
AI.method: 详细阐述似然轮廓计算原理，采用三种符号回归算法在两个数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明似然轮廓能有效揭示模型局限性，辅助用户进行预测后决策。
AI.conclusion: 似然轮廓为符号回归提供了可靠的不确定性分析框架，应被纳入模型评估标准。

authors_text: Luigy Machaca,F. Oliver Sumari H,Jose Huaman,Esteban Clua,Joris Guerin
title: TrADe Re-ID -- Live Person Re-Identification using Tracking and Anomaly Detection
title_zh: TrADe Re-ID——使用跟踪和异常检测进行活人重新识别
abstract: Person Re-Identification (Re-ID) aims to search for a person of interest (query) in a network of cameras. In the classic Re-ID setting the query is sought in a gallery containing properly cropped images of entire bodies. Recently, the live Re-ID setting was introduced to represent the practical application context of Re-ID better. It consists in searching for the query in short videos, containing whole scene frames. The initial live Re-ID baseline used a pedestrian detector to build a large search gallery and a classic Re-ID model to find the query in the gallery. However, the galleries generated were too large and contained low-quality images, which decreased the live Re-ID performance. Here, we present a new live Re-ID approach called TrADe, to generate lower high-quality galleries. TrADe first uses a Tracking algorithm to identify sequences of images of the same individual in the gallery. Following, an Anomaly Detection model is used to select a single good representative of each tracklet. TrADe is validated on the live Re-ID version of the PRID-2011 dataset and shows significant improvements over the baseline.
summary: Person Re-Identification (Re-ID) aims to search for a person of interest (query) in a network of cameras. In the classic Re-ID setting the query is sought in a gallery containing properly cropped images of entire bodies. Recently, the live Re-ID setting was introduced to represent the practical application context of Re-ID better. It consists in searching for the query in short videos, containing whole scene frames. The initial live Re-ID baseline used a pedestrian detector to build a large search gallery and a classic Re-ID model to find the query in the gallery. However, the galleries generated were too large and contained low-quality images, which decreased the live Re-ID performance. Here, we present a new live Re-ID approach called TrADe, to generate lower high-quality galleries. TrADe first uses a Tracking algorithm to identify sequences of images of the same individual in the gallery. Following, an Anomaly Detection model is used to select a single good representative of each tracklet. TrADe is validated on the live Re-ID version of the PRID-2011 dataset and shows significant improvements over the baseline.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别（Re-ID）旨在在摄像机网络中搜索感兴趣的人（查询）。在经典的 Re-ID 设置中，查询是在包含正确裁剪的整个身体图像的图库中查找的。最近，引入了实时Re-ID设置，以更好地代表Re-ID的实际应用场景。它包括在包含整个场景帧的短视频中搜索查询。最初的实时 Re-ID 基线使用行人检测器来构建大型搜索库和经典的 Re-ID 模型来在库中查找查询。然而，生成的图库太大并且包含低质量图像，这降低了实时 Re-ID 性能。在这里，我们提出了一种称为 TrADe 的新实时 Re-ID 方法，用于生成较低质量的画廊。 TrADe 首先使用跟踪算法来识别图库中同一个人的图像序列。接下来，使用异常检测模型来选择每个轨迹的单个良好代表。 TrADe 在 PRID-2011 数据集的实时 Re-ID 版本上进行了验证，并显示出相对于基线的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TrADe的新型实时人员重识别方法，通过跟踪和异常检测技术生成更高质量的图像库以提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统实时重识别方法生成的图像库体积过大且包含大量低质量图像，导致检索准确率下降。本文旨在通过优化图像库质量来提升实时重识别效果。
AI.method: 首先使用跟踪算法识别图像库中同一目标的连续帧序列，再通过异常检测模型从每个跟踪序列中筛选出最具代表性的高质量图像作为候选。
AI.result: 在PRID-2011数据集的实时重识别任务中，TrADe方法相比基线模型实现了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合跟踪与异常检测技术，TrADe有效减少了图像库规模并提升了图像质量，为实时人员重识别提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: TrADe Re-ID -- Live Person Re-Identification using Tracking and Anomaly Detection TrADe Re-ID——使用跟踪和异常检测进行活人重新识别 Person Re-Identification (Re-ID) aims to search for a person of interest (query) in a network of cameras. In the classic Re-ID setting the query is sought in a gallery containing properly cropped images of entire bodies. Recently, the live Re-ID setting was introduced to represent the practical application context of Re-ID better. It consists in searching for the query in short videos, containing whole scene frames. The initial live Re-ID baseline used a pedestrian detector to build a large search gallery and a classic Re-ID model to find the query in the gallery. However, the galleries generated were too large and contained low-quality images, which decreased the live Re-ID performance. Here, we present a new live Re-ID approach called TrADe, to generate lower high-quality galleries. TrADe first uses a Tracking algorithm to identify sequences of images of the same individual in the gallery. Following, an Anomaly Detection model is used to select a single good representative of each tracklet. TrADe is validated on the live Re-ID version of the PRID-2011 dataset and shows significant improvements over the baseline. 人员重新识别（Re-ID）旨在在摄像机网络中搜索感兴趣的人（查询）。在经典的 Re-ID 设置中，查询是在包含正确裁剪的整个身体图像的图库中查找的。最近，引入了实时Re-ID设置，以更好地代表Re-ID的实际应用场景。它包括在包含整个场景帧的短视频中搜索查询。最初的实时 Re-ID 基线使用行人检测器来构建大型搜索库和经典的 Re-ID 模型来在库中查找查询。然而，生成的图库太大并且包含低质量图像，这降低了实时 Re-ID 性能。在这里，我们提出了一种称为 TrADe 的新实时 Re-ID 方法，用于生成较低质量的画廊。 TrADe 首先使用跟踪算法来识别图库中同一个人的图像序列。接下来，使用异常检测模型来选择每个轨迹的单个良好代表。 TrADe 在 PRID-2011 数据集的实时 Re-ID 版本上进行了验证，并显示出相对于基线的显着改进。 本文提出了一种名为TrADe的新型实时人员重识别方法，通过跟踪和异常检测技术生成更高质量的图像库以提升检索性能。 Luigy Machaca,F. Oliver Sumari H,Jose Huaman,Esteban Clua,Joris Guerin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Donald Ene Vincent Ike Anireh
title: Performance Evaluation of Parallel Algorithms
title_zh: 并行算法的性能评估
abstract: Evaluating how well a whole system or set of subsystems performs is one of the primary objectives of performance testing. We can tell via performance assessment if the architecture implementation meets the design objectives. Performance evaluations of several parallel algorithms are compared in this study. Both theoretical and experimental methods are used in performance assessment as a subdiscipline in computer science. The parallel method outperforms its sequential counterpart in terms of throughput. The parallel algorithm's performance (speedup) is examined, as shown in the result.
summary: Evaluating how well a whole system or set of subsystems performs is one of the primary objectives of performance testing. We can tell via performance assessment if the architecture implementation meets the design objectives. Performance evaluations of several parallel algorithms are compared in this study. Both theoretical and experimental methods are used in performance assessment as a subdiscipline in computer science. The parallel method outperforms its sequential counterpart in terms of throughput. The parallel algorithm's performance (speedup) is examined, as shown in the result.
abstract_zh: 评估整个系统或一组子系统的性能是性能测试的主要目标之一。我们可以通过性能评估来判断架构实现是否满足设计目标。本研究比较了几种并行算法的性能评估。作为计算机科学的一个分支学科，理论和实验方法都用于性能评估。并行方法在吞吐量方面优于串行方法。检查并行算法的性能（加速比），如结果所示。

AI.tldr: 评估多种并行算法的性能，比较其与顺序算法的优劣
AI.motivation: 确定并行算法是否满足设计目标，验证其性能优势
AI.method: 结合理论分析与实验测试，评估并行算法的吞吐量和加速比
AI.result: 并行算法在吞吐量上优于顺序算法，且实现了显著的加速比
AI.conclusion: 并行算法在性能上优于顺序算法，适用于需要高吞吐量的场景

authors_text: Yudai Watanabe,Makoto Okabe,Yasunori Harada,Naoji Kashima
title: Real-world Video Anomaly Detection by Extracting Salient Features in Videos
title_zh: 通过提取视频中的显着特征来检测真实世界的视频异常
comment: 10-page version of our IEEE ICIP 2022 paper
comments: 10-page version of our IEEE ICIP 2022 paper
abstract: We propose a lightweight and accurate method for detecting anomalies in videos. Existing methods used multiple-instance learning (MIL) to determine the normal/abnormal status of each segment of the video. Recent successful researches argue that it is important to learn the temporal relationships among segments to achieve high accuracy, instead of focusing on only a single segment. Therefore we analyzed the existing methods that have been successful in recent years, and found that while it is indeed important to learn all segments together, the temporal orders among them are irrelevant to achieving high accuracy. Based on this finding, we do not use the MIL framework, but instead propose a lightweight model with a self-attention mechanism to automatically extract features that are important for determining normal/abnormal from all input segments. As a result, our neural network model has 1.3\% of the number of parameters of the existing method. We evaluated the frame-level detection accuracy of our method on three benchmark datasets (UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech, and XD-Violence) and demonstrate that our method can achieve the comparable or better accuracy than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We propose a lightweight and accurate method for detecting anomalies in videos. Existing methods used multiple-instance learning (MIL) to determine the normal/abnormal status of each segment of the video. Recent successful researches argue that it is important to learn the temporal relationships among segments to achieve high accuracy, instead of focusing on only a single segment. Therefore we analyzed the existing methods that have been successful in recent years, and found that while it is indeed important to learn all segments together, the temporal orders among them are irrelevant to achieving high accuracy. Based on this finding, we do not use the MIL framework, but instead propose a lightweight model with a self-attention mechanism to automatically extract features that are important for determining normal/abnormal from all input segments. As a result, our neural network model has 1.3\% of the number of parameters of the existing method. We evaluated the frame-level detection accuracy of our method on three benchmark datasets (UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech, and XD-Violence) and demonstrate that our method can achieve the comparable or better accuracy than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种轻量级且准确的方法来检测视频中的异常。现有方法使用多实例学习（MIL）来确定视频每个片段的正常/异常状态。最近的成功研​​究认为，学习片段之间的时间关系以实现高精度非常重要，而不是只关注单个片段。因此，我们分析了近年来成功的现有方法，发现虽然一起学习所有片段确实很重要，但它们之间的时间顺序与实现高精度无关。基于这一发现，我们不使用 MIL 框架，而是提出一种具有自注意力机制的轻量级模型，以自动提取对于从所有输入片段中确定正常/异常非常重要的特征。结果，我们的神经网络模型的参数数量是现有方法的 1.3%。我们在三个基准数据集（UCF-Crime、ShanghaiTech 和 XD-Violence）上评估了我们的方法的帧级检测精度，并证明我们的方法可以达到与最先进的方法相当或更好的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量且准确的视频异常检测方法，通过提取视频中的显著特征实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多实例学习（MIL）处理视频片段，但未充分考虑片段间的时间关系。作者发现时间顺序对检测精度影响有限，因此需设计更轻量的模型以提升效率。
AI.method: 采用自注意力机制构建轻量神经网络，自动提取所有输入片段中的关键特征，无需多实例学习框架。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime、ShanghaiTech和XD-Violence三个数据集上，模型参数量仅为现有方法的1.3%，检测精度达到或超过现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化时间关系建模，在保持高检测精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为实际视频异常检测提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Qiaowei Ma,Jinghui Zhong,Yitao Yang,Weiheng Liu,Ying Gao,Wing W. Y. Ng
title: ConvNeXt Based Neural Network for Audio Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 基于 ConvNeXt 的神经网络用于音频反欺骗
abstract: With the rapid development of speech conversion and speech synthesis algorithms, automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems are vulnerable to spoofing attacks. In recent years, researchers had proposed a number of anti-spoofing methods based on hand-crafted features. However, using hand-crafted features rather than raw waveform will lose implicit information for anti-spoofing. Inspired by the promising performance of ConvNeXt in image classification tasks, we revise the ConvNeXt network architecture and propose a lightweight end-to-end anti-spoofing model. By integrating with the channel attention block and using the focal loss function, the proposed model can focus on the most informative sub-bands of speech representations and the difficult samples that are hard to classify. Experiments show that our proposed system could achieve an equal error rate of 0.64% and min-tDCF of 0.0187 for the ASVSpoof 2019 LA evaluation dataset, which outperforms the state-of-the-art systems.
summary: With the rapid development of speech conversion and speech synthesis algorithms, automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems are vulnerable to spoofing attacks. In recent years, researchers had proposed a number of anti-spoofing methods based on hand-crafted features. However, using hand-crafted features rather than raw waveform will lose implicit information for anti-spoofing. Inspired by the promising performance of ConvNeXt in image classification tasks, we revise the ConvNeXt network architecture and propose a lightweight end-to-end anti-spoofing model. By integrating with the channel attention block and using the focal loss function, the proposed model can focus on the most informative sub-bands of speech representations and the difficult samples that are hard to classify. Experiments show that our proposed system could achieve an equal error rate of 0.64% and min-tDCF of 0.0187 for the ASVSpoof 2019 LA evaluation dataset, which outperforms the state-of-the-art systems.
abstract_zh: 随着语音转换和语音合成算法的快速发展，自动说话人验证（ASV）系统很容易受到欺骗攻击。近年来，研究人员提出了许多基于手工特征的反欺骗方法。然而，使用手工制作的特征而不是原始波形将丢失反欺骗的隐式信息。受到 ConvNeXt 在图像分类任务中的良好性能的启发，我们修改了 ConvNeXt 网络架构，并提出了一种轻量级的端到端反欺骗模型。通过与通道注意力块集成并使用焦点损失函数，所提出的模型可以关注语音表示中信息最丰富的子带和难以分类的困难样本。实验表明，我们提出的系统对于 ASVSpoof 2019 LA 评估数据集可以实现 0.64% 的相同错误率和 0.0187 的 min-tDCF，这优于最先进的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于ConvNeXt网络的轻量级端到端音频反欺骗模型，用于提升自动说话人验证系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于手工特征的反欺骗方法会丢失语音波形中的隐含信息，而ConvNeXt在图像分类中的优异表现启发了其在音频领域的应用。
AI.method: 改进ConvNeXt网络架构，集成通道注意力模块并采用焦点损失函数，增强对语音表示中关键子带和难分类样本的识别能力。
AI.result: 在ASVSpoof 2019 LA数据集上实现0.64%的等错误率和0.0187的最小tDCF值，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过网络结构改进和损失函数优化，在音频反欺骗任务中取得了显著性能提升。

Inspired by the promising performance of ConvNeXt in image classification tasks, we revise the ConvNeXt network architecture and propose a lightweight end-to-end anti-spoofing model. By integrating with the channel attention block and using the focal loss function, the proposed model can focus on the most informative sub-bands of speech representations and the difficult samples that are hard to classify. authors_text: Hongwei Xue,Yuchong Sun,Bei Liu,Jianlong Fu,Ruihua Song,Houqiang Li,Jiebo Luo
title: CLIP-ViP: Adapting Pre-trained Image-Text Model to Video-Language Representation Alignment
title_zh: CLIP-ViP：将预训练的图像文本模型应用于视频语言表示对齐
abstract: The pre-trained image-text models, like CLIP, have demonstrated the strong power of vision-language representation learned from a large scale of web-collected image-text data. In light of the well-learned visual features, some existing works transfer image representation to video domain and achieve good results. However, how to utilize image-language pre-trained model (e.g., CLIP) for video-language pre-training (post-pretraining) is still under explored. In this paper, we investigate two questions: 1) what are the factors hindering post-pretraining CLIP to further improve the performance on video-language tasks? and 2) how to mitigate the impact of these factors? Through a series of comparative experiments and analyses, we find that the data scale and domain gap between language sources have great impacts. Motivated by these, we propose a Omnisource Cross-modal Learning method equipped with a Video Proxy mechanism on the basis of CLIP, namely CLIP-ViP. Extensive results show that our approach improves the performance of CLIP on video-text retrieval by a large margin. Our model also achieves SOTA results on a variety of datasets, including MSR-VTT, DiDeMo, LSMDC, and ActivityNet. We will release our code and pre-trained CLIP-ViP models at https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain/tree/main/CLIP-ViP.
summary: The pre-trained image-text models, like CLIP, have demonstrated the strong power of vision-language representation learned from a large scale of web-collected image-text data. In light of the well-learned visual features, some existing works transfer image representation to video domain and achieve good results. However, how to utilize image-language pre-trained model (e.g., CLIP) for video-language pre-training (post-pretraining) is still under explored. In this paper, we investigate two questions: 1) what are the factors hindering post-pretraining CLIP to further improve the performance on video-language tasks? and 2) how to mitigate the impact of these factors? Through a series of comparative experiments and analyses, we find that the data scale and domain gap between language sources have great impacts. Motivated by these, we propose a Omnisource Cross-modal Learning method equipped with a Video Proxy mechanism on the basis of CLIP, namely CLIP-ViP. Extensive results show that our approach improves the performance of CLIP on video-text retrieval by a large margin. Our model also achieves SOTA results on a variety of datasets, including MSR-VTT, DiDeMo, LSMDC, and ActivityNet. We will release our code and pre-trained CLIP-ViP models at https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain/tree/main/CLIP-ViP.
abstract_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的预训练图像文本模型已经展示了从大量网络收集的图像文本数据中学习到的视觉语言表示的强大功能。鉴于众所周知的视觉特征，一些现有的作品将图像表示转移到视频领域并取得了良好的效果。然而，如何利用图像语言预训练模型（例如CLIP）进行视频语言预训练（后预训练）仍在探索中。在本文中，我们研究了两个问题：1）阻碍预训练后 CLIP 进一步提高视频语言任务性能的因素是什么？ 2）如何减轻这些因素的影响？通过一系列的对比实验和分析，我们发现语言源之间的数据规模和领域差距有很大的影响。受此启发，我们提出了一种基于CLIP的配备视频代理机制的全源跨模态学习方法，即CLIP-ViP。大量结果表明，我们的方法大幅提高了 CLIP 在视频文本检索方面的性能。我们的模型还在各种数据集上实现了 SOTA 结果，包括 MSR-VTT、DiDeMo、LSMDC 和 ActivityNet。我们将在 https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain/tree/main/CLIP-ViP 发布我们的代码和预训练的 CLIP-ViP 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-ViP方法，通过改进预训练图像-文本模型CLIP，使其适应视频-语言表示对齐任务，以提升视频-文本检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽将图像特征迁移到视频领域，但如何有效利用图像-文本预训练模型（如CLIP）进行视频-语言预训练仍缺乏探索，数据规模和语言来源领域差异是主要障碍。
AI.method: 提出基于CLIP的Omnisource跨模态学习方法，结合视频代理机制（Video Proxy），通过多源数据增强和领域对齐策略优化视频-语言表示。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、DiDeMo等数据集上达到SOTA结果，视频-文本检索性能显著优于基线模型，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-ViP通过解决领域差异和数据规模问题，有效提升了视频-语言表示对齐效果，为跨模态预训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kaiqi Chen,Junhao Xiao,Jialing Liu,Qiyi Tong,Heng Zhang,Ruyu Liu,Jianhua Zhang,Arash Ajoudani,Shengyong Chen
title: Semantic Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping: A Survey
title_zh: 语义视觉同步定位和建图：一项调查
abstract: Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) has achieved great progress in the computer vision and robotics communities, and has been successfully used in many fields such as autonomous robot navigation and AR/VR. However, vSLAM cannot achieve good localization in dynamic and complex environments. Numerous publications have reported that, by combining with the semantic information with vSLAM, the semantic vSLAM systems have the capability of solving the above problems in recent years. Nevertheless, there is no comprehensive survey about semantic vSLAM. To fill the gap, this paper first reviews the development of semantic vSLAM, explicitly focusing on its strengths and differences. Secondly, we explore three main issues of semantic vSLAM: the extraction and association of semantic information, the application of semantic information, and the advantages of semantic vSLAM. Then, we collect and analyze the current state-of-the-art SLAM datasets which have been widely used in semantic vSLAM systems. Finally, we discuss future directions that will provide a blueprint for the future development of semantic vSLAM.
summary: Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) has achieved great progress in the computer vision and robotics communities, and has been successfully used in many fields such as autonomous robot navigation and AR/VR. However, vSLAM cannot achieve good localization in dynamic and complex environments. Numerous publications have reported that, by combining with the semantic information with vSLAM, the semantic vSLAM systems have the capability of solving the above problems in recent years. Nevertheless, there is no comprehensive survey about semantic vSLAM. To fill the gap, this paper first reviews the development of semantic vSLAM, explicitly focusing on its strengths and differences. Secondly, we explore three main issues of semantic vSLAM: the extraction and association of semantic information, the application of semantic information, and the advantages of semantic vSLAM. Then, we collect and analyze the current state-of-the-art SLAM datasets which have been widely used in semantic vSLAM systems. Finally, we discuss future directions that will provide a blueprint for the future development of semantic vSLAM.
abstract_zh: 视觉同步定位与建图（vSLAM）在计算机视觉和机器人领域取得了巨大进展，并已成功应用于自主机器人导航和AR/VR等多个领域。然而，vSLAM无法在动态和复杂的环境中实现良好的定位。近年来许多出版物报道，通过将语义信息与vSLAM相结合，语义vSLAM系统具有解决上述问题的能力。然而，目前还没有关于语义 vSLAM 的全面调查。为了填补这一空白，本文首先回顾了语义 vSLAM 的发展，明确关注其优点和差异。其次，我们探讨了语义vSLAM的三个主要问题：语义信息的提取和关联、语义信息的应用以及语义vSLAM的优势。然后，我们收集并分析当前最先进的 SLAM 数据集，这些数据集已广泛应用于语义 vSLAM 系统。最后，我们讨论了未来的方向，为语义 vSLAM 的未来发展提供了蓝图。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了语义视觉同步定位与建图（semantic vSLAM）的发展现状，分析其核心问题、数据集及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统vSLAM在动态复杂环境中定位性能不足，而融合语义信息的语义vSLAM虽具潜力，但缺乏系统性综述。
AI.method: 通过回顾技术演进、分析语义信息提取与应用的三大核心问题，并评估主流语义vSLAM数据集。
AI.result: 总结了语义vSLAM的关键技术路线、现有数据集特点及其在复杂环境中的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 未来需关注多模态语义融合、实时性优化及跨场景泛化能力提升等方向。

search_text: Semantic Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping: A Survey 语义视觉同步定位和建图：一项调查 Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) has achieved great progress in the computer vision and robotics communities, and has been successfully used in many fields such as autonomous robot navigation and AR/VR. However, vSLAM cannot achieve good localization in dynamic and complex environments. Numerous publications have reported that, by combining with the semantic information with vSLAM, the semantic vSLAM systems have the capability of solving the above problems in recent years. Nevertheless, there is no comprehensive survey about semantic vSLAM. To fill the gap, this paper first reviews the development of semantic vSLAM, explicitly focusing on its strengths and differences. Secondly, we explore three main issues of semantic vSLAM: the extraction and association of semantic information, the application of semantic information, and the advantages of semantic vSLAM. Then, we collect and analyze the current state-of-the-art SLAM datasets which have been widely used in semantic vSLAM systems. Finally, we discuss future directions that will provide a blueprint for the future development of semantic vSLAM. 视觉同步定位与建图（vSLAM）在计算机视觉和机器人领域取得了巨大进展，并已成功应用于自主机器人导航和AR/VR等多个领域。然而，vSLAM无法在动态和复杂的环境中实现良好的定位。近年来许多出版物报道，通过将语义信息与vSLAM相结合，语义vSLAM系统具有解决上述问题的能力。然而，目前还没有关于语义 vSLAM 的全面调查。为了填补这一空白，本文首先回顾了语义 vSLAM 的发展，明确关注其优点和差异。其次，我们探讨了语义vSLAM的三个主要问题：语义信息的提取和关联、语义信息的应用以及语义vSLAM的优势。然后，我们收集并分析当前最先进的 SLAM 数据集，这些数据集已广泛应用于语义 vSLAM 系统。最后，我们讨论了未来的方向，为语义 vSLAM 的未来发展提供了蓝图。 本文综述了语义视觉同步定位与建图（semantic vSLAM）的发展现状，分析其核心问题、数据集及未来方向。 Kaiqi Chen,Junhao Xiao,Jialing Liu,Qiyi Tong,Heng Zhang,Ruyu Liu,Jianhua Zhang,Arash Ajoudani,Shengyong Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Kay Hutchinson,Ian Reyes,Zongyu Li,Homa Alemzadeh
title: COMPASS: A Formal Framework and Aggregate Dataset for Generalized Surgical Procedure Modeling
title_zh: COMPASS：广义外科手术建模的正式框架和聚合数据集
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in the International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s11548-023-02922-1
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in the International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s11548-023-02922-1
abstract: Purpose: We propose a formal framework for the modeling and segmentation of minimally-invasive surgical tasks using a unified set of motion primitives (MPs) to enable more objective labeling and the aggregation of different datasets. Methods: We model dry-lab surgical tasks as finite state machines, representing how the execution of MPs as the basic surgical actions results in the change of surgical context, which characterizes the physical interactions among tools and objects in the surgical environment. We develop methods for labeling surgical context based on video data and for automatic translation of context to MP labels. We then use our framework to create the COntext and Motion Primitive Aggregate Surgical Set (COMPASS), including six dry-lab surgical tasks from three publicly-available datasets (JIGSAWS, DESK, and ROSMA), with kinematic and video data and context and MP labels. Results: Our context labeling method achieves near-perfect agreement between consensus labels from crowd-sourcing and expert surgeons. Segmentation of tasks to MPs results in the creation of the COMPASS dataset that nearly triples the amount of data for modeling and analysis and enables the generation of separate transcripts for the left and right tools. Conclusion: The proposed framework results in high quality labeling of surgical data based on context and fine-grained MPs. Modeling surgical tasks with MPs enables the aggregation of different datasets and the separate analysis of left and right hands for bimanual coordination assessment. Our formal framework and aggregate dataset can support the development of explainable and multi-granularity models for improved surgical process analysis, skill assessment, error detection, and autonomy.
summary: Purpose: We propose a formal framework for the modeling and segmentation of minimally-invasive surgical tasks using a unified set of motion primitives (MPs) to enable more objective labeling and the aggregation of different datasets. Methods: We model dry-lab surgical tasks as finite state machines, representing how the execution of MPs as the basic surgical actions results in the change of surgical context, which characterizes the physical interactions among tools and objects in the surgical environment. We develop methods for labeling surgical context based on video data and for automatic translation of context to MP labels. We then use our framework to create the COntext and Motion Primitive Aggregate Surgical Set (COMPASS), including six dry-lab surgical tasks from three publicly-available datasets (JIGSAWS, DESK, and ROSMA), with kinematic and video data and context and MP labels. Results: Our context labeling method achieves near-perfect agreement between consensus labels from crowd-sourcing and expert surgeons. Segmentation of tasks to MPs results in the creation of the COMPASS dataset that nearly triples the amount of data for modeling and analysis and enables the generation of separate transcripts for the left and right tools. Conclusion: The proposed framework results in high quality labeling of surgical data based on context and fine-grained MPs. Modeling surgical tasks with MPs enables the aggregation of different datasets and the separate analysis of left and right hands for bimanual coordination assessment. Our formal framework and aggregate dataset can support the development of explainable and multi-granularity models for improved surgical process analysis, skill assessment, error detection, and autonomy.
abstract_zh: 目的：我们提出了一个正式的框架，使用一组统一的运动原语（MP）来对微创手术任务进行建模和分割，以实现更客观的标记和不同数据集的聚合。方法：我们将干实验室手术任务建模为有限状态机，表示作为基本手术动作的 MP 的执行如何导致手术环境的变化，从而表征手术环境中工具和对象之间的物理相互作用。我们开发了基于视频数据标记手术背景以及将背景自动翻译为 MP 标签的方法。然后，我们使用我们的框架创建 COntext 和运动原始聚合手术集 (COMPASS)，包括来自三个公开可用数据集（JIGSAWS、DESK 和 ROSMA）的六个干实验室手术任务，以及运动学和视频数据以及上下文和 MP 标签。结果：我们的上下文标记方法在众包和专家外科医生的共识标签之间实现了近乎完美的一致性。将任务细分为 MP 会创建 COMPASS 数据集，该数据集使用于建模和分析的数据量增加了近三倍，并能够为左右工具生成单独的转录本。结论：所提出的框架可基于上下文和细粒度 MP 对手术数据进行高质量标记。使用 MP 对手术任务进行建模可以聚合不同的数据集并单独分析左右手以进行双手协调评估。我们的正式框架和聚合数据集可以支持可解释的多粒度模型的开发，以改进手术过程分析、技能评估、错误检测和自主性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMPASS框架及聚合数据集，通过统一运动原语建模微创手术任务，实现跨数据集的手术过程分析。
AI.motivation: 现有手术数据集存在标注标准不统一、难以聚合的问题，需客观标注方法支持多数据集分析与细粒度手术动作建模。
AI.method: 将手术任务建模为有限状态机，基于视频数据标注手术上下文并转换为运动原语标签，整合三个公开数据集构建COMPASS数据集。
AI.result: 上下文标注方法在众包与专家标注间达成近完美一致性，数据集规模扩大近三倍，支持左右工具独立分析。
AI.conclusion: 框架实现高质量上下文驱动的手术标注，支持多粒度模型开发，可用于手术过程分析、技能评估及自主手术系统研究。

authors_text: Zesong Qiu,Yuwei Li,Dongming He,Qixuan Zhang,Longwen Zhang,Yinghao Zhang,Jingya Wang,Lan Xu,Xudong Wang,Yuyao Zhang,Jingyi Yu
title: SCULPTOR: Skeleton-Consistent Face Creation Using a Learned Parametric Generator
title_zh: SCULPTOR：使用学习参数生成器创建骨骼一致的面部
abstract: Recent years have seen growing interest in 3D human faces modelling due to its wide applications in digital human, character generation and animation. Existing approaches overwhelmingly emphasized on modeling the exterior shapes, textures and skin properties of faces, ignoring the inherent correlation between inner skeletal structures and appearance. In this paper, we present SCULPTOR, 3D face creations with Skeleton Consistency Using a Learned Parametric facial generaTOR, aiming to facilitate easy creation of both anatomically correct and visually convincing face models via a hybrid parametric-physical representation. At the core of SCULPTOR is LUCY, the first large-scale shape-skeleton face dataset in collaboration with plastic surgeons. Named after the fossils of one of the oldest known human ancestors, our LUCY dataset contains high-quality Computed Tomography (CT) scans of the complete human head before and after orthognathic surgeries, critical for evaluating surgery results. LUCY consists of 144 scans of 72 subjects (31 male and 41 female) where each subject has two CT scans taken pre- and post-orthognathic operations. Based on our LUCY dataset, we learn a novel skeleton consistent parametric facial generator, SCULPTOR, which can create the unique and nuanced facial features that help define a character and at the same time maintain physiological soundness. Our SCULPTOR jointly models the skull, face geometry and face appearance under a unified data-driven framework, by separating the depiction of a 3D face into shape blend shape, pose blend shape and facial expression blend shape. SCULPTOR preserves both anatomic correctness and visual realism in facial generation tasks compared with existing methods. Finally, we showcase the robustness and effectiveness of SCULPTOR in various fancy applications unseen before.
summary: Recent years have seen growing interest in 3D human faces modelling due to its wide applications in digital human, character generation and animation. Existing approaches overwhelmingly emphasized on modeling the exterior shapes, textures and skin properties of faces, ignoring the inherent correlation between inner skeletal structures and appearance. In this paper, we present SCULPTOR, 3D face creations with Skeleton Consistency Using a Learned Parametric facial generaTOR, aiming to facilitate easy creation of both anatomically correct and visually convincing face models via a hybrid parametric-physical representation. At the core of SCULPTOR is LUCY, the first large-scale shape-skeleton face dataset in collaboration with plastic surgeons. Named after the fossils of one of the oldest known human ancestors, our LUCY dataset contains high-quality Computed Tomography (CT) scans of the complete human head before and after orthognathic surgeries, critical for evaluating surgery results. LUCY consists of 144 scans of 72 subjects (31 male and 41 female) where each subject has two CT scans taken pre- and post-orthognathic operations. Based on our LUCY dataset, we learn a novel skeleton consistent parametric facial generator, SCULPTOR, which can create the unique and nuanced facial features that help define a character and at the same time maintain physiological soundness. Our SCULPTOR jointly models the skull, face geometry and face appearance under a unified data-driven framework, by separating the depiction of a 3D face into shape blend shape, pose blend shape and facial expression blend shape. SCULPTOR preserves both anatomic correctness and visual realism in facial generation tasks compared with existing methods. Finally, we showcase the robustness and effectiveness of SCULPTOR in various fancy applications unseen before.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于 3D 人脸建模在数字人、角色生成和动画中的广泛应用，人们对 3D 人脸建模的兴趣日益浓厚。现有的方法绝大多数强调对面部的外部形状、纹理和皮肤特性进行建模，而忽略了内部骨骼结构和外观之间的内在相关性。在本文中，我们介绍了 SCULPTOR，即使用学习参数面部生成器进行具有骨架一致性的 3D 面部创建，旨在通过混合参数物理表示轻松创建解剖学上正确且视觉上令人信服的面部模型。 SCULPTOR 的核心是 LUCY，这是第一个与整形外科医生合作的大型形状骨骼人脸数据集。我们的 LUCY 数据集以已知最古老的人类祖先之一的化石命名，包含正颌手术前后完整人类头部的高质量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描，这对于评估手术结果至关重要。 LUCY 包括 72 名受试者（31 名男性和 41 名女性）的 144 次扫描，其中每个受试者在正颌手术前和手术后进行两次 CT 扫描。基于我们的 LUCY 数据集，我们学习了一种新颖的骨骼一致参数化面部生成器 SCULPTOR，它可以创建独特且细致的面部特征，帮助定义角色，同时保持生理健全性。我们的 SCULPTOR 通过将 3D 脸部的描绘分为形状混合形状、姿势混合形状和面部表情混合形状，在统一的数据驱动框架下对头骨、面部几何形状和面部外观进行联合建模。与现有方法相比，SCULPTOR 在面部生成任务中保留了解剖正确性和视觉真实感。最后，我们展示了 SCULPTOR 在各种前所未见的奇特应用程序中的稳健性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCULPTOR，一种基于学习参数化生成器的骨架一致的3D人脸生成方法，旨在创建解剖学正确且视觉逼真的面部模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度关注面部外部形状和纹理，忽视了骨骼结构与外观的内在关联，导致生成模型缺乏生理合理性。
AI.method: 构建LUCY数据集（含正颌手术前后的高质量CT扫描），提出参数化生成器SCULPTOR，在统一框架下联合建模颅骨、面部几何和外观，分离为形状、姿态和表情混合形状进行生成。
AI.result: SCULPTOR在保持解剖正确性和视觉真实感方面优于现有方法，并展示了其在多种新应用场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SCULPTOR通过骨架一致性约束实现了生理合理且视觉可信的面部生成，为数字人、动画等应用提供了有效工具。

search_text: SCULPTOR: Skeleton-Consistent Face Creation Using a Learned Parametric Generator SCULPTOR：使用学习参数生成器创建骨骼一致的面部 Recent years have seen growing interest in 3D human faces modelling due to its wide applications in digital human, character generation and animation. Existing approaches overwhelmingly emphasized on modeling the exterior shapes, textures and skin properties of faces, ignoring the inherent correlation between inner skeletal structures and appearance. In this paper, we present SCULPTOR, 3D face creations with Skeleton Consistency Using a Learned Parametric facial generaTOR, aiming to facilitate easy creation of both anatomically correct and visually convincing face models via a hybrid parametric-physical representation. At the core of SCULPTOR is LUCY, the first large-scale shape-skeleton face dataset in collaboration with plastic surgeons. Named after the fossils of one of the oldest known human ancestors, our LUCY dataset contains high-quality Computed Tomography (CT) scans of the complete human head before and after orthognathic surgeries, critical for evaluating surgery results. LUCY consists of 144 scans of 72 subjects (31 male and 41 female) where each subject has two CT scans taken pre- and post-orthognathic operations. Based on our LUCY dataset, we learn a novel skeleton consistent parametric facial generator, SCULPTOR, which can create the unique and nuanced facial features that help define a character and at the same time maintain physiological soundness. Our SCULPTOR jointly models the skull, face geometry and face appearance under a unified data-driven framework, by separating the depiction of a 3D face into shape blend shape, pose blend shape and facial expression blend shape. SCULPTOR preserves both anatomic correctness and visual realism in facial generation tasks compared with existing methods. Finally, we showcase the robustness and effectiveness of SCULPTOR in various fancy applications unseen before. 近年来，由于 3D 人脸建模在数字人、角色生成和动画中的广泛应用，人们对 3D 人脸建模的兴趣日益浓厚。现有的方法绝大多数强调对面部的外部形状、纹理和皮肤特性进行建模，而忽略了内部骨骼结构和外观之间的内在相关性。在本文中，我们介绍了 SCULPTOR，即使用学习参数面部生成器进行具有骨架一致性的 3D 面部创建，旨在通过混合参数物理表示轻松创建解剖学上正确且视觉上令人信服的面部模型。 SCULPTOR 的核心是 LUCY，这是第一个与整形外科医生合作的大型形状骨骼人脸数据集。我们的 LUCY 数据集以已知最古老的人类祖先之一的化石命名，包含正颌手术前后完整人类头部的高质量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描，这对于评估手术结果至关重要。 LUCY 包括 72 名受试者（31 名男性和 41 名女性）的 144 次扫描，其中每个受试者在正颌手术前和手术后进行两次 CT 扫描。基于我们的 LUCY 数据集，我们学习了一种新颖的骨骼一致参数化面部生成器 SCULPTOR，它可以创建独特且细致的面部特征，帮助定义角色，同时保持生理健全性。我们的 SCULPTOR 通过将 3D 脸部的描绘分为形状混合形状、姿势混合形状和面部表情混合形状，在统一的数据驱动框架下对头骨、面部几何形状和面部外观进行联合建模。与现有方法相比，SCULPTOR 在面部生成任务中保留了解剖正确性和视觉真实感。最后，我们展示了 SCULPTOR 在各种前所未见的奇特应用程序中的稳健性和有效性。 本文提出SCULPTOR，一种基于学习参数化生成器的骨架一致的3D人脸生成方法，旨在创建解剖学正确且视觉逼真的面部模型。 Zesong Qiu,Yuwei Li,Dongming He,Qixuan Zhang,Longwen Zhang,Yinghao Zhang,Jingya Wang,Lan Xu,Xudong Wang,Yuyao Zhang,Jingyi Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiahong Zhang,Yonggui Zhu,Wenshu Yu,Jingning Ma
title: Considering Image Information and Self-similarity: A Compositional Denoising Network
title_zh: 考虑图像信息和自相似性：组合去噪网络
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely used in image denoising. Existing methods benefited from residual learning and achieved high performance. Much research has been paid attention to optimizing the network architecture of CNN but ignored the limitations of residual learning. This paper suggests two limitations of it. One is that residual learning focuses on estimating noise, thus overlooking the image information. The other is that the image self-similarity is not effectively considered. This paper proposes a compositional denoising network (CDN), whose image information path (IIP) and noise estimation path (NEP) will solve the two problems, respectively. IIP is trained by an image-to-image way to extract image information. For NEP, it utilizes the image self-similarity from the perspective of training. This similarity-based training method constrains NEP to output a similar estimated noise distribution for different image patches with a specific kind of noise. Finally, image information and noise distribution information will be comprehensively considered for image denoising. Experiments show that CDN achieves state-of-the-art results in synthetic and real-world image denoising. Our code will be released on https://github.com/JiaHongZ/CDN.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely used in image denoising. Existing methods benefited from residual learning and achieved high performance. Much research has been paid attention to optimizing the network architecture of CNN but ignored the limitations of residual learning. This paper suggests two limitations of it. One is that residual learning focuses on estimating noise, thus overlooking the image information. The other is that the image self-similarity is not effectively considered. This paper proposes a compositional denoising network (CDN), whose image information path (IIP) and noise estimation path (NEP) will solve the two problems, respectively. IIP is trained by an image-to-image way to extract image information. For NEP, it utilizes the image self-similarity from the perspective of training. This similarity-based training method constrains NEP to output a similar estimated noise distribution for different image patches with a specific kind of noise. Finally, image information and noise distribution information will be comprehensively considered for image denoising. Experiments show that CDN achieves state-of-the-art results in synthetic and real-world image denoising. Our code will be released on https://github.com/JiaHongZ/CDN.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于图像去噪。现有方法受益于残差学习并取得了高性能。许多研究关注于优化 CNN 的网络架构，但忽视了残差学习的局限性。本文提出了它的两个局限性。一是残差学习侧重于估计噪声，从而忽略了图像信息。二是没有有效考虑图像的自相似性。本文提出了一种组合去噪网络（CDN），其图像信息路径（IIP）和噪声估计路径（NEP）将分别解决这两个问题。 IIP通过图像到图像的方式训练来提取图像信息。对于NEP，它从训练的角度利用图像的自相似性。这种基于相似性的训练方法限制 NEP 为具有特定类型噪声的不同图像块输出相似的估计噪声分布。最后综合考虑图像信息和噪声分布信息进行图像去噪。实验表明，CDN 在合成和真实图像去噪方面取得了最先进的结果。我们的代码将发布在 https://github.com/JiahongZ/CDN 上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种组合去噪网络（CDN），通过结合图像信息和自相似性来改进图像去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于残差学习的CNN方法在图像去噪中过度关注噪声估计，忽视了图像本身的结构信息和自相似性特性，导致性能局限。
AI.method: 设计了双路径网络架构：图像信息路径（IIP）通过图像到图像的方式提取结构信息，噪声估计路径（NEP）利用训练阶段的图像自相似性约束噪声分布估计。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实场景图像去噪任务中达到SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模图像信息与自相似性，CDN有效克服了残差学习的局限性，在去噪任务中取得显著提升。

authors_text: Zhexiong Liu,Meiqi Guo,Yue Dai,Diane Litman
title: ImageArg: A Multi-modal Tweet Dataset for Image Persuasiveness Mining
title_zh: ImageArg：用于图像说服力挖掘的多模式推文数据集
comment: In Argument Mining Workshop, held in conjunction with the International Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING), October 2022
comments: In Argument Mining Workshop, held in conjunction with the International Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING), October 2022
abstract: The growing interest in developing corpora of persuasive texts has promoted applications in automated systems, e.g., debating and essay scoring systems; however, there is little prior work mining image persuasiveness from an argumentative perspective. To expand persuasiveness mining into a multi-modal realm, we present a multi-modal dataset, ImageArg, consisting of annotations of image persuasiveness in tweets. The annotations are based on a persuasion taxonomy we developed to explore image functionalities and the means of persuasion. We benchmark image persuasiveness tasks on ImageArg using widely-used multi-modal learning methods. The experimental results show that our dataset offers a useful resource for this rich and challenging topic, and there is ample room for modeling improvement.
summary: The growing interest in developing corpora of persuasive texts has promoted applications in automated systems, e.g., debating and essay scoring systems; however, there is little prior work mining image persuasiveness from an argumentative perspective. To expand persuasiveness mining into a multi-modal realm, we present a multi-modal dataset, ImageArg, consisting of annotations of image persuasiveness in tweets. The annotations are based on a persuasion taxonomy we developed to explore image functionalities and the means of persuasion. We benchmark image persuasiveness tasks on ImageArg using widely-used multi-modal learning methods. The experimental results show that our dataset offers a useful resource for this rich and challenging topic, and there is ample room for modeling improvement.
abstract_zh: 人们对开发说服性文本语料库的兴趣日益浓厚，促进了自动化系统的应用，例如辩论和论文评分系统；然而，之前很少有工作从论证的角度挖掘图像的说服力。为了将说服力挖掘扩展到多模态领域，我们提出了一个多模态数据集 ImageArg，其中包含推文中图像说服力的注释。这些注释基于我们开发的说服分类法，用于探索图像功能和说服手段。我们使用广泛使用的多模态学习方法在 ImageArg 上对图像说服力任务进行基准测试。实验结果表明，我们的数据集为这个丰富且具有挑战性的主题提供了有用的资源，并且有足够的建模改进空间。

AI.tldr: 构建用于挖掘图像说服力的多模态推文数据集ImageArg
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注文本说服力，缺乏从论点角度分析图像说服力的多模态数据集
AI.method: 开发说服力分类法标注图像功能，并采用多模态学习方法进行基准测试
AI.result: 实验显示数据集有效，且模型仍有改进余地
AI.conclusion: ImageArg为多模态说服力研究提供了重要资源，需进一步优化模型

authors_text: Senthil Hariharan Arul,Amrit Singh Bedi,Dinesh Manocha
title: DMCA: Dense Multi-agent Navigation using Attention and Communication
title_zh: DMCA：使用注意力和通信的密集多智能体导航
abstract: In decentralized multi-robot navigation, ensuring safe and efficient movement with limited environmental awareness remains a challenge. While robots traditionally navigate based on local observations, this approach falters in complex environments. A possible solution is to enhance understanding of the world through inter-agent communication, but mere information broadcasting falls short in efficiency. In this work, we address this problem by simultaneously learning decentralized multi-robot collision avoidance and selective inter-agent communication. We use a multi-head self-attention mechanism that encodes observable information from neighboring robots into a concise and fixed-length observation vector, thereby handling varying numbers of neighbors. Our method focuses on improving navigation performance through selective communication. We cast the communication selection as a link prediction problem, where the network determines the necessity of establishing a communication link with a specific neighbor based on the observable state information. The communicated information enhances the neighbor's observation and aids in selecting an appropriate navigation plan. By training the network end-to-end, we concurrently learn the optimal weights for the observation encoder, communication selection, and navigation components. We showcase the benefits of our approach by achieving safe and efficient navigation among multiple robots, even in dense and challenging environments. Comparative evaluations against various learning-based and model-based baselines demonstrate our superior navigation performance, resulting in an impressive improvement of up to 24% in success rate within complex evaluation scenarios.
summary: In decentralized multi-robot navigation, ensuring safe and efficient movement with limited environmental awareness remains a challenge. While robots traditionally navigate based on local observations, this approach falters in complex environments. A possible solution is to enhance understanding of the world through inter-agent communication, but mere information broadcasting falls short in efficiency. In this work, we address this problem by simultaneously learning decentralized multi-robot collision avoidance and selective inter-agent communication. Our method focuses on improving navigation performance through selective communication. We cast the communication selection as a link prediction problem, where the network determines the necessity of establishing a communication link with a specific neighbor based on the observable state information. The communicated information enhances the neighbor's observation and aids in selecting an appropriate navigation plan. By training the network end-to-end, we concurrently learn the optimal weights for the observation encoder, communication selection, and navigation components. We showcase the benefits of our approach by achieving safe and efficient navigation among multiple robots, even in dense and challenging environments. Comparative evaluations against various learning-based and model-based baselines demonstrate our superior navigation performance, resulting in an impressive improvement of up to 24% in success rate within complex evaluation scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在分散式多机器人导航中，在环境意识有限的情况下确保安全高效的运动仍然是一个挑战。虽然机器人传统上是根据本地观察进行导航，但这种方法在复杂的环境中会失效。一种可能的解决方案是通过智能体间的通信来增强对世界的理解，但单纯的信息广播效率较低。在这项工作中，我们通过同时学习分散式多机器人碰撞避免和选择性代理间通信来解决这个问题。我们使用多头自注意力机制，将来自相邻机器人的可观察信息编码为简洁且固定长度的观察向量，从而处理不同数量的邻居。我们的方法侧重于通过选择性通信来提高导航性能。我们将通信选择视为链路预测问题，其中网络根据可观察的状态信息确定与特定邻居建立通信链路的必要性。传达的信息增强了邻居的观察力并有助于选择适当的导航计划。通过端到端训练网络，我们同时学习观察编码器、通信选择和导航组件的最佳权重。即使在密集且具有挑战性的环境中，我们也能在多个机器人之间实现安全高效的导航，从而展示我们方法的优势。与各种基于学习和基于模型的基线的比较评估证明了我们卓越的导航性能，在复杂的评估场景中成功率显着提高了高达 24%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合注意力机制和选择性通信的多机器人导航方法，以提高密集环境中的安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统局部观察方法在复杂环境中效率低下，单纯的信息广播无法有效提升导航性能，需通过选择性通信优化。
AI.method: 采用多头自注意力机制编码邻居信息，结合链接预测模型选择通信对象，端到端训练优化导航、通信和编码模块。
AI.result: 在密集复杂环境中实现安全高效导航，成功率比现有方法提高24%。
AI.conclusion: 选择性通信与注意力机制结合能有效提升多机器人系统的导航性能，尤其在高密度场景中表现突出。

search_text: DMCA: Dense Multi-agent Navigation using Attention and Communication DMCA：使用注意力和通信的密集多智能体导航 In decentralized multi-robot navigation, ensuring safe and efficient movement with limited environmental awareness remains a challenge. While robots traditionally navigate based on local observations, this approach falters in complex environments. A possible solution is to enhance understanding of the world through inter-agent communication, but mere information broadcasting falls short in efficiency. In this work, we address this problem by simultaneously learning decentralized multi-robot collision avoidance and selective inter-agent communication. We use a multi-head self-attention mechanism that encodes observable information from neighboring robots into a concise and fixed-length observation vector, thereby handling varying numbers of neighbors. Our method focuses on improving navigation performance through selective communication. We cast the communication selection as a link prediction problem, where the network determines the necessity of establishing a communication link with a specific neighbor based on the observable state information. The communicated information enhances the neighbor's observation and aids in selecting an appropriate navigation plan. By training the network end-to-end, we concurrently learn the optimal weights for the observation encoder, communication selection, and navigation components. We showcase the benefits of our approach by achieving safe and efficient navigation among multiple robots, even in dense and challenging environments. Comparative evaluations against various learning-based and model-based baselines demonstrate our superior navigation performance, resulting in an impressive improvement of up to 24% in success rate within complex evaluation scenarios. 在分散式多机器人导航中，在环境意识有限的情况下确保安全高效的运动仍然是一个挑战。虽然机器人传统上是根据本地观察进行导航，但这种方法在复杂的环境中会失效。一种可能的解决方案是通过智能体间的通信来增强对世界的理解，但单纯的信息广播效率较低。在这项工作中，我们通过同时学习分散式多机器人碰撞避免和选择性代理间通信来解决这个问题。我们使用多头自注意力机制，将来自相邻机器人的可观察信息编码为简洁且固定长度的观察向量，从而处理不同数量的邻居。我们的方法侧重于通过选择性通信来提高导航性能。我们将通信选择视为链路预测问题，其中网络根据可观察的状态信息确定与特定邻居建立通信链路的必要性。传达的信息增强了邻居的观察力并有助于选择适当的导航计划。通过端到端训练网络，我们同时学习观察编码器、通信选择和导航组件的最佳权重。即使在密集且具有挑战性的环境中，我们也能在多个机器人之间实现安全高效的导航，从而展示我们方法的优势。与各种基于学习和基于模型的基线的比较评估证明了我们卓越的导航性能，在复杂的评估场景中成功率显着提高了高达 24%。 提出一种结合注意力机制和选择性通信的多机器人导航方法，以提高密集环境中的安全性和效率。 Senthil Hariharan Arul,Amrit Singh Bedi,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

authors_text: Lixuan Chen,Jiangjie Wu,Qing Wu,Hongjiang Wei,Yuyao Zhang
title: Continuous longitudinal fetus brain atlas construction via implicit neural representation
title_zh: 通过隐式神经表征构建连续纵向胎儿脑图谱
abstract: Longitudinal fetal brain atlas is a powerful tool for understanding and characterizing the complex process of fetus brain development. Existing fetus brain atlases are typically constructed by averaged brain images on discrete time points independently over time. Due to the differences in onto-genetic trends among samples at different time points, the resulting atlases suffer from temporal inconsistency, which may lead to estimating error of the brain developmental characteristic parameters along the timeline. To this end, we proposed a multi-stage deep-learning framework to tackle the time inconsistency issue as a 4D (3D brain volume + 1D age) image data denoising task. Using implicit neural representation, we construct a continuous and noise-free longitudinal fetus brain atlas as a function of the 4D spatial-temporal coordinate. Experimental results on two public fetal brain atlases (CRL and FBA-Chinese atlases) show that the proposed method can significantly improve the atlas temporal consistency while maintaining good fetus brain structure representation. In addition, the continuous longitudinal fetus brain atlases can also be extensively applied to generate finer 4D atlases in both spatial and temporal resolution.
summary: Longitudinal fetal brain atlas is a powerful tool for understanding and characterizing the complex process of fetus brain development. Existing fetus brain atlases are typically constructed by averaged brain images on discrete time points independently over time. Due to the differences in onto-genetic trends among samples at different time points, the resulting atlases suffer from temporal inconsistency, which may lead to estimating error of the brain developmental characteristic parameters along the timeline. To this end, we proposed a multi-stage deep-learning framework to tackle the time inconsistency issue as a 4D (3D brain volume + 1D age) image data denoising task. Using implicit neural representation, we construct a continuous and noise-free longitudinal fetus brain atlas as a function of the 4D spatial-temporal coordinate. Experimental results on two public fetal brain atlases (CRL and FBA-Chinese atlases) show that the proposed method can significantly improve the atlas temporal consistency while maintaining good fetus brain structure representation. In addition, the continuous longitudinal fetus brain atlases can also be extensively applied to generate finer 4D atlases in both spatial and temporal resolution.
abstract_zh: 纵向胎儿大脑图谱是理解和表征胎儿大脑发育复杂过程的有力工具。现有的胎儿大脑图谱通常是由随时间独立的离散时间点上的平均大脑图像构建的。由于不同时间点样本个体发育趋势的差异，所得到的图谱存在时间不一致，这可能导致大脑发育特征参数沿时间轴的估计误差。为此，我们提出了一种多阶段深度学习框架来解决 4D（3D 脑体积 + 1D 年龄）图像数据去噪任务的时间不一致问题。使用隐式神经表示，我们构建了一个连续且无噪声的纵向胎儿大脑图谱，作为 4D 时空坐标的函数。在两个公共胎儿脑图谱（CRL和FBA-Chinese图集）上的实验结果表明，该方法可以显着提高图谱时间一致性，同时保持良好的胎儿脑结构表征。此外，连续纵向胎儿脑图谱还可以广泛应用于生成空间和时间分辨率更精细的4D图谱。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式神经表示的多阶段深度学习框架，用于构建连续且无噪声的胎儿脑发育纵向图谱。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿脑图谱在离散时间点独立构建，导致时间不一致性和发育特征参数估计误差，需解决这一问题以提升脑发育分析的准确性。
AI.method: 将时间不一致性问题转化为4D（3D脑体积+1D年龄）图像去噪任务，利用隐式神经表示构建连续时空坐标函数建模胎儿脑发育过程。
AI.result: 在CRL和FBA-Chinese两个公开图谱数据集上验证，方法显著提升时间一致性并保持良好脑结构表示，可生成更高时空分辨率的4D图谱。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统图谱的时间不一致性问题，为胎儿脑发育研究和高精度图谱生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xuanyu Tian,Qing Wu,Hongjiang Wei,Yuyao Zhang
title: Noise2SR: Learning to Denoise from Super-Resolved Single Noisy Fluorescence Image
title_zh: Noise2SR：学习从超分辨率单噪声荧光图像中去噪
abstract: Fluorescence microscopy is a key driver to promote discoveries of biomedical research. However, with the limitation of microscope hardware and characteristics of the observed samples, the fluorescence microscopy images are susceptible to noise. Recently, a few self-supervised deep learning (DL) denoising methods have been proposed. However, the training efficiency and denoising performance of existing methods are relatively low in real scene noise removal. To address this issue, this paper proposed self-supervised image denoising method Noise2SR (N2SR) to train a simple and effective image denoising model based on single noisy observation. Our Noise2SR denoising model is designed for training with paired noisy images of different dimensions. Benefiting from this training strategy, Noise2SR is more efficiently self-supervised and able to restore more image details from a single noisy observation. Experimental results of simulated noise and real microscopy noise removal show that Noise2SR outperforms two blind-spot based self-supervised deep learning image denoising methods. We envision that Noise2SR has the potential to improve more other kind of scientific imaging quality.
summary: Fluorescence microscopy is a key driver to promote discoveries of biomedical research. However, with the limitation of microscope hardware and characteristics of the observed samples, the fluorescence microscopy images are susceptible to noise. Recently, a few self-supervised deep learning (DL) denoising methods have been proposed. However, the training efficiency and denoising performance of existing methods are relatively low in real scene noise removal. To address this issue, this paper proposed self-supervised image denoising method Noise2SR (N2SR) to train a simple and effective image denoising model based on single noisy observation. Our Noise2SR denoising model is designed for training with paired noisy images of different dimensions. Benefiting from this training strategy, Noise2SR is more efficiently self-supervised and able to restore more image details from a single noisy observation. Experimental results of simulated noise and real microscopy noise removal show that Noise2SR outperforms two blind-spot based self-supervised deep learning image denoising methods. We envision that Noise2SR has the potential to improve more other kind of scientific imaging quality.
abstract_zh: 荧光显微镜是促进生物医学研究发现的关键驱动力。然而，由于显微镜硬件和观察样品特性的限制，荧光显微镜图像容易受到噪声的影响。最近，提出了一些自监督深度学习（DL）去噪方法。然而，现有方法在实景去噪中训练效率和去噪性能均较低。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了自监督图像去噪方法Noise2SR（N2SR），以训练基于单噪声观测的简单有效的图像去噪模型。我们的 Noise2SR 去噪模型专为使用不同维度的配对噪声图像进行训练而设计。受益于这种训练策略，Noise2SR 可以更有效地进行自我监督，并且能够从单个噪声观察中恢复更多图像细节。模拟噪声和真实显微镜噪声去除的实验结果表明，Noise2SR 优于两种基于盲点的自监督深度学习图像去噪方法。我们预计 Noise2SR 有潜力提高更多其他类型的科学成像质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张噪声荧光图像的自监督去噪方法Noise2SR（N2SR），旨在提升生物医学显微镜图像的去噪效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法在真实场景噪声去除中训练效率低且性能不足，而荧光显微镜图像因硬件限制和样本特性易受噪声影响，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计N2SR模型通过不同维度的配对噪声图像进行训练，利用单张噪声观测数据实现更高效的自监督学习，恢复更多图像细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，N2SR在模拟噪声和真实显微镜噪声去除任务中优于两种基于盲点的自监督深度学习去噪方法。
AI.conclusion: N2SR有望提升多种科学成像的质量，为生物医学研究提供更清晰的图像支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张噪声荧光图像的自监督去噪方法Noise2SR（N2SR），旨在提升生物医学显微镜图像的去噪效率和性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有去噪方法在真实场景噪声去除中训练效率低且性能不足，而荧光显微镜图像因硬件限制和样本特性易受噪声影响，亟需更高效的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 设计N2SR模型通过不同维度的配对噪声图像进行训练，利用单张噪声观测数据实现更高效的自监督学习，恢复更多图像细节。
