search_text: Noise2SR: Learning to Denoise from Super-Resolved Single Noisy Fluorescence Image Noise2SR：学习从超分辨率单噪声荧光图像中去噪 Fluorescence microscopy is a key driver to promote discoveries of biomedical research. However, with the limitation of microscope hardware and characteristics of the observed samples, the fluorescence microscopy images are susceptible to noise. Recently, a few self-supervised deep learning (DL) denoising methods have been proposed. However, the training efficiency and denoising performance of existing methods are relatively low in real scene noise removal. To address this issue, this paper proposed self-supervised image denoising method Noise2SR (N2SR) to train a simple and effective image denoising model based on single noisy observation. Our Noise2SR denoising model is designed for training with paired noisy images of different dimensions. Benefiting from this training strategy, Noise2SR is more efficiently self-supervised and able to restore more image details from a single noisy observation. Experimental results of simulated noise and real microscopy noise removal show that Noise2SR outperforms two blind-spot based self-supervised deep learning image denoising methods. We envision that Noise2SR has the potential to improve more other kind of scientific imaging quality. 荧光显微镜是促进生物医学研究发现的关键驱动力。然而，由于显微镜硬件和观察样品特性的限制，荧光显微镜图像容易受到噪声的影响。最近，提出了一些自监督深度学习（DL）去噪方法。然而，现有方法在实景去噪中训练效率和去噪性能均较低。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了自监督图像去噪方法Noise2SR（N2SR），以训练基于单噪声观测的简单有效的图像去噪模型。我们的 Noise2SR 去噪模型专为使用不同维度的配对噪声图像进行训练而设计。受益于这种训练策略，Noise2SR 可以更有效地进行自我监督，并且能够从单个噪声观察中恢复更多图像细节。模拟噪声和真实显微镜噪声去除的实验结果表明，Noise2SR 优于两种基于盲点的自监督深度学习图像去噪方法。我们预计 Noise2SR 有潜力提高更多其他类型的科学成像质量。 本文提出了一种基于单张噪声荧光图像的自监督去噪方法Noise2SR（N2SR），旨在提升生物医学显微镜图像的去噪效率和性能。 Xuanyu Tian,Qing Wu,Hongjiang Wei,Yuyao Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tom O'Malley,Arun Narayanan,Quan Wang
title: A Universally-Deployable ASR Frontend for Joint Acoustic Echo Cancellation, Speech Enhancement, and Voice Separation
title_zh: 用于联合声学回声消除、语音增强和语音分离的通用部署 ASR 前端
abstract: Recent work has shown that it is possible to train a single model to perform joint acoustic echo cancellation (AEC), speech enhancement, and voice separation, thereby serving as a unified frontend for robust automatic speech recognition (ASR). The joint model uses contextual information, such as a reference of the playback audio, noise context, and speaker embedding. In this work, we propose a number of novel improvements to such a model. First, we improve the architecture of the Cross-Attention Conformer that is used to ingest noise context into the model. Second, we generalize the model to be able to handle varying lengths of noise context. Third, we propose Signal Dropout, a novel strategy that models missing contextual information. In the absence of one or more signals, the proposed model performs nearly as well as task-specific models trained without these signals; and when such signals are present, our system compares well against systems that require all context signals. Over the baseline, the final model retains a relative word error rate reduction of 25.0% on background speech when speaker embedding is absent, and 61.2% on AEC when device playback is absent.
summary: Recent work has shown that it is possible to train a single model to perform joint acoustic echo cancellation (AEC), speech enhancement, and voice separation, thereby serving as a unified frontend for robust automatic speech recognition (ASR). The joint model uses contextual information, such as a reference of the playback audio, noise context, and speaker embedding. In this work, we propose a number of novel improvements to such a model. First, we improve the architecture of the Cross-Attention Conformer that is used to ingest noise context into the model. Second, we generalize the model to be able to handle varying lengths of noise context. Third, we propose Signal Dropout, a novel strategy that models missing contextual information. In the absence of one or more signals, the proposed model performs nearly as well as task-specific models trained without these signals; and when such signals are present, our system compares well against systems that require all context signals. Over the baseline, the final model retains a relative word error rate reduction of 25.0% on background speech when speaker embedding is absent, and 61.2% on AEC when device playback is absent.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，可以训练单个模型来执行联合声学回声消除 (AEC)、语音增强和语音分离，从而充当强大的自动语音识别 (ASR) 的统一前端。联合模型使用上下文信息，例如播放音频的参考、噪声上下文和说话者嵌入。在这项工作中，我们对这种模型提出了许多新颖的改进。首先，我们改进了 Cross-Attention Conformer 的架构，该架构用于将噪声上下文引入模型中。其次，我们将模型推广为能够处理不同长度的噪声上下文。第三，我们提出了 Signal Dropout，这是一种对缺失的上下文信息进行建模的新颖策略。在没有一个或多个信号的情况下，所提出的模型的性能几乎与没有这些信号训练的特定任务模型一样好；当存在此类信号时，我们的系统与需要所有上下文信号的系统相比效果很好。与基线相比，当不存在说话者嵌入时，最终模型在背景语音上的相对单词错误率降低了 25.0%，而当不存在设备播放时，在 AEC 上相对单词错误率降低了 61.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的自动语音识别前端，可同时执行声学回声消除、语音增强和语音分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要多个独立模型处理不同任务，导致系统复杂且鲁棒性不足，亟需统一的多功能前端提升ASR性能。
AI.method: 改进Cross-Attention Conformer架构以融合噪声上下文，支持可变长度噪声输入，并提出信号丢弃策略模拟缺失上下文信息。
AI.result: 在无说话人嵌入时背景语音词错误率降低25.0%，无设备播放时AEC任务词错误率降低61.2%，性能接近专用模型。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过上下文感知设计实现了多功能集成，在关键任务上达到或超越现有方法效果，具有实际部署价值。

authors_text: Darren Tsai,Julie Stephany Berrio,Mao Shan,Eduardo Nebot,Stewart Worrall
title: Viewer-Centred Surface Completion for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 以观察者为中心的表面补全，用于 3D 对象检测中的无监督域适应
abstract: Every autonomous driving dataset has a different configuration of sensors, originating from distinct geographic regions and covering various scenarios. As a result, 3D detectors tend to overfit the datasets they are trained on. This causes a drastic decrease in accuracy when the detectors are trained on one dataset and tested on another. We observe that lidar scan pattern differences form a large component of this reduction in performance. We address this in our approach, SEE-VCN, by designing a novel viewer-centred surface completion network (VCN) to complete the surfaces of objects of interest within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework, SEE. With SEE-VCN, we obtain a unified representation of objects across datasets, allowing the network to focus on learning geometry, rather than overfitting on scan patterns. By adopting a domain-invariant representation, SEE-VCN can be classed as a multi-target domain adaptation approach where no annotations or re-training is required to obtain 3D detections for new scan patterns. Through extensive experiments, we show that our approach outperforms previous domain adaptation methods in multiple domain adaptation settings. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/darrenjkt/SEE-VCN.
summary: Every autonomous driving dataset has a different configuration of sensors, originating from distinct geographic regions and covering various scenarios. As a result, 3D detectors tend to overfit the datasets they are trained on. This causes a drastic decrease in accuracy when the detectors are trained on one dataset and tested on another. We observe that lidar scan pattern differences form a large component of this reduction in performance. We address this in our approach, SEE-VCN, by designing a novel viewer-centred surface completion network (VCN) to complete the surfaces of objects of interest within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework, SEE. With SEE-VCN, we obtain a unified representation of objects across datasets, allowing the network to focus on learning geometry, rather than overfitting on scan patterns. By adopting a domain-invariant representation, SEE-VCN can be classed as a multi-target domain adaptation approach where no annotations or re-training is required to obtain 3D detections for new scan patterns. Through extensive experiments, we show that our approach outperforms previous domain adaptation methods in multiple domain adaptation settings. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/darrenjkt/SEE-VCN.
abstract_zh: 每个自动驾驶数据集都有不同的传感器配置，这些传感器来自不同的地理区域并覆盖不同的场景。因此，3D 检测器往往会过度拟合它们所训练的数据集。当检测器在一个数据集上进行训练并在另一个数据集上进行测试时，这会导致准确性急剧下降。我们观察到，激光雷达扫描模式差异是导致性能下降的主要原因。我们在 SEE-VCN 方法中解决了这个问题，通过设计一种新颖的以观察者为中心的表面完成网络 (VCN)，在无监督域适应框架 SEE 内完成感兴趣对象的表面。通过 SEE-VCN，我们获得了跨数据集对象的统一表示，使网络能够专注于学习几何形状，而不是过度拟合扫描模式。通过采用域不变表示，SEE-VCN 可以归类为多目标域适应方法，无需注释或重新训练即可获得新扫描模式的 3D 检测。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的方法在多域适应设置中优于以前的域适应方法。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/darrenjkt/SEE-VCN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于观众中心表面补全网络（VCN）的无监督领域自适应方法SEE-VCN，解决自动驾驶中因LiDAR扫描模式差异导致的3D目标检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 不同数据集的传感器配置和地理环境差异导致3D检测器过拟合，跨数据集测试时精度骤降。LiDAR扫描模式差异是性能下降的主要因素，需设计无需标注和再训练的领域自适应方案。
AI.method: 设计VCN网络在无监督框架SEE中补全目标表面，生成跨数据集的统一几何表示，通过领域不变特征学习消除扫描模式影响，实现多目标领域自适应。
AI.result: 在多种领域自适应场景下优于现有方法，代码和数据已开源，无需标注和再训练即可适配新扫描模式的3D检测。
AI.conclusion: SEE-VCN通过表面补全和领域不变表示有效缓解跨数据集领域偏移问题，为自动驾驶中异构LiDAR数据的3D检测提供新思路。

result: 在多种领域自适应场景下优于现有方法，代码和数据已开源，无需标注和再训练即可适配新扫描模式的3D检测。
conclusion: SEE-VCN通过表面补全和领域不变表示有效缓解跨数据集领域偏移问题，为自动驾驶中异构LiDAR数据的3D检测提供新思路。
search_text: Viewer-Centred Surface Completion for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in 3D Object Detection 以观察者为中心的表面补全，用于 3D 对象检测中的无监督域适应 Every autonomous driving dataset has a different configuration of sensors, originating from distinct geographic regions and covering various scenarios. As a result, 3D detectors tend to overfit the datasets they are trained on. This causes a drastic decrease in accuracy when the detectors are trained on one dataset and tested on another. We observe that lidar scan pattern differences form a large component of this reduction in performance. We address this in our approach, SEE-VCN, by designing a novel viewer-centred surface completion network (VCN) to complete the surfaces of objects of interest within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework, SEE. With SEE-VCN, we obtain a unified representation of objects across datasets, allowing the network to focus on learning geometry, rather than overfitting on scan patterns. By adopting a domain-invariant representation, SEE-VCN can be classed as a multi-target domain adaptation approach where no annotations or re-training is required to obtain 3D detections for new scan patterns. Through extensive experiments, we show that our approach outperforms previous domain adaptation methods in multiple domain adaptation settings. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/darrenjkt/SEE-VCN. 每个自动驾驶数据集都有不同的传感器配置，这些传感器来自不同的地理区域并覆盖不同的场景。因此，3D 检测器往往会过度拟合它们所训练的数据集。当检测器在一个数据集上进行训练并在另一个数据集上进行测试时，这会导致准确性急剧下降。我们观察到，激光雷达扫描模式差异是导致性能下降的主要原因。我们在 SEE-VCN 方法中解决了这个问题，通过设计一种新颖的以观察者为中心的表面完成网络 (VCN)，在无监督域适应框架 SEE 内完成感兴趣对象的表面。通过 SEE-VCN，我们获得了跨数据集对象的统一表示，使网络能够专注于学习几何形状，而不是过度拟合扫描模式。通过采用域不变表示，SEE-VCN 可以归类为多目标域适应方法，无需注释或重新训练即可获得新扫描模式的 3D 检测。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的方法在多域适应设置中优于以前的域适应方法。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/darrenjkt/SEE-VCN 获取。 本文提出一种基于观众中心表面补全网络（VCN）的无监督领域自适应方法SEE-VCN，解决自动驾驶中因LiDAR扫描模式差异导致的3D目标检测性能下降问题。 Darren Tsai,Julie Stephany Berrio,Mao Shan,Eduardo Nebot,Stewart Worrall cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaomeng Wu,Yongqing Sun,Akisato Kimura,Kunio Kashino
title: Reflectance-Oriented Probabilistic Equalization for Image Enhancement
title_zh: 用于图像增强的面向反射率的概率均衡
comment: Published in ICASSP 2021. For GitHub code, see https://github.com/nttcslab/rope
comments: Published in ICASSP 2021. For GitHub code, see https://github.com/nttcslab/rope
abstract: Despite recent advances in image enhancement, it remains difficult for existing approaches to adaptively improve the brightness and contrast for both low-light and normal-light images. To solve this problem, we propose a novel 2D histogram equalization approach. It assumes intensity occurrence and co-occurrence to be dependent on each other and derives the distribution of intensity occurrence (1D histogram) by marginalizing over the distribution of intensity co-occurrence (2D histogram). This scheme improves global contrast more effectively and reduces noise amplification. The 2D histogram is defined by incorporating the local pixel value differences in image reflectance into the density estimation to alleviate the adverse effects of dark lighting conditions. Over 500 images were used for evaluation, demonstrating the superiority of our approach over existing studies. It can sufficiently improve the brightness of low-light images while avoiding over-enhancement in normal-light images.
summary: Despite recent advances in image enhancement, it remains difficult for existing approaches to adaptively improve the brightness and contrast for both low-light and normal-light images. To solve this problem, we propose a novel 2D histogram equalization approach. It assumes intensity occurrence and co-occurrence to be dependent on each other and derives the distribution of intensity occurrence (1D histogram) by marginalizing over the distribution of intensity co-occurrence (2D histogram). This scheme improves global contrast more effectively and reduces noise amplification. The 2D histogram is defined by incorporating the local pixel value differences in image reflectance into the density estimation to alleviate the adverse effects of dark lighting conditions. Over 500 images were used for evaluation, demonstrating the superiority of our approach over existing studies. It can sufficiently improve the brightness of low-light images while avoiding over-enhancement in normal-light images.
abstract_zh: 尽管图像增强方面最近取得了进展，但现有方法仍然难以自适应地提高低光和正常光图像的亮度和对比度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的二维直方图均衡方法。它假设强度发生和共现相互依赖，并通过边缘化强度共现的分布（2D 直方图）来导出强度发生的分布（1D 直方图）。该方案更有效地提高了全局对比度并减少了噪声放大。 2D直方图是通过将图像反射率的局部像素值差异纳入密度估计来定义的，以减轻暗光照条件的不利影响。使用超过 500 张图像进行评估，证明了我们的方法相对于现有研究的优越性。它可以充分提高弱光图像的亮度，同时避免正常光图像的过度增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反射率的二维直方图概率均衡化方法，用于同时增强低光和正常光照图像的亮度与对比度。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强方法难以自适应地同时优化低光和正常光照图像的亮度与对比度，且易放大噪声或过度增强正常光照图像。
AI.method: 通过建立强度出现概率与共现概率的依赖关系，利用二维直方图边缘化得到一维直方图，并结合局部像素反射率差异改进密度估计。
AI.result: 在500多张图像测试中，该方法在提升低光图像亮度的同时有效避免正常光照图像的过度增强，优于现有研究。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过反射率导向的二维直方图均衡化，在保持全局对比度的同时降低了噪声放大风险，实现了自适应图像增强。

To solve this problem, we propose a novel 2D histogram equalization approach. It assumes intensity occurrence and co-occurrence to be dependent on each other and derives the distribution of intensity occurrence (1D histogram) by marginalizing over the distribution of intensity co-occurrence (2D histogram). This scheme improves global contrast more effectively and reduces noise amplification. The 2D histogram is defined by incorporating the local pixel value differences in image reflectance into the density estimation to alleviate the adverse effects of dark lighting conditions. Over 500 images were used for evaluation, demonstrating the superiority of our approach over existing studies. It can sufficiently improve the brightness of low-light images while avoiding over-enhancement in normal-light images. 尽管图像增强方面最近取得了进展，但现有方法仍然难以自适应地提高低光和正常光图像的亮度和对比度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的二维直方图均衡方法。它假设强度发生和共现相互依赖，并通过边缘化强度共现的分布（2D 直方图）来导出强度发生的分布（1D 直方图）。该方案更有效地提高了全局对比度并减少了噪声放大。 2D直方图是通过将图像反射率的局部像素值差异纳入密度估计来定义的，以减轻暗光照条件的不利影响。使用超过 500 张图像进行评估，证明了我们的方法相对于现有研究的优越性。它可以充分提高弱光图像的亮度，同时避免正常光图像的过度增强。 本文提出一种基于反射率的二维直方图概率均衡化方法，用于同时增强低光和正常光照图像的亮度与对比度。 Xiaomeng Wu,Yongqing Sun,Akisato Kimura,Kunio Kashino cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaomeng Wu,Takahito Kawanishi,Kunio Kashino
title: Reflectance-Guided, Contrast-Accumulated Histogram Equalization
title_zh: 反射率引导、对比度累积直方图均衡
comment: Published in ICASSP 2020. For GitHub code, see https://github.com/nttcslab/rg-cache
comments: Published in ICASSP 2020. For GitHub code, see https://github.com/nttcslab/rg-cache
abstract: Existing image enhancement methods fall short of expectations because with them it is difficult to improve global and local image contrast simultaneously. To address this problem, we propose a histogram equalization-based method that adapts to the data-dependent requirements of brightness enhancement and improves the visibility of details without losing the global contrast. This method incorporates the spatial information provided by image context in density estimation for discriminative histogram equalization. To minimize the adverse effect of non-uniform illumination, we propose defining spatial information on the basis of image reflectance estimated with edge preserving smoothing. Our method works particularly well for determining how the background brightness should be adaptively adjusted and for revealing useful image details hidden in the dark.
summary: Existing image enhancement methods fall short of expectations because with them it is difficult to improve global and local image contrast simultaneously. To address this problem, we propose a histogram equalization-based method that adapts to the data-dependent requirements of brightness enhancement and improves the visibility of details without losing the global contrast. This method incorporates the spatial information provided by image context in density estimation for discriminative histogram equalization. To minimize the adverse effect of non-uniform illumination, we propose defining spatial information on the basis of image reflectance estimated with edge preserving smoothing. Our method works particularly well for determining how the background brightness should be adaptively adjusted and for revealing useful image details hidden in the dark.
abstract_zh: 现有的图像增强方法达不到预期，因为它们很难同时提高全局和局部图像对比度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于直方图均衡的方法，该方法适应亮度增强的数据相关要求，并在不损失全局对比度的情况下提高细节的可见性。该方法将图像上下文提供的空间信息合并到密度估计中以进行判别直方图均衡。为了最大限度地减少不均匀照明的不利影响，我们建议根据边缘保留平滑估计的图像反射率来定义空间信息。我们的方法特别适合确定如何自适应调整背景亮度以及揭示隐藏在黑暗中的有用图像细节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反射率引导和对比度累积的直方图均衡化方法，以同时提升图像全局与局部对比度并增强细节可见度。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强方法难以同时改善全局和局部对比度，且非均匀光照会降低细节可见度，需开发适应亮度增强需求的新方法。
AI.method: 结合图像上下文的空间信息进行密度估计，利用边缘保持平滑估计的反射率定义空间信息，通过自适应调整背景亮度揭示暗部细节。
AI.result: 该方法在背景亮度自适应调整及暗部细节增强方面表现优异，有效减少了非均匀光照的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出的直方图均衡化方法在保留全局对比度的同时提升了细节可见度，为图像增强提供了有效解决方案。
